Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT g.*, v.ACCOUNT , isnull(g.cos_price, 0) - isnull(v.account, 0) AS diffs , CASE WHEN g.pid IS NULL THEN g.adm_name ELSE au.adm_name END AS sales, bas_surname + '/' + bas_given_name AS cname FROM V_GRP_COS_INFO G LEFT JOIN vis_tab_base vtb ON g.bas_vis_id = vtb.vis_id LEFT JOIN V_COS_GRP_FIN_ACCOUNT V ON G.GRP_ID = V.GRP_ID AND G.COS_ID = V.COS_ID AND V.FIN_TYPES = 'FIN_INCOME' AND v.pay_status = 'PAY_YES' LEFT JOIN adm_user au ON g.pid = au.adm_id WHERE G.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND g.GRP_ID=@GRP_ID AND G.GRP_COS_ID IN (@GRP_COS_IDS_SPLIT) ORDER BY COS_LEADER DESC, COS_NAME

Set.Name: getAllergyIds SQL
Set.Sql: select GRP_COS_ID from grp_costumer a inner join grp_main gm on a.grp_id=gm.grp_id and gm.GRP_TYPE!='GRP_VIRTUAL' left join VIS_TAB_DATA b on a.BAS_VIS_ID=b.VIS_ID and b.VIS_DAT_NAME='BAS_DEFORMITY_TICK' and b.VIS_DAT_VAL='Y' left join VIS_TAB_DATA c on a.BAS_VIS_ID=c.VIS_ID and c.VIS_DAT_NAME='BAS_LONG_TERM_DRUG_TICK' and c.VIS_DAT_VAL='Y' where a.grp_id=@GRP_ID and a.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' and (b.VIS_ID is not null or c.VIS_ID is not null)

Set.Name: getNoPassVisaIds
Set.Sql: SELECT GRP_COS_ID FROM grp_costumer WHERE VIS_STATUS = 'VIS_CRE_FAIL' AND COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' AND GRP_ID = @GRP_ID

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT g.*, v.ACCOUNT , isnull(g.cos_price,0)-isnull(v.account,0) AS diffs, CASE WHEN g.pid IS NULL THEN g.adm_name ELSE au.adm_name END AS sales , bas_surname+'/'+bas_given_name cname FROM V_GRP_COS_INFO G LEFT JOIN vis_tab_base vtb ON g.bas_vis_id=vtb.vis_id LEFT JOIN V_COS_GRP_FIN_ACCOUNT V ON G.GRP_ID = V.GRP_ID AND G.COS_ID = V.COS_ID AND V.FIN_TYPES='FIN_INCOME' AND v.pay_status='PAY_YES' LEFT JOIN adm_user au ON g.pid=au.adm_id WHERE G.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND (g.grp_id=@grp_id OR @grp_id IS NULL) AND ( ((SALES_ID=@G_ADM_ID OR g.pid=@G_ADM_ID) AND @t=10) OR @t=12 OR @t=13) ORDER BY COS_LEADER DESC,COS_NAME

Set.Name: X SQL
Set.Sql: select ACC_TIT_ID,ACC_TIT_CODE,SUBSTRING(ACC_TIT_NAME,8,100) ACC_TIT_NAME,CATE_ID from ACC_TITLE where ACC_TIT_PID=2 ORDER BY CATE_ID

Set.Name: Y SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT BAS_TAG_PARA1 AS MONTH_IDX , CASE WHEN @SYS_EWA_LANG = 'enus' THEN BAS_TAG_NAME_EN ELSE BAS_TAG_NAME END AS MONTH_NAME FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'COM_MONTH' and ((isnull(@CUR_YEAR,@EWA.DATE.YEAR)!=@EWA.DATE.YEAR) or BAS_TAG_PARA1*1<=month(getdate()) ) ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.Name: DATA SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT x.*, k.LEFT_MONEY BALANCE FROM ACC_RECORD k INNER JOIN ( SELECT a.ACC_TIT_ID, MAX(ar.ACC_REC_ID) AS ACC_REC_ID, MONTH(ACC_REC_TIME) AS MONTH_IDX FROM ACC_TITLE a INNER JOIN ACC_RECORD ar ON ar.ACC_TIT_ID = A.ACC_TIT_ID AND ACC_REC_TYPE = 'ACC_CREDITS' WHERE a.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND YEAR(ACC_REC_TIME) = isnull(@CUR_YEAR, @EWA.DATE.YEAR) AND a.ACC_TIT_PID = 2 AND LEFT_MONEY IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.ACC_TIT_ID, MONTH(ACC_REC_TIME) ) x ON k.ACC_REC_ID = x.ACC_REC_ID where 1=1

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.CURRENCY_ID, A.REF_ID, A.REF_TYPE, A.FILE_TYPE, A.CURRENCY_REMARK , A.UNID, A.ADM_ID, A.TAG, A.STATE, A.CREATE_TIME, a.PIC_MD5 ,A.CURRENCY_OB1 FILE_NAME , a.GRP_ID, A.CURRENCY_OB2, A.CURRENCY_OB3, A.CURRENCY_EXT, B.ADM_NAME , c.SUP_NAME, d.GRP_HY_CODE FROM CURRENCY_FILE A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ADM_ID , CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG = 'enus' THEN ISNULL(ADM_NAME_EN, ADM_NAME) ELSE ADM_NAME END AS ADM_NAME FROM ADM_USER WHERE SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID ) B ON A.ADM_ID = B.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN C ON A.RELATE_SUP_ID = C.SUP_ID INNER JOIN GRP_MAIN D ON A.GRP_ID = D.GRP_ID WHERE A.STATE='USED' AND A.PIC_PHY_PATH IS NOT NULL AND A.PIC_PHY_PATH != '' AND A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND (@BY_FILE_TYPE is null or a.FILE_TYPE=@BY_FILE_TYPE) AND (@BY_SUP_ID IS NULL OR A.RELATE_SUP_ID = @BY_SUP_ID) AND (@BY_GRP_ID IS NULL OR a.GRP_ID = @BY_GRP_ID) and D.GRP_STATE='USED' AND NOT D.GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC') ) x WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY CURRENCY_ID DESC

Set.RefSql: SELECT BAS_TAG,BAS_TAG_NAME,BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP='FILE_TYPE' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.GRP_ID , a.GRP_HY_CODE , a.GRP_NAME , a.GRP_TYPE , a.CLAC_STATUS , a.GRP_RUN_MODEL , a.CP_AIR_TICKET , a.GRP_VISA , kk1.ENQ_ID , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then FCITY.CITY_NAME_EN else FCITY.CITY_NAME end FCITY , s.UNIT_PRICE QUOTED_PRICE , c.adm_name , isnull(s.PAX,0) PAX , isnull(S.STUDENTS,0) STUDENTS , isnull(S.LEADERS,0) LEADERS , kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM PPNUM , kk1.HEAD_NUM , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(s.PAX,0) diff , case when kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(s.PAX,0)=0 then '一致' when kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(s.PAX,0)>0 then'少人' when kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(s.PAX,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , s.IN_PLAN BILL_RECEIVABLE , s.IN_REAL BILL_RECEIVED , s.COST PAY_PLAN , s.PAY_REAL , s.PB PROFIT_CURRENT , S.WZF , S.UNBUY , AIR_TICKET_PAYED.AIR_TICKET_PAYED , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then COUNTRY.CITY_NAME_EN else COUNTRY.CITY_NAME end COUNTRY_NAME , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then s.CITYS_EN else s.CITYS end CITYS , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , kk1.ENQ_CREATE_TIME , s.START_DATE SDT , s.END_DATE DT , s.DAYS , cm.CAMP_NAME , vis.VISA_MATERIAL , isnull('拒签 '+cast(vis_fail.VIS_FAIL_NUM as varchar(10)),'') VISA_RESULTS ,CASE WHEN GRP_GYAP_ID IS NULL THEN 'COM_NO' ELSE 'COM_YES' END GRP_GYAP_DOC ,GRP_GYAP_ID ,a.GRP_UNID FROM GRP_MAIN a INNER join enq_main kk1 on kk1.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID and kk1.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' LEFT JOIN CITY FCITY ON KK1.F_CITY = FCITY.CITY_ID left join GRP_FIN_SUMMARY s on a.GRP_ID=s.GRP_ID left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join CITY COUNTRY on s.DEST_MAIN_COUNTRY_ID=COUNTRY.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID left join CAMP_GRP_CONN cgc on a.GRP_ID=cgc.GRP_ID and cgc.STATE='USED' left join CAMP_MAIN cm on cgc.CAMP_ID=cm.CAMP_ID left join ( --资料收取数 SELECT COUNT(*) VISA_MATERIAL,C.FRO_GRP_ID FROM VIS_REQ_FILE A INNER JOIN VIS_TAB_MAIN C ON A.VIS_ID=C.VIS_ID INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER D ON C.FRO_GRP_ID=D.GRP_ID AND C.USR_ID=D.COS_ID AND D.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY C.FRO_GRP_ID) vis on vis.FRO_GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID left join( --拒签数量 select count(1) VIS_FAIL_NUM,GRP_ID from grp_costumer a where VIS_STATUS='VIS_CRE_FAIL' AND COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY GRP_ID ) vis_fail on vis_fail.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN V_GRP_GYAP_DOC_CHOOESE GYAP ON A.GRP_ID=GYAP.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN ( select C.grp_id GID, A.COIN_ID, SUM(A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP * A.SUB_NUM ) PRICE, SUM(E.PAY_REAL) AS AIR_TICKET_PAYED from enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.ENQ_OP_ID = b.enq_op_id and b.SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' inner join enq_main c on b.ENQ_ID = c.ENQ_ID and c.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_BILL E ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = E.RELATE_SUP_ID and C.grp_id=e.GRP_ID INNER JOIN SER_MAIN SM ON A.ser_id = SM.ser_id where SM.SER_TAG='SER_TAG_AIR' GROUP BY C.grp_id, A.COIN_ID ) AIR_TICKET_PAYED ON A.grp_id = AIR_TICKET_PAYED.GID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.grp_sta <> 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' and a.grp_pid is null AND ( A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE' OR A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' AND ( C.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR @VIEW_ACL = 'ALL' OR @VIEW_ACL = 'DEPT' AND C.ADM_ID IN (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) AND ( @FILTER is null OR @FILTER = 'SALES' AND NOT A.GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC') ) ) A where 1=1 order by sdt desc, grp_id desc

Set.Name: OnFrameDelete SQL
Set.Sql: update GRP_MAIN set grp_state='DEL' WHERE GRP_ID = @GRP_ID

Set.Name: ExtendAction0 SQL
Set.Sql: update grp_main set grp_sta=@EWA_WF_NEXT where grp_id=@grp_id and sup_id=@g_sup_id

Set.Name: ExtendAction1 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME,SUP.CRM_COM_ID,a.* , b.allprice, b.profit1 ,c.adm_name,isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num ,(HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< dt then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(dt,grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO, case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok,DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID)AS PT, case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem, isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum,A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME,B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE ,ENQ_CREATE_TIME,GO.GRP_OPEN_TIME,GO.GRP_OPEN_STATE , s.UNIT_PRICE QUOTED_PRICE , s.IN_PLAN BILL_RECEIVABLE , s.IN_REAL BILL_RECEIVED , s.COST PAY_PLAN , s.PAY_REAL , s.PB PROFIT_CURRENT , s.START_DATE SDT , s.END_DATE DT , s.DAYS , S.WZF , S.UNBUY , vis.VISA_MATERIAL , isnull('拒签 '+cast(vis_fail.VIS_FAIL_NUM as varchar(10)),'') VISA_RESULTS , GVT.BAS_TAG AS GRP_VISIT FROM v_GRP_MAIN a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY where enq_id in( SELECT enq_id FROM ENQ_MAIN WHERE GRP_ID=grp_id AND ENQ_STATE='used' and enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) AND SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( select count(g.cos_id) nums,g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM,ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' )kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join (select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm )as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join (select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG=A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GO ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID=GO.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID INNER JOIN ( select distinct GRP_ID,RELATE_SUP_ID ,b.CRM_COM_ID from GRP_COSTUMER a inner join CRM_CONN b on a.RELATE_SUP_ID=b.SUP_DOWN_ID WHERE CRM_COM_ID=@CRM_COM_ID union select grp_id,a.sup_down_id,b.crm_com_id from grp_main a inner join CRM_CONN b on a.SUP_down_ID=b.SUP_DOWN_ID WHERE CRM_COM_ID=@CRM_COM_ID ) SUP ON A.GRP_ID=SUP.GRP_ID left join GRP_FIN_SUMMARY s on a.GRP_ID=s.GRP_ID left join ( --资料收取数 SELECT COUNT(*) VISA_MATERIAL,C.FRO_GRP_ID FROM VIS_REQ_FILE A INNER JOIN VIS_TAB_MAIN C ON A.VIS_ID=C.VIS_ID INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER D ON C.FRO_GRP_ID=D.GRP_ID AND C.USR_ID=D.COS_ID AND D.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY C.FRO_GRP_ID) vis on vis.FRO_GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID left join( --拒签数量 select count(1) VIS_FAIL_NUM,GRP_ID from grp_costumer a where VIS_STATUS='VIS_CRE_FAIL' AND COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY GRP_ID ) vis_fail on vis_fail.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID INNER JOIN BAS_TAG GTP ON GTP.BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_TYPE' AND A.GRP_TYPE=GTP.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG GVT ON GVT.BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_VISIT' AND GVT.BAS_TAG=GTP.BAS_TAG_PARA6 ) A WHERE (sup_id=@g_sup_id ) and grp_state<>'DEL' and not A.grp_type in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC') order by grp_id desc

Set.Name: ExtendAction2 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT *,nums1-nums as diff FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.allprice , b.profit1 , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , (HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< DT then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(DT, grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID) AS PT , case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem , isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_STATE FROM v_GRP_MAIN a INNER JOIN ( -- 出发和回来日期 SELECT ENQ_ID, min(enq_jny_date) as SDT, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY where SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 报价 SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团备注 select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm ) as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id ) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG=A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GO ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID=GO.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 单团 INNER JOIN crm_conn c on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) UNION SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 散拼 INNER join ( select grp_id, a.relate_sup_id, count(*) as STUDENTS from grp_costumer a GROUP BY A.GRP_ID, relate_sup_id ) d on a.grp_id = d.grp_id INNER JOIN crm_conn c on D.relate_sup_id = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) ) SALES ON A.GRP_ID = SALES.GRP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND ( A.grp_type = @grp_type OR (@grp_type is null and not A.grp_type in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC')) ) AND (A.GRP_OPEN_ID >0 OR A.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') AND (@DT_START IS NULL OR SDT >= @DT_START) AND (@DT_END IS NULL OR SDT <= @DT_END) AND ( @T=12 OR @T = 10 AND SALES.GRP_ID > 0 ) ) A WHERE 1=1 order by a.grp_id desc

Set.Name: saveenq
Set.Sql: PR_GRP_ENQ_EDIT (@grp_id,@enq_id,@html,@g_sup_id,@g_adm_id)

Set.Name: upgrpstate
Set.Sql: update grp_main set GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' where grp_id=@grp_id

Set.Name: initFlow
Set.Sql: select grp_num,grp_id,vis.vis_nums from grp_main grp left join( select @grp_id fro_grp_id, count(vis_id) vis_nums from vis_tab_main where fro_grp_id=@grp_id ) vis on vis.fro_grp_id=grp.grp_id where grp_num != vis_nums and grp.grp_id=@grp_id

Set.Name: NEW_MENU_2019_SALES SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT *,nums1-nums as diff FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.allprice , b.profit1 , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , (HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< DT then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(DT, grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID) AS PT , case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem , isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_STATE FROM v_GRP_MAIN a left JOIN ( -- 出发和回来日期 SELECT ENQ_ID, min(enq_jny_date) as SDT, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY where SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 报价 SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团备注 select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm ) as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id ) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG=A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GO ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID=GO.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 单团 INNER JOIN crm_conn c on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) UNION SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 散拼 INNER join ( select grp_id, a.relate_sup_id, count(*) as STUDENTS from grp_costumer a GROUP BY A.GRP_ID, relate_sup_id ) d on a.grp_id = d.grp_id INNER JOIN crm_conn c on D.relate_sup_id = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) ) SALES ON A.GRP_ID = SALES.GRP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND (A.OP_ID = @OP_ID or (A.OP_ID is null and @OP_ID = 0) or @OP_ID is null) AND ( A.grp_type = @grp_type OR (@grp_type is null and not A.grp_type in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC')) ) AND (A.GRP_OPEN_ID >0 OR A.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') AND (@DT_START IS NULL OR grp_sdate >= @DT_START) AND (@DT_END IS NULL OR grp_sdate <= @DT_END) AND ( @T=12 OR @T = 10 AND SALES.GRP_ID > 0 ) ) A WHERE 1=1 order by a.grp_id desc

Set.Name: Old-OnPageLoad Sql
Set.Sql: --旧的onpageload,2019-08-24备份; SELECT *,nums1-nums as diff FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.QUOTED_PRICE , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , (HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , INCOME.* , PAYMENT.* , isnull(INCOME.BILL_RECEIVED,0) - isnull(PAYMENT.PAY_REAL,0) as PROFIT_CURRENT , COUNTRY.COUNTRY_NAME , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , dd.SDT , dd.DT , DD.DAYS FROM v_GRP_MAIN a LEFT JOIN ( -- 出发和回来日期 SELECT ENQ_ID, min(enq_jny_date) as SDT, max(enq_jny_date) DT, MAX(ENQ_JNY_DAY) DAYS FROM ENQ_JNY where SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 报价 SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(sig_r_price) as QUOTED_PRICE from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 应收、已收 SELECT GRP_ID ID0, SUM(BILL_RECEIVABLE) BILL_RECEIVABLE, SUM(BILL_RECEIVED) AS BILL_RECEIVED FROM GRP_BILL GROUP BY GRP_ID ) as INCOME on INCOME.ID0 = a.grp_id left join ( -- 支付 select GRP_ID ID1 , sum(PAY_PLAN) AS PAY_PLAN , sum(PAY_REAL) AS PAY_REAL , sum(PAY_UN) AS PAY_UN FROM GRP_PAY_BILL GROUP BY GRP_ID ) AS PAYMENT ON PAYMENT.ID1 = A.grp_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 国家 SELECT ENQ_ID AS ID2, CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN b.CITY_NAME_EN else b.CITY_NAME end AS COUNTRY_NAME FROM ( select enq_id, right( CONVERT(varchar, max( CONVERT(bigint, aa) * 1000000000 + country_id )),9) *1 AS COU_ID from ( select ENQ_ID, b.COUNTRY_ID, count(*) aa from ENQ_CACHE_CITYS a inner join city b on a.CITY_ID = b.CITY_ID group by ENQ_ID, b.COUNTRY_ID ) as d group by enq_id ) A inner join city b on a.COU_ID = b.CITY_ID ) AS COUNTRY ON A.ENQ_ID = COUNTRY.ID2 LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.grp_sta <> 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' and a.grp_pid is null ) A where 1=1 order by sdt desc, a.grp_id desc

Set.Name: 加载数据
Set.Sql: select D.GRP_ID , A.SUP_DOWN_ID , sm.SUP_NAME , A.COIN_ID , SUM(A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP * A.SUB_NUM ) PRICE , SUM(E.PAY_REAL) AS PAY_REAL from enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.ENQ_OP_ID = b.enq_op_id and b.SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' inner join enq_main c on b.ENQ_ID = c.ENQ_ID and c.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' inner join grp_main d on d.GRP_ID = c.GRP_ID AND D.GRP_STATE='USED' LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_BILL E ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = E.RELATE_SUP_ID and d.grp_id=e.GRP_ID inner join sup_main sm on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = sm.SUP_ID INNER JOIN SER_MAIN ser ON A.ser_id = ser.ser_id and ser.SER_TAG='SER_TAG_AIR' where d.grp_id in (@ids_split) AND D.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY D.grp_id, A.SUP_DOWN_ID, sm.SUP_NAME, A.COIN_ID

Set.Info: The type of business to which it belongs

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT f.ENQ_CREATE_TIME , enq.ENQ_ID , A.GRP_ID , A.GRP_HY_CODE , A.GRP_NAME , A.GRP_SDATE , A.GRP_VISA , A.GRP_SDATE+DAY_NUM GRP_EDATE , enq.DAY_NUM , enq.PEOPLE_NUM , enq.HEAD_NUM , enq.ENQ_CAMP_ID , enq.ENQ_CAMP_ACCOMMODATION_TYPE , enq.ENQ_CAMP_COURSE_TYPE , enq.AIR , enq.HOTLE HOTEL , cm.CAMP_NAME , B.ADM_NAME , c.BUDGET_COST , c.BUDGET_PROFIT , D.SUP_NAME , E.BAS_TAG_NAME GRP_RUN_MODEL_NAME , F.A1 , case when ENQ_STAR=0 or ENQ_STAR is null then '无' else '有' end as ENQ_STAR , case when ENQ_OP=0 or ENQ_OP is null then '无' else '有' end as ENQ_OP , case when ENQ_ING=0 or ENQ_ING is null then '无' else '有' end as ENQ_ING , CRM.CRM_COM_ID as COM_ID -- 避免和 CRM_COM_ID 参数冲突 r_crm2 调用 , OP.ADM_NAME AS OP , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then country.CITY_NAME_EN else country.CITY_NAME end DEST_COUNTRY , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then ems.CITYS_EN else ems.CITYS end DEST_CITY FROM V_GRP_MAIN A inner JOIN ENQ_MAIN enq on a.GRP_ID=enq.GRP_ID and enq.ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES' left join ENQ_FIN_SUMMARY ems on enq.ENQ_ID=ems.ENQ_ID left join CITY country on ems.DEST_MAIN_COUNTRY_ID=country.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER OP ON A.OP_ID = OP.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID , sum(SIG_PRICE) as BUDGET_COST , sum(SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE) AS BUDGET_PROFIT FROM ENQ_PRICE where ENQ_ENTRY!='SER_ENTRY3' GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) c on c.enq_id = enq.enq_id LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN D ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = D.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG E ON A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = E.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GRP_ID, COUNT(*) A1,max(ENQ_CREATE_TIME)as ENQ_CREATE_TIME FROM ENQ_MAIN where enq_state='USED' GROUP BY GRP_ID ) F ON A.GRP_ID=F.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN ( select grp_id, max(case flow_state when 'ENQ_ING' then num else 0 end ) as ENQ_ING , max(case flow_state when 'ENQ_STAR' then num else 0 end) as ENQ_STAR , max(case flow_state when 'ENQ_OP' then num else 0 end) as ENQ_OP from ( select grp_id,flow_state,count(*)as num from enq_main where enq_state='USED' group by grp_id,flow_state ) as gp group by grp_id ) AS KS ON A.GRP_ID=KS.GRP_ID inner JOIN CRM_CONN CRM ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = CRM.SUP_DOWN_ID AND CRM.SUP_UP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND (@BY_CRM_COM_ID is null OR CRM.CRM_COM_ID = @BY_CRM_COM_ID) LEFT JOIN ADM_USER B ON CRM.ADM_ID = B.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON B.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN LEFT JOIN CAMP_MAIN cm on enq.ENQ_CAMP_ID=cm.CAMP_ID WHERE A.grp_state = 'USED' AND a.grp_code='' AND GRP_STA ='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' AND A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND NOT A.GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC') AND (@BY_CAMP_ID is null or cm.CAMP_ID=@BY_CAMP_ID) AND (@COOP_PLAN is null or (a.grp_sdate>getdate() and enq.FLOW_STATE='ENQ_STAR')) --合作计划，未确认的有效询价单 AND (@ENQ_OPS is null or enq.FLOW_STATE in ('ENQ_STAR', 'ENQ_OP')) --报价单 ) AS GP WHERE 1=1 order by grp_id desc

Set.Name: OnFrameDelete SQL
Set.Sql:
update GRP_MAIN set grp_state='DEL' WHERE GRP_ID = @GRP_ID and sup_id=@g_sup_id and not exists( SELECT * FROM ( select top 1 1 a from grp_costumer where grp_id=@grp_id union select top 1 1 from grp_finance where grp_id=@grp_id union select top 1 1 from grp_pay_apply where grp_id=@grp_id ) AA );
select 1 a from GRP_MAIN where grp_state='DEL' AND GRP_ID = @GRP_ID

Set.Name: onclick

SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'C_CUR_NAME' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.GRP_ID , a.GRP_HY_CODE , a.GRP_NAME , a.GRP_TYPE , a.CLAC_STATUS , a.GRP_RUN_MODEL , a.CP_AIR_TICKET , kk1.ENQ_ID , s.UNIT_PRICE QUOTED_PRICE , c.adm_name , isnull(gb.BILL_PEOPLE_NUM,isnull(s.PAX,0)) PAX , isnull(S.STUDENTS,0) STUDENTS , isnull(S.LEADERS,0) LEADERS , kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM PPNUM , kk1.HEAD_NUM , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(s.PAX,0) diff , case when kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(s.PAX,0)=0 then '一致' when kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(s.PAX,0)>0 then'少人' when kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(s.PAX,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , isnull(gb.BILL_RECEIVABLE,s.IN_PLAN) BILL_RECEIVABLE , isnull(gb.BILL_RECEIVED,s.IN_REAL) BILL_RECEIVED , s.COST PAY_PLAN , s.PAY_REAL , s.PB PROFIT_CURRENT , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then COUNTRY.CITY_NAME_EN else COUNTRY.CITY_NAME end COUNTRY_NAME , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then s.CITYS_EN else s.CITYS end CITYS , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , kk1.ENQ_CREATE_TIME , s.START_DATE SDT , s.END_DATE DT , s.DAYS , cm.CAMP_NAME , vis.VISA_MATERIAL , isnull('拒签 '+cast(vis_fail.VIS_FAIL_NUM as varchar(10)),'') VISA_RESULTS FROM GRP_MAIN a INNER join enq_main kk1 on kk1.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID and kk1.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' left join GRP_FIN_SUMMARY s on a.GRP_ID=s.GRP_ID left join GRP_BILL gb on a.GRP_ID=gb.GRP_ID and gb.RELATE_SUP_ID=@BY_SUP_ID left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join CITY COUNTRY on s.DEST_MAIN_COUNTRY_ID=COUNTRY.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID left join CAMP_GRP_CONN cgc on a.GRP_ID=cgc.GRP_ID and cgc.STATE='USED' left join CAMP_MAIN cm on cgc.CAMP_ID=cm.CAMP_ID left join ( --资料收取数 SELECT COUNT(*) VISA_MATERIAL,C.FRO_GRP_ID FROM VIS_REQ_FILE A INNER JOIN VIS_TAB_MAIN C ON A.VIS_ID=C.VIS_ID INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER D ON C.FRO_GRP_ID=D.GRP_ID AND C.USR_ID=D.COS_ID AND D.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' WHERE (@BY_SUP_ID is null or D.RELATE_SUP_ID=@BY_SUP_ID) GROUP BY C.FRO_GRP_ID) vis on vis.FRO_GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID left join( --拒签数量 select count(1) VIS_FAIL_NUM,GRP_ID from grp_costumer a where VIS_STATUS='VIS_CRE_FAIL' AND COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' AND (@BY_SUP_ID is null or RELATE_SUP_ID=@BY_SUP_ID) GROUP BY GRP_ID ) vis_fail on vis_fail.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND a.grp_code='' AND A.grp_sta <> 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' and a.grp_pid is null AND NOT A.GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC','GRP_TYPE_BMYX','GRP_TYPE_BMYX_COS') and (@BY_CAMP_ID is null or isnull(cm.CAMP_ID,a.GRP_CAMP_ID)=@BY_CAMP_ID) and (@GRP_STA is null or a.GRP_STA = @GRP_STA) and (isnull(@GRP_STA,'')!='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' or (@GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' AND A.GRP_SDATE>getdate())) and (@GRP_PROGRESSES is null or (A.CLAC_STATUS!='FINALLY_CLOSE' and a.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ')) --新团 and (@BY_SUP_ID is null or a.SUP_DOWN_ID=@BY_SUP_ID or exists(select 1 from grp_bill x where x.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID and x.RELATE_SUP_ID=@BY_SUP_ID) or exists(select 1 from grp_costumer x where x.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' and x.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID and x.RELATE_SUP_ID=@BY_SUP_ID)) ) A where 1=1 order by sdt desc, grp_id desc

Set.Name: OnFrameDelete SQL
Set.Sql: update GRP_MAIN set grp_state='DEL' WHERE GRP_ID = @GRP_ID

Set.Name: ExtendAction0 SQL
Set.Sql: update grp_main set grp_sta=@EWA_WF_NEXT where grp_id=@grp_id and sup_id=@g_sup_id

Set.Name: ExtendAction1 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME,SUP.CRM_COM_ID,a.* , b.allprice, b.profit1 ,c.adm_name,isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num ,(HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< dt then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(dt,grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO, case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok,DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID)AS PT, case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem, isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum,A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME,B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE ,ENQ_CREATE_TIME,GO.GRP_OPEN_TIME,GO.GRP_OPEN_STATE FROM v_GRP_MAIN a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY where enq_id in( SELECT enq_id FROM ENQ_MAIN WHERE GRP_ID=grp_id AND ENQ_STATE='used' and enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) AND SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( select count(g.cos_id) nums,g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM,ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' )kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join (select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm )as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join (select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG=A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GO ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID=GO.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID INNER JOIN ( select distinct GRP_ID,RELATE_SUP_ID ,b.CRM_COM_ID from GRP_COSTUMER a inner join CRM_CONN b on a.RELATE_SUP_ID=b.SUP_DOWN_ID WHERE CRM_COM_ID=@CRM_COM_ID union select grp_id,a.sup_down_id,b.crm_com_id from grp_main a inner join CRM_CONN b on a.SUP_down_ID=b.SUP_DOWN_ID WHERE CRM_COM_ID=@CRM_COM_ID ) SUP ON A.GRP_ID=SUP.GRP_ID ) A WHERE (sup_id=@g_sup_id ) and grp_state<>'DEL' order by grp_id desc

Set.Name: ExtendAction2 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT *,nums1-nums as diff FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.allprice , b.profit1 , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , (HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< DT then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(DT, grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID) AS PT , case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem , isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_STATE FROM v_GRP_MAIN a INNER JOIN ( -- 出发和回来日期 SELECT ENQ_ID, min(enq_jny_date) as SDT, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY where SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 报价 SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团备注 select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm ) as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id ) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG=A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GO ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID=GO.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 单团 INNER JOIN crm_conn c on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) UNION SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 散拼 INNER join ( select grp_id, a.relate_sup_id, count(*) as STUDENTS from grp_costumer a GROUP BY A.GRP_ID, relate_sup_id ) d on a.grp_id = d.grp_id INNER JOIN crm_conn c on D.relate_sup_id = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) ) SALES ON A.GRP_ID = SALES.GRP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND ( A.grp_type = @grp_type OR (@grp_type is null and not A.grp_type in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC')) ) AND (A.GRP_OPEN_ID >0 OR A.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') AND (@DT_START IS NULL OR SDT >= @DT_START) AND (@DT_END IS NULL OR SDT <= @DT_END) AND ( @T=12 OR @T = 10 AND SALES.GRP_ID > 0 ) ) A WHERE 1=1 order by a.grp_id desc

Set.Name: saveenq
Set.Sql: PR_GRP_ENQ_EDIT (@grp_id,@enq_id,@html,@g_sup_id,@g_adm_id)

Set.Name: upgrpstate
Set.Sql: update grp_main set GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' where grp_id=@grp_id

Set.Name: initFlow
Set.Sql: select grp_num,grp_id,vis.vis_nums from grp_main grp left join( select @grp_id fro_grp_id, count(vis_id) vis_nums from vis_tab_main where fro_grp_id=@grp_id ) vis on vis.fro_grp_id=grp.grp_id where grp_num != vis_nums and grp.grp_id=@grp_id

nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< DT then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(DT, grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID) SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团备注 select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm ) as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id ) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG=A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GO ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID=GO.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 单团 INNER JOIN crm_conn c on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) UNION SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 散拼 INNER join ( select grp_id, a.relate_sup_id, count(*) as STUDENTS from grp_costumer a GROUP BY A.GRP_ID, relate_sup_id ) d on a.grp_id = d.grp_id INNER JOIN crm_conn c on D.relate_sup_id = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) ) SALES ON A.GRP_ID = SALES.GRP_ID where a.sup_id A.grp_type in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC')) ) AND (A.GRP_OPEN_ID >0 OR A.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') AND (@DT_START IS NULL OR grp_sdate >= @DT_START) AND (@DT_END IS NULL OR grp_sdate <= @DT_END) AND ( @T=12 OR @T = 10 AND SALES.GRP_ID > 0 ) ) A WHERE 1=1 order by a.grp_id desc

Set.Name: Old-OnPageLoad Sql
Set.Sql: --旧的onpageload,2019-08-24备份; SELECT *,nums1-nums as diff FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.QUOTED_PRICE , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , (HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , INCOME.* , PAYMENT.* , isnull(INCOME.BILL_RECEIVED,0) - isnull(PAYMENT.PAY_REAL,0) as PROFIT_CURRENT , COUNTRY.COUNTRY_NAME , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , dd.SDT , dd.DT , DD.DAYS FROM v_GRP_MAIN a LEFT JOIN ( -- 出发和回来日期 SELECT ENQ_ID, min(enq_jny_date) as SDT, max(enq_jny_date) DT, MAX(ENQ_JNY_DAY) DAYS FROM ENQ_JNY where SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 报价 SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(sig_r_price) as QUOTED_PRICE from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 应收、已收 SELECT GRP_ID ID0, SUM(BILL_RECEIVABLE) BILL_RECEIVABLE, SUM(BILL_RECEIVED) AS BILL_RECEIVED FROM GRP_BILL GROUP BY GRP_ID ) as INCOME on INCOME.ID0 = a.grp_id left join ( -- 支付 select GRP_ID ID1 , sum(PAY_PLAN) AS PAY_PLAN , sum(PAY_REAL) AS PAY_REAL , sum(PAY_UN) AS PAY_UN FROM GRP_PAY_BILL GROUP BY GRP_ID ) AS PAYMENT ON PAYMENT.ID1 = A.grp_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 国家 SELECT ENQ_ID AS ID2, CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN b.CITY_NAME_EN else b.CITY_NAME end AS COUNTRY_NAME FROM ( select enq_id, right( CONVERT(varchar, max( CONVERT(bigint, aa) * 1000000000 + country_id )),9) *1 AS COU_ID from ( select ENQ_ID, b.COUNTRY_ID, count(*) aa from ENQ_CACHE_CITYS a inner join city b on a.CITY_ID = b.CITY_ID group by ENQ_ID, b.COUNTRY_ID ) as d group by enq_id ) A inner join city b on a.COU_ID = b.CITY_ID ) AS COUNTRY ON A.ENQ_ID = COUNTRY.ID2 LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.grp_sta <> 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' and a.grp_pid is null ) A where 1=1 order by sdt desc, a.grp_id desc

Set.Name: 隐藏项目信息（项目类型可以代替）-by-jzp-20240227
OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.GRP_ID , GRP_HY_CODE , a.GRP_NAME , a.GRP_TYPE , a.CLAC_STATUS , a.GRP_RUN_MODEL , a.CP_AIR_TICKET , a.GRP_VISA , kk1.ENQ_ID , case when A.grp_sta = 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' then kk1.FLOW_STATE else '' end FLOW_STATE , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then FCITY.CITY_NAME_EN else FCITY.CITY_NAME end FCITY , es.UNIT_PRICE QUOTED_PRICE , c.adm_name , isnull(s.PAX,0) PAX , isnull(S.STUDENTS,0) STUDENTS , isnull(S.LEADERS,0) LEADERS , kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM PPNUM , kk1.HEAD_NUM , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(s.PAX,0) diff , case when kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(s.PAX,0)=0 then '一致' when kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(s.PAX,0)>0 then'少人' when kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(s.PAX,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , s.IN_PLAN BILL_RECEIVABLE , s.IN_REAL BILL_RECEIVED , s.COST PAY_PLAN , s.PAY_REAL , s.PB PROFIT_CURRENT , s.WZF , s.UNBUY , AIR_TICKET_PAYED.AIR_TICKET_PAYED , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then COUNTRY.CITY_NAME_EN else COUNTRY.CITY_NAME end COUNTRY_NAME , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then es.CITYS_EN else es.CITYS end CITYS , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , kk1.ENQ_CREATE_TIME , es.START_DATE SDT , es.END_DATE DT , es.DAYS , cm.CAMP_NAME , vis.VISA_MATERIAL , isnull('拒签 '+cast(vis_fail.VIS_FAIL_NUM as varchar(10)),'') VISA_RESULTS ,CASE WHEN GRP_GYAP_ID IS NULL THEN 'COM_NO' ELSE 'COM_YES' END GRP_GYAP_DOC ,GYAP.GRP_GYAP_ID ,a.GRP_UNID ,a.GRP_CODE ,a.grp_sta ,case when A.grp_sta = 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' then '询价团' when a.GRP_RUN_MODEL='GRP_RUN_COMBINE' then '散拼团' else '单团' end PROJECT_TYPE ,a.GRP_FORM_ID ,a.SUP_DOWN_ID ,a.GRP_GUIDE_PRICE ,GYAP.GRP_GYAP_TYPE ,a.GRP_ENABLE_ENTRY , pd.CONN_ID , pdlst.PD_NAME , pdlst.PD_ID FROM GRP_MAIN a INNER join enq_main kk1 on kk1.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID and ((a.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' and kk1.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE') or (a.GRP_STA!='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' and kk1.ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES')) LEFT JOIN CITY FCITY ON KK1.F_CITY = FCITY.CITY_ID left join GRP_FIN_SUMMARY s on a.GRP_ID=s.GRP_ID left join ENQ_FIN_SUMMARY es on kk1.ENQ_ID=es.ENQ_ID left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join CITY COUNTRY on es.DEST_MAIN_COUNTRY_ID=COUNTRY.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID left join CAMP_GRP_CONN cgc on a.GRP_ID=cgc.GRP_ID and cgc.STATE='USED' left join CAMP_MAIN cm on cgc.CAMP_ID=cm.CAMP_ID left join ( --资料收取数 SELECT COUNT(*) VISA_MATERIAL,C.FRO_GRP_ID FROM VIS_REQ_FILE A INNER JOIN VIS_TAB_MAIN C ON A.VIS_ID=C.VIS_ID INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER D ON C.FRO_GRP_ID=D.GRP_ID AND C.USR_ID=D.COS_ID AND D.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY C.FRO_GRP_ID) vis on vis.FRO_GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID left join( --拒签数量 select count(1) VIS_FAIL_NUM,GRP_ID from grp_costumer a where VIS_STATUS='VIS_CRE_FAIL' AND COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY GRP_ID ) vis_fail on vis_fail.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN GRP_GYAP_DOC GYAP ON A.GRP_ID=GYAP.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN ( select C.grp_id GID , SUM(E.PAY_REAL) AS AIR_TICKET_PAYED -- 支付按人民币计算 from enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.ENQ_OP_ID = b.enq_op_id and b.SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' inner join enq_main c on b.ENQ_ID = c.ENQ_ID and c.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_BILL E ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = E.RELATE_SUP_ID and C.grp_id=e.GRP_ID INNER JOIN SER_MAIN SM ON A.ser_id = SM.ser_id where SM.SER_TAG='SER_TAG_AIR' GROUP BY C.grp_id ) AIR_TICKET_PAYED ON A.grp_id = AIR_TICKET_PAYED.GID inner JOIN ( select distinct sd_ref_id from SHARE_DATA WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' and sd_data = @g_sup_id ) SHARE_DATA on a.grp_id = SHARE_DATA.sd_ref_id left join PD_CONN pd on pd.REF_TABLE = 'GRP_MAIN.ENROLL' -- 海报 and pd.REF_ID = A.GRP_ID and pd.REF_UNID = '' and pd.CONN_STATUS = 'USED' left join PD_LIST pdlst on pd.PD_ID = pdlst.PD_ID where A.grp_state = 'USED' and a.grp_pid is null and not A.GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_TYPE_CAMP_LESSON','GRP_TYPE_BMYX','GRP_TYPE_BMYX_COS') -- ewa_test @EWA_RECYCLE is null and (GRP_SDATE >= @EWA.DATE.STR or a.GRP_STA !='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW') -- ewa_test @EWA_RECYCLE = 1 and a.GRP_STA ='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' and (GRP_SDATE is null or GRP_SDATE<@EWA.DATE.STR) -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is not null AND a.grp_id = @REF_GRP_ID -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null and @VIEW_ACL !='ALL' AND ( ( A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE' and a.GRP_TYPE in ( select bas_tag from bas_tag where bas_tag_grp='GRP_TYPE' and bas_tag_para2='USED' AND BAS_TAG_PARA3='AGENT' ) ) OR A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' AND ( C.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR @VIEW_ACL = 'DEPT' AND C.ADM_ID IN (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null and @FILTER = 'SALES' AND NOT A.GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC') and a.GRP_TYPE in ( select bas_tag from bas_tag where bas_tag_grp='GRP_TYPE' and bas_tag_para2='USED' AND BAS_TAG_PARA3='AGENT' ) -- ewa_test ) A where 1=1 order by grp_id desc, sdt desc

Set.Name: OnFrameDelete SQL
Set.Sql: update GRP_MAIN set grp_state='DEL' WHERE GRP_ID = @GRP_ID

Set.Name: ExtendAction0 SQL
Set.Sql: update grp_main set grp_sta=@EWA_WF_NEXT where grp_id=@grp_id and sup_id=@g_sup_id

Set.Name: ExtendAction1 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.allprice , b.profit1 , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , (HEAD_NUM + PEOPLE_NUM) as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< dt then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(dt,grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID)AS PT , case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem , isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , GOPEN.GRP_OPEN_TIME , GOPEN.GRP_OPEN_STATE , s.UNIT_PRICE QUOTED_PRICE , s.IN_PLAN BILL_RECEIVABLE , s.IN_REAL BILL_RECEIVED , s.COST PAY_PLAN , s.PAY_REAL , s.PB PROFIT_CURRENT , s.START_DATE SDT , s.END_DATE DT , s.DAYS , S.WZF , S.UNBUY , vis.VISA_MATERIAL , isnull('拒签 '+ cast(vis_fail.VIS_FAIL_NUM as varchar(10)),'') VISA_RESULTS , GVT.BAS_TAG AS GRP_VISIT FROM GRP_MAIN a inner join enq_main kk1 on kk1.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID and ((a.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' and kk1.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE') or (a.GRP_STA!='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' and kk1.ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES')) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON kk1.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on kk1.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( select count(g.cos_id) nums,g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId = a.grp_id left join (select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm )as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join (select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG = A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GOPEN ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID = GOPEN.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID left join GRP_FIN_SUMMARY s on a.GRP_ID=s.GRP_ID left join ( --资料收取数 SELECT COUNT(*) VISA_MATERIAL,C.FRO_GRP_ID FROM VIS_REQ_FILE A INNER JOIN VIS_TAB_MAIN C ON A.VIS_ID=C.VIS_ID INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER D ON C.FRO_GRP_ID=D.GRP_ID AND C.USR_ID=D.COS_ID AND D.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY C.FRO_GRP_ID ) vis on vis.FRO_GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID left join( --拒签数量 select count(1) VIS_FAIL_NUM,GRP_ID from grp_costumer a where VIS_STATUS='VIS_CRE_FAIL' AND COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY GRP_ID ) vis_fail on vis_fail.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG GTP ON GTP.BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_TYPE' AND A.GRP_TYPE=GTP.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG GVT ON GVT.BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_VISIT' AND GVT.BAS_TAG=GTP.BAS_TAG_PARA6 inner JOIN ( select distinct sd_ref_id from SHARE_DATA WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' and sd_data = @SUP_DOWN_ID ) SHARE_DATA on a.grp_id = SHARE_DATA.sd_ref_id ) A WHERE grp_state = 'USED' and not A.grp_type in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC', 'GRP_TYPE_CAMP_LESSON','GRP_TYPE_BMYX','GRP_TYPE_BMYX_COS') and (a.grp_id = @REF_GRP_ID or @REF_GRP_ID is null) order by grp_id desc

Set.Name: ExtendAction2 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT *,nums1-nums as diff FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.allprice , b.profit1 , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , (HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< DT then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(DT, grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID) AS PT , case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem , isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_STATE FROM v_GRP_MAIN a INNER JOIN ( -- 出发和回来日期 SELECT ENQ_ID, min(enq_jny_date) as SDT, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY where SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 报价 SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团备注 select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm ) as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id ) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG=A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GO ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID=GO.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 单团 INNER JOIN crm_conn c on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) UNION SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 散拼 INNER join ( select grp_id, a.relate_sup_id, count(*) as STUDENTS from grp_costumer a GROUP BY A.GRP_ID, relate_sup_id ) d on a.grp_id = d.grp_id INNER JOIN crm_conn c on D.relate_sup_id = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) ) SALES ON A.GRP_ID = SALES.GRP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND ( A.grp_type = @grp_type OR (@grp_type is null and not A.grp_type in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC')) ) AND (A.GRP_OPEN_ID >0 OR A.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') AND (@DT_START IS NULL OR SDT >= @DT_START) AND (@DT_END IS NULL OR SDT <= @DT_END) AND ( @T=12 OR @T = 10 AND SALES.GRP_ID > 0 ) ) A WHERE 1=1 order by a.grp_id desc

Set.Sql: select grp_num,grp_id,vis.vis_nums from grp_main grp left join( select @grp_id fro_grp_id, count(vis_id) vis_nums from vis_tab_main where fro_grp_id=@grp_id ) vis on vis.fro_grp_id=grp.grp_id where grp_num != vis_nums and grp.grp_id=@grp_id

Set.Sql: SELECT *,nums1-nums as diff FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.allprice , b.profit1 , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , (HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< DT then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(DT, grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID) AS PT , case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem , isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_STATE FROM v_GRP_MAIN a left JOIN ( -- 出发和回来日期 SELECT ENQ_ID, min(enq_jny_date) as SDT, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY where SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 报价 SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团备注 select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm ) as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id ) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG=A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GO ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID=GO.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 单团 INNER JOIN crm_conn c on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) UNION SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 散拼 INNER join ( select grp_id, a.relate_sup_id, count(*) as STUDENTS from grp_costumer a GROUP BY A.GRP_ID, relate_sup_id ) d on a.grp_id = d.grp_id INNER JOIN crm_conn c on D.relate_sup_id = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) ) SALES ON A.GRP_ID = SALES.GRP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND (A.OP_ID = @OP_ID or (A.OP_ID is null and @OP_ID = 0) or @OP_ID is null) AND ( A.grp_type = @grp_type OR (@grp_type is null and not A.grp_type in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC')) ) AND (A.GRP_OPEN_ID >0 OR A.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') AND (@DT_START IS NULL OR grp_sdate >= @DT_START) AND (@DT_END IS NULL OR grp_sdate <= @DT_END) AND ( @T=12 OR @T = 10 AND SALES.GRP_ID > 0 ) ) A WHERE 1=1 order by a.grp_id desc

Set.Name: Old-OnPageLoad Sql
Set.Sql: --旧的onpageload,2019-08-24备份; SELECT *,nums1-nums as diff FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.QUOTED_PRICE , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , (HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , INCOME.* , PAYMENT.* , isnull(INCOME.BILL_RECEIVED,0) - isnull(PAYMENT.PAY_REAL,0) as PROFIT_CURRENT , COUNTRY.COUNTRY_NAME , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , dd.SDT , dd.DT , DD.DAYS FROM v_GRP_MAIN a LEFT JOIN ( -- 出发和回来日期 SELECT ENQ_ID, min(enq_jny_date) as SDT, max(enq_jny_date) DT, MAX(ENQ_JNY_DAY) DAYS FROM ENQ_JNY where SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 报价 SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(sig_r_price) as QUOTED_PRICE from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 应收、已收 SELECT GRP_ID ID0, SUM(BILL_RECEIVABLE) BILL_RECEIVABLE, SUM(BILL_RECEIVED) AS BILL_RECEIVED FROM GRP_BILL GROUP BY GRP_ID ) as INCOME on INCOME.ID0 = a.grp_id left join ( -- 支付 select GRP_ID ID1 , sum(PAY_PLAN) AS PAY_PLAN , sum(PAY_REAL) AS PAY_REAL , sum(PAY_UN) AS PAY_UN FROM GRP_PAY_BILL GROUP BY GRP_ID ) AS PAYMENT ON PAYMENT.ID1 = A.grp_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 国家 SELECT ENQ_ID AS ID2, CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN b.CITY_NAME_EN else b.CITY_NAME end AS COUNTRY_NAME FROM ( select enq_id, right( CONVERT(varchar, max( CONVERT(bigint, aa) * 1000000000 + country_id )),9) *1 AS COU_ID from ( select ENQ_ID, b.COUNTRY_ID, count(*) aa from ENQ_CACHE_CITYS a inner join city b on a.CITY_ID = b.CITY_ID group by ENQ_ID, b.COUNTRY_ID ) as d group by enq_id ) A inner join city b on a.COU_ID = b.CITY_ID ) AS COUNTRY ON A.ENQ_ID = COUNTRY.ID2 LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.grp_sta <> 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' and a.grp_pid is null ) A where 1=1 order by sdt desc, a.grp_id desc

Set.Name: 加载数据
Set.Sql: select D.GRP_ID , A.SUP_DOWN_ID , sm.SUP_NAME , A.COIN_ID , SUM(A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP * A.SUB_NUM ) PRICE , SUM(E.PAY_REAL) AS PAY_REAL from enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.ENQ_OP_ID = b.enq_op_id and b.SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' inner join enq_main c on b.ENQ_ID = c.ENQ_ID and c.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' inner join grp_main d on d.GRP_ID = c.GRP_ID AND D.GRP_STATE='USED' LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_BILL E ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = E.RELATE_SUP_ID and d.grp_id=e.GRP_ID inner join sup_main sm on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = sm.SUP_ID INNER JOIN SER_MAIN ser ON A.ser_id = ser.ser_id and ser.SER_TAG='SER_TAG_AIR' where d.grp_id in (@ids_split) AND D.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY D.grp_id, A.SUP_DOWN_ID, sm.SUP_NAME, A.COIN_ID
