Set.SearchSql: SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_RUN'

Set.RefSql: SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME FROM BAS_TAG where bas_tag_grp='GRP_RUN'

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.CAMP_ID , A.CAMP_NAME , ENQ.ENQ_GRPS , ENQ.ENQ_PAX , GRP.BOOK_GRPS , GRP.BOOK_PAX , INCAMP.IN_GRPS , INCAMP.IN_PAX , FIN.COST , FIN.PAY_REAL , FIN.IN_PLAN , FIN.IN_REAL , FIN.PB , ADM.CAMP_MANAGER , ADM.TEACHER , ADM.AL , HOME.HOMESTAY , HOTEL.HOTEL , HOTEL.DORM , SCHEDULE.SCHEDULE , CLASS_GROUPING.CLASS_GROUPING , CLASSROOM.CLASSROOM , CASE WHEN @SYS_EWA_LANG = 'enus' THEN CITY_NAME_EN ELSE B.CITY_NAME END AS CITY_NAME, B.COUNTRY_ID, isnull(MNU_ID, 0) AS CAMP_SCHEDULE_MNU_ACL FROM CAMP_MAIN A LEFT JOIN CITY B ON A.CAMP_CITY_ID = B.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_ACL_MNU c ON A.SUP_ID = c.SUP_ID AND c.MNU_ID = 9998 AND c.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ( --xx 需求团,需求人数 select A.ENQ_CAMP_ID CAMP_ID,COUNT(1) ENQ_GRPS ,SUM(ISNULL(A.PEOPLE_NUM,0))+SUM(ISNULL(A.HEAD_NUM,0)) ENQ_PAX FROM ENQ_MAIN A INNER JOIN GRP_MAIN B ON A.GRP_ID=B.GRP_ID WHERE ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES' AND B.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' AND B.GRP_STATE='USED' AND B.GRP_PID IS NULL AND NOT B.GRP_TYPE IN ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC') AND B.GRP_SDATE>getdate() AND B.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY A.ENQ_CAMP_ID ) ENQ ON A.CAMP_ID=ENQ.CAMP_ID LEFT JOIN ( --xx 预订团，预订人数 select ISNULL(D.CAMP_ID,B.GRP_CAMP_ID) CAMP_ID, COUNT(1) BOOK_GRPS, SUM(ISNULL(A.PEOPLE_NUM, 0))+ SUM(ISNULL(A.HEAD_NUM, 0)) BOOK_PAX FROM ENQ_MAIN A INNER JOIN GRP_MAIN B ON A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' LEFT JOIN CAMP_GRP_CONN D ON B.GRP_ID=D.GRP_ID AND D.STATE='USED' WHERE B.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' AND B.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND B.GRP_PID IS NULL AND NOT B.GRP_TYPE IN ('GRP_CB','GRP_VIRTUAL','GRP_ZC') AND B.GRP_SDATE>getdate() AND B.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ISNULL(D.CAMP_ID,B.GRP_CAMP_ID) ) GRP ON GRP.CAMP_ID=A.CAMP_ID LEFT JOIN ( --xx 入营团，入营人数 select D.CAMP_ID, COUNT(1) IN_GRPS, SUM(ISNULL(GRP_PAX,0)) IN_PAX FROM GRP_MAIN B INNER JOIN CAMP_GRP_CONN D ON B.GRP_ID=D.GRP_ID AND D.STATE='USED' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(1) GRP_PAX,xa.GRP_ID FROM GRP_COSTUMER xa inner join CAMP_GRP_CONN xb on xa.GRP_ID=xb.GRP_ID and xb.STATE='USED' WHERE COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' AND xa.SUP_ID =@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY xa.GRP_ID ) E ON B.GRP_ID=E.GRP_ID WHERE B.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND NOT B.GRP_TYPE IN ('GRP_CB','GRP_VIRTUAL','GRP_ZC') AND B.GRP_PID IS NULL AND B.SUP_ID =@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY D.CAMP_ID ) INCAMP ON INCAMP.CAMP_ID=A.CAMP_ID LEFT JOIN ( --xx 营地相关团财务统计 select C.CAMP_ID ,SUM(A.COST) COST ,SUM(A.PAY_REAL) PAY_REAL ,SUM(A.IN_PLAN) IN_PLAN ,SUM(A.IN_REAL) IN_REAL ,SUM(A.PB) PB from GRP_FIN_SUMMARY A INNER JOIN GRP_MAIN B ON A.GRP_ID=B.GRP_ID INNER JOIN CAMP_GRP_CONN C ON B.GRP_ID=C.GRP_ID AND C.STATE='USED' WHERE B.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND NOT B.GRP_TYPE IN ('GRP_CB','GRP_VIRTUAL','GRP_ZC') AND B.GRP_PID IS NULL AND B.SUP_ID =@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY C.CAMP_ID ) FIN ON FIN.CAMP_ID=A.CAMP_ID LEFT JOIN ( --xx 营地员工数量 SELECT CAMP_ID, sum(case when CAMP_ADM_ROLES='ADM_MANAGER' then 1 else 0 end) AL, sum(case when CAMP_ADM_ROLES='ADM_TEACHER' then 1 else 0 end) TEACHER, sum(case when CAMP_ADM_ROLES='ADM_CAMP_MANAGER' then 1 else 0 end) CAMP_MANAGER from ( select ADM_ID,CAMP_ADM_ROLES,CAMP_ID from CAMP_ADM_USER WHERE CAMP_ADM_STATE='USED' AND CAMP_ADM_ROLES is not null GROUP BY ADM_ID,CAMP_ADM_ROLES,CAMP_ID ) x GROUP BY CAMP_ID ) ADM ON ADM.CAMP_ID=A.CAMP_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 未完成的寄宿家庭安排,,,暂时先显示全部 SELECT b.CAMP_ID,count(1) HOMESTAY FROM CAMP_HOME_CONN a inner join CAMP_GRP_CONN b on a.GRP_ID=b.GRP_ID and b.STATE='USED' -- where a.CONN_EDATE>convert(date,getdate()) group by b.CAMP_ID ) HOME ON HOME.CAMP_ID=A.CAMP_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 未完成的酒店和宿舍安排,,,暂时先显示全部 SELECT CAMP_ID, sum(CASE WHEN HOT_TYPE='HOTEL_TYPE_HOTEL' then 1 else 0 end) HOTEL, sum(CASE WHEN HOT_TYPE='HOTEL_TYPE_DORM' then 1 else 0 end) DORM FROM ( SELECT F.CAMP_ID,A.CONN_ID,C.HOT_TYPE FROM CAMP_HOTEL_CONN_SUB A INNER JOIN CAMP_HOTEL_CONN B ON A.CONN_ID=B.CONN_ID INNER JOIN CAMP_HOTEL_MAIN C ON B.HOT_ID=C.HOT_ID INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER D ON A.GRP_ID=D.GRP_ID AND A.COS_ID=D.COS_ID AND D.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' INNER JOIN CAMP_GRP_CONN F ON D.GRP_ID=F.GRP_ID AND F.STATE='USED' -- where b.CONN_EDATE>convert(date,getdate()) GROUP BY F.CAMP_ID,A.CONN_ID,C.HOT_TYPE ) x group by CAMP_ID ) HOTEL ON HOTEL.CAMP_ID=A.CAMP_ID LEFT JOIN ( --未完成的课程安排,,,暂时先显示全部 SELECT CAMP_ID ,COUNT(1) SCHEDULE FROM( select CAMP_ID,GRP_ID,GRP_JNY_DATE,GRP_JNY_FROM_DATE from CAMP_GRP_JNY WHERE STATE='USED' -- AND GRP_JNY_DATE>GETDATE() GROUP BY CAMP_ID,GRP_ID,GRP_JNY_DATE,GRP_JNY_FROM_DATE ) x GROUP BY CAMP_ID ) SCHEDULE ON SCHEDULE.CAMP_ID=A.CAMP_ID LEFT JOIN ( --未完成的班级,,,暂时先显示全部 select CAMP_ID,count(1) CLASS_GROUPING from ( select a.CLASS_ID,c.CAMP_ID from CAMP_CLASS_COS a inner join GRP_COSTUMER b on a.COS_ID=b.COS_ID and a.RELATE_GRP_ID=b.GRP_ID AND B.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' inner join CAMP_GRP_CONN c on b.GRP_ID=c.GRP_ID AND c.STATE='USED' where 1=1 -- and c.END_DATE>getdate() group by a.CLASS_ID,c.CAMP_ID) x group BY CAMP_ID ) CLASS_GROUPING ON CLASS_GROUPING.CAMP_ID=A.CAMP_ID LEFT JOIN ( --未完成的教室，统计团课程,,,暂时先显示全部 SELECT CAMP_ID,count(1) CLASSROOM from ( SELECT C.CAMP_ID,C.GRP_ID FROM camp_class_lesson A INNER JOIN CAMP_GRP_JNY B ON A.REF_ID=B.GRP_JNY_ID INNER JOIN CAMP_GRP_CONN C ON B.GRP_ID=C.GRP_ID AND C.STATE='USED' WHERE 1=1 -- and C.END_DATE>GETDATE() GROUP BY C.CAMP_ID,C.GRP_ID ) x GROUP BY CAMP_ID ) CLASSROOM ON CLASSROOM.CAMP_ID=a.CAMP_ID WHERE A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND (CAMP_TYPE IS NULL OR CAMP_TYPE != 'CAMP_T_SUMMIT') AND ((CAMP_STATUS = 'USING' AND @EWA_RECYCLE IS NULL) OR (CAMP_STATUS != 'USING' AND @EWA_RECYCLE = '1')) ) A WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY IN_PAX DESC,CAMP_ID DESC

Set.Name: getAccommodation Sql
Set.Sql: SELECT a.GRP_ID, COUNT(1) AS COS_NUM, 'HOME' TAG FROM CAMP_HOME_CONN_SUB a INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER b ON a.COS_ID = b.COS_ID AND a.GRP_ID = b.GRP_ID WHERE b.COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' AND a.GRP_ID IN (@GRP_IDS_SPLIT) GROUP BY a.GRP_ID union SELECT a.GRP_ID, COUNT(1) AS COS_NUM, 'HOTEL' TAG FROM CAMP_HOTEL_CONN_SUB a INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER b ON a.COS_ID = b.COS_ID AND a.GRP_ID = b.GRP_ID INNER JOIN CAMP_HOTEL_CONN c ON a.CONN_ID = c.CONN_ID INNER JOIN CAMP_HOTEL_MAIN d ON c.HOT_ID = d.HOT_ID WHERE b.COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' AND d.HOT_TYPE = 'HOTEL_TYPE_HOTEL' AND a.GRP_ID IN (@GRP_IDS_SPLIT) GROUP BY a.GRP_ID union SELECT a.GRP_ID, COUNT(1) AS COS_NUM ,'DORM' TAG FROM CAMP_HOTEL_CONN_SUB a INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER b ON a.COS_ID = b.COS_ID AND a.GRP_ID = b.GRP_ID INNER JOIN CAMP_HOTEL_CONN c ON a.CONN_ID = c.CONN_ID INNER JOIN CAMP_HOTEL_MAIN d ON c.HOT_ID = d.HOT_ID WHERE b.COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' AND d.HOT_TYPE = 'HOTEL_TYPE_DORM' AND a.GRP_ID IN (@GRP_IDS_SPLIT) GROUP BY a.GRP_ID;

Set.Name: getClassGrouping sql
Set.Sql: select GRP_ID,count(1) CLASS_NUM from( select d.GRP_ID,CLASS_ID from CAMP_CLASS_COS a inner join GRP_COSTUMER b on a.COS_ID=b.COS_ID and a.RELATE_GRP_ID=b.GRP_ID and b.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' inner join GRP_COSTUMER c on b.BAS_VIS_ID=c.BAS_VIS_ID and c.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' inner join GRP_MAIN d on c.GRP_ID=d.GRP_ID and d.GRP_TYPE!='GRP_VIRTUAL' where d.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID and d.GRP_ID in (@GRP_IDS_SPLIT) group by d.GRP_ID,CLASS_ID) x where 1=1 GROUP by GRP_ID

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME, a.GRP_HY_CODE,a.GRP_ID,a.GRP_NAME, a.GRP_STATE,a.GRP_STA, case when a.GRP_HOME_STATE is null or a.GRP_HOME_STATE='' then 'GRP_HOME_STATE_NONE' else a.GRP_HOME_STATE end GRP_HOME_STATE, kk1.HEAD_NUM, kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM AS nums1 , kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(s.nums, 0) AS diff , CASE WHEN kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(s.nums, 0) = 0 THEN '一致' WHEN kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(s.nums, 0) > 0 THEN '少人' WHEN kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(s.nums, 0) < 0 THEN '多人' END AS isok, s.IN_PLAN AS BILL_RECEIVABLE, s.IN_REAL AS BILL_RECEIVED, s.COST AS PAY_PLAN, s.PAY_REAL , s.PB AS PROFIT_CURRENT, cgc.CAMP_NAME , am.ALLERGIES , case when a.INSURE='YES' then '已购' else '未购' end INSURE_STATUS -- , city.COUNTRY_ID , camp.BEGIN_DATE, camp.END_DATE , city.COUNTRY_name FROM v_GRP_MAIN a LEFT JOIN GRP_FIN_SUMMARY s ON a.GRP_ID = s.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN enq_main kk1 ON kk1.enq_id = a.enq_id LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID inner join ( SELECT grp_id, camp_name = STUFF( (SELECT char(10) + camp_name FROM CAMP_MAIN t1 inner join CAMP_GRP_CONN t0 on t1.camp_id = t0.camp_id WHERE t0.grp_id = t2.grp_id FOR XML PATH ('')) , 1, 1, '' ) from CAMP_GRP_CONN t2 group by grp_id ) cgc on a.grp_id = cgc.grp_id left join ( SELECT grp_id, COUNTRY_name = STUFF( (SELECT ', ' + d.city_name FROM CAMP_MAIN t1 inner join CAMP_GRP_CONN t0 on t1.camp_id = t0.camp_id and t0.grp_id = t2.grp_id inner join city c on t1.camp_city_id = c.city_id inner join city d on c.COUNTRY_ID = d.city_id FOR XML PATH ('') ) , 1, 1, '' ) from CAMP_GRP_CONN t2 group by grp_id ) CITY on a.grp_id = city.grp_id LEFT join ( select grp_id, min(BEGIN_DATE) BEGIN_DATE , max(END_DATE) END_DATE from CAMP_GRP_CONN WHERE STATE='USED' group by grp_id ) camp on a.grp_id = camp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS ALLERGIES, a.GRP_ID FROM grp_costumer a INNER JOIN grp_main gm ON a.grp_id = gm.grp_id AND gm.GRP_TYPE != 'GRP_VIRTUAL' LEFT JOIN VIS_TAB_DATA b ON a.BAS_VIS_ID = b.VIS_ID AND b.VIS_DAT_NAME = 'BAS_DEFORMITY_TICK' AND b.VIS_DAT_VAL = 'Y' LEFT JOIN VIS_TAB_DATA c ON a.BAS_VIS_ID = c.VIS_ID AND c.VIS_DAT_NAME = 'BAS_LONG_TERM_DRUG_TICK' AND c.VIS_DAT_VAL = 'Y' WHERE a.COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' AND (b.VIS_ID IS NOT NULL OR c.VIS_ID IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY a.GRP_ID ) am ON am.grp_id = a.grp_id -- @ewa_test @CAMP_COUNTRY is not null inner join ( select distinct COUNTRY_ID from city A inner join CAMP_MAIN b on a.city_id = b.camp_city_id inner join CAMP_GRP_CONN c on b.camp_id = c.camp_id WHERE COUNTRY_ID = @CAMP_COUNTRY ) CAMP_COUNTRY on a.grp_id = CAMP_COUNTRY.grp_id -- @ewa_test WHERE a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.grp_sta <> 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' AND a.grp_pid IS NULL ) A WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY BEGIN_DATE DESC, a.grp_id DESC

Set.Name: getAccommodation Sql
Set.Sql: SELECT a.GRP_ID, COUNT(1) AS COS_NUM, 'HOME' TAG FROM CAMP_HOME_CONN_SUB a INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER b ON a.COS_ID = b.COS_ID AND a.GRP_ID = b.GRP_ID WHERE b.COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' AND a.GRP_ID IN (@GRP_IDS_SPLIT) GROUP BY a.GRP_ID union SELECT a.GRP_ID, COUNT(1) AS COS_NUM, 'HOTEL' TAG FROM CAMP_HOTEL_CONN_SUB a INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER b ON a.COS_ID = b.COS_ID AND a.GRP_ID = b.GRP_ID INNER JOIN CAMP_HOTEL_CONN c ON a.CONN_ID = c.CONN_ID INNER JOIN CAMP_HOTEL_MAIN d ON c.HOT_ID = d.HOT_ID WHERE b.COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' AND d.HOT_TYPE = 'HOTEL_TYPE_HOTEL' AND a.GRP_ID IN (@GRP_IDS_SPLIT) GROUP BY a.GRP_ID union SELECT a.GRP_ID, COUNT(1) AS COS_NUM ,'DORM' TAG FROM CAMP_HOTEL_CONN_SUB a INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER b ON a.COS_ID = b.COS_ID AND a.GRP_ID = b.GRP_ID INNER JOIN CAMP_HOTEL_CONN c ON a.CONN_ID = c.CONN_ID INNER JOIN CAMP_HOTEL_MAIN d ON c.HOT_ID = d.HOT_ID WHERE b.COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' AND d.HOT_TYPE = 'HOTEL_TYPE_DORM' AND a.GRP_ID IN (@GRP_IDS_SPLIT) GROUP BY a.GRP_ID;

Set.Name: getClassGrouping sql
Set.Sql: select GRP_ID,count(1) CLASS_NUM from( select d.GRP_ID,CLASS_ID from CAMP_CLASS_COS a inner join GRP_COSTUMER b on a.COS_ID=b.COS_ID and a.RELATE_GRP_ID=b.GRP_ID and b.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' inner join GRP_COSTUMER c on b.BAS_VIS_ID=c.BAS_VIS_ID and c.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' inner join GRP_MAIN d on c.GRP_ID=d.GRP_ID and d.GRP_TYPE!='GRP_VIRTUAL' where d.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID and d.GRP_ID in (@GRP_IDS_SPLIT) group by d.GRP_ID,CLASS_ID) x where 1=1 GROUP by GRP_ID

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL1
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME, a.GRP_HY_CODE,a.GRP_ID,a.GRP_NAME, a.GRP_STATE,a.GRP_STA, case when a.GRP_HOME_STATE is null or a.GRP_HOME_STATE='' then 'GRP_HOME_STATE_NONE' else a.GRP_HOME_STATE end GRP_HOME_STATE, kk1.HEAD_NUM, kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM AS nums1 , kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(s.nums, 0) AS diff , CASE WHEN kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(s.nums, 0) = 0 THEN '一致' WHEN kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(s.nums, 0) > 0 THEN '少人' WHEN kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(s.nums, 0) < 0 THEN '多人' END AS isok, s.IN_PLAN AS BILL_RECEIVABLE, s.IN_REAL AS BILL_RECEIVED, s.COST AS PAY_PLAN, s.PAY_REAL , s.PB AS PROFIT_CURRENT, cm.CAMP_NAME, cgc.BEGIN_DATE, cgc.END_DATE , am.ALLERGIES , case when a.INSURE='YES' then '已购' else '未购' end INSURE_STATUS , city.COUNTRY_ID FROM v_GRP_MAIN a INNER JOIN ( select distinct GRP_ID,RELATE_SUP_ID ,b.CRM_COM_ID from GRP_COSTUMER a inner join CRM_CONN b on a.RELATE_SUP_ID=b.SUP_DOWN_ID WHERE CRM_COM_ID=@CRM_COM_ID union select grp_id,a.sup_down_id,b.crm_com_id from grp_main a inner join CRM_CONN b on a.SUP_down_ID=b.SUP_DOWN_ID WHERE CRM_COM_ID=@CRM_COM_ID ) SUP ON A.GRP_ID=SUP.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN GRP_FIN_SUMMARY s ON a.GRP_ID = s.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN enq_main kk1 ON kk1.enq_id = a.enq_id LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID INNER JOIN CAMP_GRP_CONN cgc ON a.GRP_ID = cgc.GRP_ID AND cgc.STATE = 'USED' LEFT JOIN CAMP_MAIN cm ON cgc.CAMP_ID = cm.CAMP_ID LEFT JOIN CITY on cm.CAMP_CITY_ID=city.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS ALLERGIES, a.GRP_ID FROM grp_costumer a INNER JOIN grp_main gm ON a.grp_id = gm.grp_id AND gm.GRP_TYPE != 'GRP_VIRTUAL' LEFT JOIN VIS_TAB_DATA b ON a.BAS_VIS_ID = b.VIS_ID AND b.VIS_DAT_NAME = 'BAS_DEFORMITY_TICK' AND b.VIS_DAT_VAL = 'Y' LEFT JOIN VIS_TAB_DATA c ON a.BAS_VIS_ID = c.VIS_ID AND c.VIS_DAT_NAME = 'BAS_LONG_TERM_DRUG_TICK' AND c.VIS_DAT_VAL = 'Y' WHERE a.COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' AND (b.VIS_ID IS NOT NULL OR c.VIS_ID IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY a.GRP_ID ) am ON am.grp_id = a.grp_id WHERE a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.grp_sta <> 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' AND a.grp_pid IS NULL AND (@CAMP_COUNTRY IS NULL OR @CAMP_COUNTRY = city.COUNTRY_ID) ) A WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY BEGIN_DATE DESC, a.grp_id DESC

Set.SearchSql: SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'GRP_HOME_STATE' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.RefSql: SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'GRP_HOME_STATE' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT f.ENQ_CREATE_TIME , enq.ENQ_ID , A.GRP_ID , A.GRP_HY_CODE , A.GRP_NAME , A.GRP_SDATE , A.GRP_VISA , A.GRP_SDATE+DAY_NUM GRP_EDATE , enq.DAY_NUM , enq.PEOPLE_NUM , enq.HEAD_NUM , enq.ENQ_CAMP_ID , enq.ENQ_CAMP_ACCOMMODATION_TYPE , enq.ENQ_CAMP_COURSE_TYPE , enq.AIR , enq.HOTLE HOTEL , cm.CAMP_NAME , B.ADM_NAME , c.BUDGET_COST , c.BUDGET_PROFIT , D.SUP_NAME , E.BAS_TAG_NAME GRP_RUN_MODEL_NAME , F.A1 , CRM.CRM_COM_ID as COM_ID -- 避免和 CRM_COM_ID 参数冲突 r_crm2 调用 , OP.ADM_NAME AS OP , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then country.CITY_NAME_EN else country.CITY_NAME end DEST_COUNTRY , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then ems.CITYS_EN else ems.CITYS end DEST_CITY , GTP.BAS_TAG AS GRP_TYPE , GVT.BAS_TAG AS GRP_VISIT FROM GRP_MAIN A inner JOIN ENQ_MAIN enq on a.GRP_ID=enq.GRP_ID and enq.ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES' left join ENQ_FIN_SUMMARY ems on enq.ENQ_ID=ems.ENQ_ID left join CITY country on ems.DEST_MAIN_COUNTRY_ID=country.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER OP ON A.OP_ID = OP.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID , sum(SIG_PRICE) as BUDGET_COST , sum(SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE) AS BUDGET_PROFIT FROM ENQ_PRICE where ENQ_ENTRY!='SER_ENTRY3' GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) c on c.enq_id = enq.enq_id LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN D ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = D.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG E ON A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = E.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GRP_ID, COUNT(*) A1,max(ENQ_CREATE_TIME)as ENQ_CREATE_TIME FROM ENQ_MAIN where enq_state='USED' GROUP BY GRP_ID ) F ON A.GRP_ID = F.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN CRM_CONN CRM ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = CRM.SUP_DOWN_ID AND (CRM.CRM_COM_ID = @CRM_COM_ID or @CRM_COM_ID is null) AND CRM.SUP_UP_ID=@G_SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER B ON A.ADM_ID = B.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON B.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN LEFT JOIN CAMP_MAIN cm on enq.ENQ_CAMP_ID=cm.CAMP_ID INNER JOIN BAS_TAG GTP ON GTP.BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_TYPE' AND A.GRP_TYPE=GTP.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG GVT ON GVT.BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_VISIT' AND GVT.BAS_TAG=GTP.BAS_TAG_PARA6 WHERE A.grp_state = 'USED' AND GRP_STA ='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' AND A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND A.GRP_TYPE!='GRP_VIRTUAL' AND ( B.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR @VIEW_ACL = 'ALL' OR @VIEW_ACL = 'DEPT' AND B.ADM_ID IN (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) AS GP WHERE ( (@EWA_RECYCLE is null and GRP_SDATE >= @EWA.DATE.STR) or (@EWA_RECYCLE=1 and (GRP_SDATE is null or GRP_SDATE<@EWA.DATE.STR)) ) order by grp_id desc

Set.Name: OnFrameDelete SQL
Set.Sql:
update GRP_MAIN set grp_state='DEL' WHERE GRP_ID = @GRP_ID and sup_id=@g_sup_id and not exists( SELECT * FROM ( select top 1 1 a from grp_costumer where grp_id=@grp_id union select top 1 1 from grp_finance where grp_id=@grp_id union select top 1 1 from grp_pay_apply where grp_id=@grp_id ) AA );
select 1 a from GRP_MAIN where grp_state='DEL' AND GRP_ID = @GRP_ID

Set.Name: onclick

Set.SearchSql: SELECT DISTINCT ADM_NAME A,ADM_NAME B FROM GRP_MAIN A INNER JOIN ADM_USER B ON A.OP_ID=B.ADM_ID AND A.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND ADM_USR_STA_TAG='OK'
SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_TYPE' and BAS_TAG_PARA2='USED' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.RefSql: SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_TYPE' and BAS_TAG_PARA2='USED' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.SearchSql: SELECT BAS_TAG,BAS_TAG_NAME FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_VISIT'
SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'C_ACCOM' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD
SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'C_CUR_NAME' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.GRP_ID , GRP_HY_CODE , a.GRP_NAME , a.GRP_TYPE , a.CLAC_STATUS , a.GRP_RUN_MODEL , a.CP_AIR_TICKET , a.GRP_VISA , kk1.ENQ_ID , case when A.grp_sta = 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' then kk1.FLOW_STATE else '' end FLOW_STATE , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then FCITY.CITY_NAME_EN else FCITY.CITY_NAME end FCITY , es.UNIT_PRICE QUOTED_PRICE , c.adm_name , isnull(s.PAX,0) PAX , isnull(S.STUDENTS,0) STUDENTS , isnull(S.LEADERS,0) LEADERS , kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM PPNUM , kk1.HEAD_NUM , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(s.PAX,0) diff , case when kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(s.PAX,0)=0 then '一致' when kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(s.PAX,0)>0 then'少人' when kk1.HEAD_NUM+kk1.PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(s.PAX,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , s.IN_PLAN BILL_RECEIVABLE , s.IN_REAL BILL_RECEIVED , s.COST PAY_PLAN , s.PAY_REAL , s.PB PROFIT_CURRENT , s.WZF , s.UNBUY , AIR_TICKET_PAYED.AIR_TICKET_PAYED , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then COUNTRY.CITY_NAME_EN else COUNTRY.CITY_NAME end COUNTRY_NAME , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then es.CITYS_EN else es.CITYS end CITYS , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , kk1.ENQ_CREATE_TIME , es.START_DATE SDT , es.END_DATE DT , es.DAYS , cm.CAMP_NAME , vis.VISA_MATERIAL , isnull('拒签 '+cast(vis_fail.VIS_FAIL_NUM as varchar(10)),'') VISA_RESULTS ,CASE WHEN GRP_GYAP_ID IS NULL THEN 'COM_NO' ELSE 'COM_YES' END GRP_GYAP_DOC ,GYAP.GRP_GYAP_ID ,a.GRP_UNID ,a.GRP_CODE ,a.grp_sta ,case when A.grp_sta = 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' then '询价团' when a.GRP_RUN_MODEL='GRP_RUN_COMBINE' then '散拼团' else '单团' end PROJECT_TYPE ,a.GRP_FORM_ID ,a.SUP_DOWN_ID ,a.GRP_GUIDE_PRICE ,GYAP.GRP_GYAP_TYPE FROM GRP_MAIN a INNER join enq_main kk1 on kk1.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID and (kk1.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' or kk1.ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES') LEFT JOIN CITY FCITY ON KK1.F_CITY = FCITY.CITY_ID left join GRP_FIN_SUMMARY s on a.GRP_ID=s.GRP_ID left join ENQ_FIN_SUMMARY es on kk1.ENQ_ID=es.ENQ_ID left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join CITY COUNTRY on es.DEST_MAIN_COUNTRY_ID=COUNTRY.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID left join CAMP_GRP_CONN cgc on a.GRP_ID=cgc.GRP_ID and cgc.STATE='USED' left join CAMP_MAIN cm on cgc.CAMP_ID=cm.CAMP_ID left join ( --资料收取数 SELECT COUNT(*) VISA_MATERIAL,C.FRO_GRP_ID FROM VIS_REQ_FILE A INNER JOIN VIS_TAB_MAIN C ON A.VIS_ID=C.VIS_ID INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER D ON C.FRO_GRP_ID=D.GRP_ID AND C.USR_ID=D.COS_ID AND D.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY C.FRO_GRP_ID) vis on vis.FRO_GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID left join( --拒签数量 select count(1) VIS_FAIL_NUM,GRP_ID from grp_costumer a where VIS_STATUS='VIS_CRE_FAIL' AND COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY GRP_ID ) vis_fail on vis_fail.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN GRP_GYAP_DOC GYAP ON A.GRP_ID=GYAP.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN ( select C.grp_id GID, A.COIN_ID, SUM(A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP * A.SUB_NUM ) PRICE, SUM(E.PAY_REAL) AS AIR_TICKET_PAYED from enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.ENQ_OP_ID = b.enq_op_id and b.SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' inner join enq_main c on b.ENQ_ID = c.ENQ_ID and c.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_BILL E ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = E.RELATE_SUP_ID and C.grp_id=e.GRP_ID INNER JOIN SER_MAIN SM ON A.ser_id = SM.ser_id where SM.SER_TAG='SER_TAG_AIR' GROUP BY C.grp_id, A.COIN_ID ) AIR_TICKET_PAYED ON A.grp_id = AIR_TICKET_PAYED.GID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' and a.grp_pid is null AND ( A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE' OR A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' AND ( C.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR @VIEW_ACL = 'ALL' OR @VIEW_ACL = 'DEPT' AND C.ADM_ID IN (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) AND ( @FILTER is null OR @FILTER = 'SALES' AND NOT A.GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC') ) and ( (@EWA_RECYCLE is null and (GRP_SDATE >= @EWA.DATE.STR or a.GRP_STA !='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW')) or (@EWA_RECYCLE=1 and a.GRP_STA ='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' and (GRP_SDATE is null or GRP_SDATE<@EWA.DATE.STR)) ) and not A.GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_TYPE_CAMP_LESSON','GRP_TYPE_BMYX','GRP_TYPE_BMYX_COS') ) A where 1=1 order by grp_id desc, sdt desc

Set.Name: OnFrameDelete SQL
Set.Sql: update GRP_MAIN set grp_state='DEL' WHERE GRP_ID = @GRP_ID

Set.Name: ExtendAction0 SQL
Set.Sql: update grp_main set grp_sta=@EWA_WF_NEXT where grp_id=@grp_id and sup_id=@g_sup_id

Set.Name: ExtendAction1 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME,SUP.CRM_COM_ID,a.* , b.allprice, b.profit1 ,c.adm_name,isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num ,(HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< dt then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(dt,grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO, case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok,DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID)AS PT, case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem, isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum,A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME,B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE ,ENQ_CREATE_TIME,GO.GRP_OPEN_TIME,GO.GRP_OPEN_STATE , s.UNIT_PRICE QUOTED_PRICE , s.IN_PLAN BILL_RECEIVABLE , s.IN_REAL BILL_RECEIVED , s.COST PAY_PLAN , s.PAY_REAL , s.PB PROFIT_CURRENT , s.START_DATE SDT , s.END_DATE DT , s.DAYS , S.WZF , S.UNBUY , vis.VISA_MATERIAL , isnull('拒签 '+cast(vis_fail.VIS_FAIL_NUM as varchar(10)),'') VISA_RESULTS , GVT.BAS_TAG AS GRP_VISIT FROM v_GRP_MAIN a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY where enq_id in( SELECT enq_id FROM ENQ_MAIN WHERE GRP_ID=grp_id AND ENQ_STATE='used' and enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) AND SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( select count(g.cos_id) nums,g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM,ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' )kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join (select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm )as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join (select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG=A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GO ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID=GO.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID INNER JOIN ( select distinct GRP_ID,RELATE_SUP_ID ,b.CRM_COM_ID from GRP_COSTUMER a inner join CRM_CONN b on a.RELATE_SUP_ID=b.SUP_DOWN_ID WHERE CRM_COM_ID=@CRM_COM_ID union select grp_id,a.sup_down_id,b.crm_com_id from grp_main a inner join CRM_CONN b on a.SUP_down_ID=b.SUP_DOWN_ID WHERE CRM_COM_ID=@CRM_COM_ID ) SUP ON A.GRP_ID=SUP.GRP_ID left join GRP_FIN_SUMMARY s on a.GRP_ID=s.GRP_ID left join ( --资料收取数 SELECT COUNT(*) VISA_MATERIAL,C.FRO_GRP_ID FROM VIS_REQ_FILE A INNER JOIN VIS_TAB_MAIN C ON A.VIS_ID=C.VIS_ID INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER D ON C.FRO_GRP_ID=D.GRP_ID AND C.USR_ID=D.COS_ID AND D.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY C.FRO_GRP_ID) vis on vis.FRO_GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID left join( --拒签数量 select count(1) VIS_FAIL_NUM,GRP_ID from grp_costumer a where VIS_STATUS='VIS_CRE_FAIL' AND COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY GRP_ID ) vis_fail on vis_fail.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID INNER JOIN BAS_TAG GTP ON GTP.BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_TYPE' AND A.GRP_TYPE=GTP.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG GVT ON GVT.BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_VISIT' AND GVT.BAS_TAG=GTP.BAS_TAG_PARA6 ) A WHERE (sup_id=@g_sup_id ) and grp_state<>'DEL' and not A.grp_type in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC') order by grp_id desc

Set.Name: ExtendAction2 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT *,nums1-nums as diff FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.allprice , b.profit1 , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , (HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< DT then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(DT, grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID) AS PT , case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem , isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_STATE FROM v_GRP_MAIN a INNER JOIN ( -- 出发和回来日期 SELECT ENQ_ID, min(enq_jny_date) as SDT, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY where SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 报价 SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团备注 select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm ) as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id ) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG=A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GO ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID=GO.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 单团 INNER JOIN crm_conn c on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) UNION SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 散拼 INNER join ( select grp_id, a.relate_sup_id, count(*) as STUDENTS from grp_costumer a GROUP BY A.GRP_ID, relate_sup_id ) d on a.grp_id = d.grp_id INNER JOIN crm_conn c on D.relate_sup_id = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) ) SALES ON A.GRP_ID = SALES.GRP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND ( A.grp_type = @grp_type OR (@grp_type is null and not A.grp_type in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC')) ) AND (A.GRP_OPEN_ID >0 OR A.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') AND (@DT_START IS NULL OR SDT >= @DT_START) AND (@DT_END IS NULL OR SDT <= @DT_END) AND ( @T=12 OR @T = 10 AND SALES.GRP_ID > 0 ) ) A WHERE 1=1 order by a.grp_id desc

Set.Name: saveenq
Set.Sql: PR_GRP_ENQ_EDIT (@grp_id,@enq_id,@html,@g_sup_id,@g_adm_id)

Set.Name: upgrpstate
Set.Sql: update grp_main set GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' where grp_id=@grp_id

Set.Name: initFlow
Set.Sql: select grp_num,grp_id,vis.vis_nums from grp_main grp left join( select @grp_id fro_grp_id, count(vis_id) vis_nums from vis_tab_main where fro_grp_id=@grp_id ) vis on vis.fro_grp_id=grp.grp_id where grp_num != vis_nums and grp.grp_id=@grp_id

Set.Name: NEW_MENU_2019_SALES SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT *,nums1-nums as diff FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.allprice , b.profit1 , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , (HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< DT then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(DT, grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID) AS PT , case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem , isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_STATE FROM v_GRP_MAIN a left JOIN ( -- 出发和回来日期 SELECT ENQ_ID, min(enq_jny_date) as SDT, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY where SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 报价 SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团备注 select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm ) as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id ) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG=A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GO ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID=GO.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 单团 INNER JOIN crm_conn c on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) UNION SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 散拼 INNER join ( select grp_id, a.relate_sup_id, count(*) as STUDENTS from grp_costumer a GROUP BY A.GRP_ID, relate_sup_id ) d on a.grp_id = d.grp_id INNER JOIN crm_conn c on D.relate_sup_id = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) ) SALES ON A.GRP_ID = SALES.GRP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND (A.OP_ID = @OP_ID or (A.OP_ID is null and @OP_ID = 0) or @OP_ID is null) AND ( A.grp_type = @grp_type OR (@grp_type is null and not A.grp_type in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC')) ) AND (A.GRP_OPEN_ID >0 OR A.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') AND (@DT_START IS NULL OR grp_sdate >= @DT_START) AND (@DT_END IS NULL OR grp_sdate <= @DT_END) AND ( @T=12 OR @T = 10 AND SALES.GRP_ID > 0 ) ) A WHERE 1=1 order by a.grp_id desc

Set.Name: Old-OnPageLoad Sql
Set.Sql: --旧的onpageload,2019-08-24备份; SELECT *,nums1-nums as diff FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.QUOTED_PRICE , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , (HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , INCOME.* , PAYMENT.* , isnull(INCOME.BILL_RECEIVED,0) - isnull(PAYMENT.PAY_REAL,0) as PROFIT_CURRENT , COUNTRY.COUNTRY_NAME , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , dd.SDT , dd.DT , DD.DAYS FROM v_GRP_MAIN a LEFT JOIN ( -- 出发和回来日期 SELECT ENQ_ID, min(enq_jny_date) as SDT, max(enq_jny_date) DT, MAX(ENQ_JNY_DAY) DAYS FROM ENQ_JNY where SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 报价 SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(sig_r_price) as QUOTED_PRICE from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 应收、已收 SELECT GRP_ID ID0, SUM(BILL_RECEIVABLE) BILL_RECEIVABLE, SUM(BILL_RECEIVED) AS BILL_RECEIVED FROM GRP_BILL GROUP BY GRP_ID ) as INCOME on INCOME.ID0 = a.grp_id left join ( -- 支付 select GRP_ID ID1 , sum(PAY_PLAN) AS PAY_PLAN , sum(PAY_REAL) AS PAY_REAL , sum(PAY_UN) AS PAY_UN FROM GRP_PAY_BILL GROUP BY GRP_ID ) AS PAYMENT ON PAYMENT.ID1 = A.grp_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 国家 SELECT ENQ_ID AS ID2, CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN b.CITY_NAME_EN else b.CITY_NAME end AS COUNTRY_NAME FROM ( select enq_id, right( CONVERT(varchar, max( CONVERT(bigint, aa) * 1000000000 + country_id )),9) *1 AS COU_ID from ( select ENQ_ID, b.COUNTRY_ID, count(*) aa from ENQ_CACHE_CITYS a inner join city b on a.CITY_ID = b.CITY_ID group by ENQ_ID, b.COUNTRY_ID ) as d group by enq_id ) A inner join city b on a.COU_ID = b.CITY_ID ) AS COUNTRY ON A.ENQ_ID = COUNTRY.ID2 LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.grp_sta <> 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' and a.grp_pid is null ) A where 1=1 order by sdt desc, a.grp_id desc

Set.Name: 加载数据
Set.Sql: select D.GRP_ID , A.SUP_DOWN_ID , sm.SUP_NAME , A.COIN_ID , SUM(A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP * A.SUB_NUM ) PRICE , SUM(E.PAY_REAL) AS PAY_REAL from enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.ENQ_OP_ID = b.enq_op_id and b.SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' inner join enq_main c on b.ENQ_ID = c.ENQ_ID and c.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' inner join grp_main d on d.GRP_ID = c.GRP_ID AND D.GRP_STATE='USED' LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_BILL E ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = E.RELATE_SUP_ID and d.grp_id=e.GRP_ID inner join sup_main sm on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = sm.SUP_ID INNER JOIN SER_MAIN ser ON A.ser_id = ser.ser_id and ser.SER_TAG='SER_TAG_AIR' where d.grp_id in (@ids_split) AND D.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY D.grp_id, A.SUP_DOWN_ID, sm.SUP_NAME, A.COIN_ID

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT v.*, case when IN_PLAN=0 then 0 else IN_LEFT/IN_PLAN end IN_PER, case when COST=0 then 0 else WZF/COST end WZF_PER, g.grp_name, G.GRP_TYPE, g.grp_hy_code, g.CLAC_STATUS, G.GRP_SDATE, SUP_NAME, AU.ADM_NAME, OP.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME FROM V_grp_main g inner join GRP_FIN_SUMMARY v on v.grp_id=g.grp_id AND G.GRP_STA ='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' AND ISNULL(G.GRP_SHOW_TAG,'')!='DEL' INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN SM ON G.SUP_DOWN_ID=SM.SUP_ID INNER JOIN ADM_USER AU ON G.ADM_ID=AU.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER OP ON G.OP_ID=OP.ADM_ID
-- ewa_test @VIEW_ACL is NULL or @VIEW_ACL = '' INNER JOIN ( select distinct grp_id from grp_costumer WHERE sales_id = @g_adm_id and cos_status='COS_NEW' ) mygroup on g.grp_id = mygroup.grp_id
-- ewa_test @VIEW_ACL = 'DEPT' INNER JOIN ( select distinct grp_id from grp_costumer WHERE sales_id in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) and cos_status='COS_NEW' ) mygroup on g.grp_id = mygroup.grp_id -- ewa_test
WHERE g.grp_state='USED' AND g.sup_id=@g_sup_id ) AAA WHERE @GRP_ID=GRP_ID OR @GRP_ID IS NULL ORDER BY GRP_ID DESC

Set.Name: getSummary SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT SUM(BUDGET) BUDGET, SUM(BUDGET_INCOME) BUDGET_INCOME, SUM(BUDGET_PROFIT) BUDGET_PROFIT, SUM(UNBUY) UNBUY, SUM(PAY_PLAN) PAY_PLAN, SUM(PAY_REAL) PAY_REAL, SUM(IN_PLAN) IN_PLAN, SUM(IN_REAL) IN_REAL, SUM(PAY_REAL_COIN) PAY_REAL_COIN, SUM(PAY_REAL_VIS) PAY_REAL_VIS, SUM(SUP) SUP, SUM(IN_LEFT) IN_LEFT, SUM(PAY_LEFT) PAY_LEFT, SUM(COST) COST, SUM(PROFIT) PROFIT, SUM(PB) PB, SUM(HLC) HLC, SUM(FPB) FPB, SUM(M_POOL) M_POOL, SUM(PPNUM) PPNUM, SUM(PAX) PAX, SUM(LEADERS) LEADERS, SUM(STUDENTS) STUDENTS, SUM(COST_ADD) COST_ADD, SUM(WZF) WZF, SUM(XSLR) XSLR, SUM(YDLR) YDLR, SUM(ZBLR) ZBLR, SUM(XSLR1) XSLR1, case when SUM(IN_PLAN)=0 then 0 else SUM(IN_LEFT)/SUM(IN_PLAN) end IN_PER, case when SUM(COST)=0 then 0 else SUM(WZF)/SUM(COST) end WZF_PER, COUNT(1) GRP_HY_CODE from GRP_FIN_SUMMARY v inner join V_grp_main g on v.grp_id=g.grp_id AND G.GRP_STA ='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' AND ISNULL(G.GRP_SHOW_TAG,'')!='DEL' and g.grp_state='USED' and g.sup_id=@G_SUP_ID INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN SM ON G.SUP_DOWN_ID=SM.SUP_ID INNER JOIN ADM_USER AU ON G.ADM_ID=AU.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN (SELECT ADM_ID,ADM_NAME OP_NAME,ADM_NAME_EN OP_NAME_EN from ADM_USER where sup_id=@G_SUP_ID) OP ON G.OP_ID=OP.ADM_ID WHERE 1=1

Set.Name: ff
Set.Sql: SELECT GRP_HY_CODE 团号,GRP_NAME 团名称,SUP_NAME 客户,ADM_NAME 销售,OP_NAME 操作,DEST_COUNTRIES 国家, PPNUM 人数,PAX 已报,GRP_SDATE 开团日期,GT 团类型, CS 结算状态,BUDGET_INCOME 预算收入,BUDGET 预算成本,BUDGET_PROFIT 预算利润,IN_PLAN 应收,IN_REAL 已收,IN_LEFT 未收,SUP 已采购,UNBUY 未采购,PAY_REAL_VIS 其他支出,PROFIT 利润调整, COST 动态成本, PAY_REAL 已付, HLC 汇率差, WZF 未支付, PB 即时利润, FPB 利润, COST_ADD 预计成本增加, M_POOL 资金池, YDLR 营地利润, ZBLR 总部利润, XSLR1 销售利润 FROM (SELECT v.*, g.grp_name, G.GRP_TYPE, g.grp_hy_code, g.CLAC_STATUS, G.GRP_SDATE, SUP_NAME, AU.ADM_NAME, OP.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME, E.BAS_TAG_NAME GT, F.BAS_TAG_NAME CS FROM V_grp_main g inner join GRP_FIN_SUMMARY v on v.grp_id=g.grp_id AND G.GRP_STA ='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' AND ISNULL(G.GRP_SHOW_TAG,'')!='DEL' INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN SM ON G.SUP_DOWN_ID=SM.SUP_ID INNER JOIN ADM_USER AU ON G.ADM_ID=AU.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER OP ON G.OP_ID=OP.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG E ON E.BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_TYPE' AND E.BAS_TAG=G.GRP_TYPE LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG F ON F.BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_RSTAUT' AND F.BAS_TAG=G.CLAC_STATUS WHERE g.grp_state='USED' AND g.sup_id=@g_sup_id ) AAA WHERE @GRP_ID=GRP_ID OR @GRP_ID IS NULL ORDER BY GRP_ID DESC

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: WITH w_sers AS ( SELECT sc.SUP_ID, count(DISTINCT sc.SER_ID) SERS FROM SER_CONN sc WHERE sc.OWN_SUP_ID = @g_sup_id -- ewa_test @ser_id > 0 AND sc.ser_id = @ser_id -- ewa_test GROUP BY sc.SUP_ID ), BILL AS ( --收付款，团状态为客户确认 SELECT B.RELATE_SUP_ID, sum(PAY_PLAN) AS PAY_PLAN, sum(PAY_REAL) AS PAY_REAL, sum(PAY_UN) AS PAY_UN FROM GRP_MAIN A INNER JOIN GRP_PAY_BILL B ON A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' AND A.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND (A.CLAC_STATUS != 'FINALLY_CLOSE') AND GRP_SDATE > getdate() - 365 -- 一年有效，超过一年默认关闭 AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL GROUP BY B.RELATE_SUP_ID ), GRPS_PROGRESS AS ( SELECT RELATE_SUP_ID, count(*) AS GRPS_PROGRESS FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT B.RELATE_SUP_ID, b.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A INNER JOIN GRP_PAY_BILL B ON A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' AND A.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND (A.CLAC_STATUS != 'FINALLY_CLOSE') AND GRP_SDATE > getdate() AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL ) AA GROUP BY RELATE_SUP_ID ), HIS_BILL AS ( --历史营业额 SELECT B.RELATE_SUP_ID, sum(PAY_REAL) AS HIS_PAY_REAL FROM GRP_MAIN A INNER JOIN GRP_PAY_BILL B ON A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID -- 一年有效，超过一年默认关闭 AND ( A.CLAC_STATUS = 'FINALLY_CLOSE' OR GRP_SDATE <= getdate() - 365 ) GROUP BY B.RELATE_SUP_ID ), GRPS_HIS AS ( --已关闭团 SELECT RELATE_SUP_ID, count(*) AS GRPS_HIS FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT B.RELATE_SUP_ID, b.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A INNER JOIN GRP_PAY_BILL B ON A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND (A.CLAC_STATUS = 'FINALLY_CLOSE') AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL ) AA GROUP BY RELATE_SUP_ID ), QUERIES AS ( --询价单数量，在使用的询价 SELECT COUNT(1) SUP_QUERIES, SUP_ID, max(CREATE_TIME) AS LAST_OP FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN WHERE ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED' GROUP BY SUP_ID ), QUOTES AS ( --报价单数量，状态是结束 SELECT COUNT(1) SUP_QUOTES, SUP_ID FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN WHERE ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED' AND STATE = 'ENQ_FIN' GROUP BY SUP_ID ), CONTRACTS AS ( -- 报价合同数量，状态是结束且有合同文件 SELECT COUNT(1) SUP_CONTRACTS, SUP_ID FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN WHERE ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED' AND STATE = 'ENQ_FIN' AND PIC_PHY_PATH IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUP_ID ), ser AS ( SELECT DISTINCT SUP_ID FROM ser_conn a WHERE a.ser_key0 = @ser_key_id OR a.ser_key1 = @ser_key_id ), CONTACTS AS ( --联系记录 SELECT B.CRM_COM_ID AS ID1, COUNT(*) AS CONTACTS FROM CRM_RECORD A INNER JOIN CRM_CUS B ON A.CRM_CUS_ID = B.CRM_CUS_ID GROUP BY B.CRM_COM_ID ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT sm.*, sd.ser_name AS st, au.adm_name, S.CITY_NAME, smt.bas_TAG_NAME AS SUP_MTAG_NAME, cc.CRM_COM_ID, CRM_CONN_ID, cc.CRM_CONN_CREATE_TIME, CONTACTS.CONTACTS, BILL.*, GRPS_PROGRESS.GRPS_PROGRESS, HIS_BILL.HIS_PAY_REAL, GRPS_HIS.GRPS_HIS, QUERIES.SUP_QUERIES, QUERIES.LAST_OP -- 最后下单时间 , QUOTES.SUP_QUOTES, CONTRACTS.SUP_CONTRACTS, country.CITY_NAME COUNTRY_NAME FROM SUP_MAIN sm LEFT JOIN w_sers sers ON sm.SUP_ID = sers.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN CRM_CONN CC ON CC.SUP_DOWN_ID = SM.SUP_ID AND CC.sup_UP_id = @g_sup_id LEFT JOIN CITY S ON SM.CITY_ID1 = S.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN city country ON s.COUNTRY_ID = country.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN bas_tag smt ON smt.bas_TAG = cc.CRM_CONN_TAG LEFT JOIN ser_main sd ON sd.sup_id = 3 AND sd.ser_TAG = sm.ser_tag1 LEFT JOIN adm_user au ON au.adm_id = cc.adm_id LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG bt ON sd.SER_TAG = bt.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG bt2 ON sm.SIGN_TAG = bt2.BAS_TAG -- 联系记录 LEFT JOIN CONTACTS ON cc.CRM_COM_ID = CONTACTS.ID1 LEFT JOIN SUP_INBOUND inbound ON sm.sup_id = inbound.sup_id LEFT JOIN BILL ON SM.sup_id = BILL.RELATE_SUP_ID -- 新团数量，团状态为客户确认 LEFT JOIN GRPS_PROGRESS ON SM.sup_id = GRPS_PROGRESS.RELATE_SUP_ID -- 历史营业额 LEFT JOIN HIS_BILL ON SM.sup_id = HIS_BILL.RELATE_SUP_ID -- 已关闭团 LEFT JOIN GRPS_HIS ON SM.sup_id = GRPS_HIS.RELATE_SUP_ID -- 询价单数量，在使用的询价 LEFT JOIN QUERIES ON sm.sup_id = QUERIES.SUP_ID -- 报价单数量，状态是结束 LEFT JOIN QUOTES ON sm.sup_id = QUOTES.SUP_ID -- 报价合同数量，状态是结束且有合同文件 LEFT JOIN CONTRACTS ON sm.sup_id = CONTRACTS.SUP_ID -- ewa_test @ser_key_id > 0 LEFT JOIN ser ON sm.sup_id = ser.SUP_ID -- ewa_test WHERE ( CRM_CONN_TAG = 'SUP_TYPE_SUPPLY' OR CRM_CONN_TAG = 'SUP_TYPE_ALL' OR sm.sup_id = @g_sup_id ) AND ( @IN_GRP_CARD IS NULL OR sm.sup_id IN (@SUP_ID_SPLIT) ) -- ewa_test @ser_id > 0 AND sers.sers > 0 -- ewa_test @ser_key_id > 0 AND (ser.SUP_ID > 0) -- ewa_test @show_tag = 'inbound' AND ( @show_tag = 'inbound' AND inbound.SUP_ID > 0 ) -- ewa_test @COMP_SINGLE='COMP' AND sers.sers > 1 -- ewa_test @COMP_SINGLE='SINGLE' AND ( sers.sers < 1 OR sers IS NULL ) -- ewa_test ) sl WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY GRPS_PROGRESS DESC, SUP_ID DESC

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
-- EWA_SQL_SPLIT_NO SELECT TOP 1 BAS_TAG CURRENT_YEAR FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP='YEARS' AND BAS_TAG_PARA1='CURRENT' ORDER BY BAS_TAG DESC ;
with w_CONTACTS as ( SELECT B.CRM_COM_ID AS ID1, COUNT(*) AS CONTACTS FROM CRM_RECORD A INNER JOIN CRM_CUS B ON A.CRM_CUS_ID = B.CRM_CUS_ID WHERE A.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY B.CRM_COM_ID ), w_last_feedback as ( select CRM_COM_ID,max(CF_MDATE) LAST_CF_MDATE from CRM_FEEDBACK where CF_HIS='N' group by CRM_COM_ID ) -- ewa_test @AUS_TYPE is null , w_grp_types as ( select bas_tag from bas_tag where BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_TYPE' and BAS_TAG_PARA2='USED' and not BAS_TAG in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC') ), w_COOP_PLAN as ( SELECT A.SUP_DOWN_ID ID2, COUNT(*) COOP_PLAN FROM GRP_MAIN A WHERE GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' AND A.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND A.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) AND A.GRP_SDATE>@SYS_DATE GROUP BY A.SUP_DOWN_ID ),w_BOOKING as ( SELECT A.SUP_DOWN_ID ID2, SUM(isnull(b.PEOPLE_NUM,0)+isnull(b.HEAD_NUM,0)) BOOKING FROM GRP_MAIN A inner join ENQ_MAIN b on a.grp_id=b.grp_id and b.ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES' WHERE GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' AND A.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND A.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) AND A.GRP_SDATE>@SYS_DATE GROUP BY A.SUP_DOWN_ID ), w_QUERIES as( SELECT A.SUP_DOWN_ID ID2, COUNT(*) QUERIES FROM GRP_MAIN A WHERE GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' AND A.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND A.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) GROUP BY A.SUP_DOWN_ID ), w_ENQ_OPS as ( SELECT b.SUP_DOWN_ID ID3, COUNT(*) ENQ_OPS FROM ENQ_MAIN a inner join GRP_MAIN b on a.GRP_ID = b.GRP_ID and b.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' and a.ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES' AND B.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND B.GRP_PID IS NULL AND B.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND b.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) where FLOW_STATE in ('ENQ_STAR', 'ENQ_OP') GROUP BY b.SUP_DOWN_ID ), w_CUST_PROGRESSES as ( SELECT B.RELATE_SUP_ID ID5 , COUNT(*) AS BILL_GRPS -- 新团数量 , SUM(B.BILL_PEOPLE_NUM) AS CUST_PROGRESSES , SUM(B.BILL_RECEIVABLE) AS BILL_RECEIVABLE , SUM(B.BILL_RECEIVED) AS BILL_RECEIVED , SUM(B.BILL_EXIT_NUM) AS EXITS -- 退团人数 , SUM(B.BILL_EXIT_MONEY) AS BILL_EXIT_MONEY , SUM(B.BILL_DISCOUNT_NUM) AS DISCOUNTS -- 优惠人数 , SUM(B.BILL_DISCOUNT_MONEY) AS BILL_DISCOUNT_MONEY , SUM(B.BILL_EXCHANGE_OUT_NUM) AS CHANGES -- 转团人数 , SUM(B.BILL_EXCHANGE_IN_NUM) AS BILL_EXCHANGE_IN_NUM , SUM(B.BILL_REFUND_NUM) AS BILL_REFUND_NUM , SUM(B.BILL_REFUND_MONEY) AS BILL_REFUND_MONEY FROM GRP_MAIN A INNER JOIN GRP_BILL B ON A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' AND A.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND (A.CLAC_STATUS!='FINALLY_CLOSE' ) AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND A.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) GROUP BY B.RELATE_SUP_ID ), w_UN_BILL_GRPS as ( select count(1) UN_BILL_GRPS,A.SUP_DOWN_ID from GRP_MAIN A where A.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' AND A.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND (A.CLAC_STATUS!='FINALLY_CLOSE' ) AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND A.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) AND not exists(select 1 from GRP_BILL x where a.GRP_ID=x.GRP_ID and a.SUP_DOWN_ID=x.RELATE_SUP_ID) group by A.SUP_DOWN_ID ), w_HISTORY as ( select c.RELATE_SUP_ID AS ID6 , sum(c.SETTL_INCOME) AS HIS_RECEIVED , sum(c.SETTL_MARGIN) AS HIS_PROFIT , sum(SETTL_NUM_TOTAL) AS CUST_HISTORIES , count(*) AS GRP_HISTORIES from GRP_MAIN a inner join GRP_SETTL b on a.GRP_SETTL_UNID = b.GRP_SETTL_UNID and a.GRP_ID = b.GRP_ID inner join GRP_SETTL_SALES c on b.GRP_SETTL_ID = c.GRP_SETTL_ID where a.CLAC_STATUS ='FINALLY_CLOSE' AND A.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID and a.GRP_STATE='USED' AND A.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) group by c.RELATE_SUP_ID ), w_ct as ( select COUNT(1) CONTRACTS,a.RELATE_SUP_ID from CURRENCY_FILE a inner join GRP_MAIN b on a.GRP_ID=b.GRP_ID where a.FILE_TYPE='PACT1' and b.GRP_STATE='USED' and PIC_PHY_PATH IS NOT NULL AND PIC_PHY_PATH != '' and STATE='USED' and a.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND b.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) group by a.RELATE_SUP_ID ), w_grps as ( select count(1) GRP_NUM,a.SUP_ID from sup_main a inner join grp_main b on b.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) and (a.sup_id=b.SUP_DOWN_ID or exists(select 1 from GRP_COSTUMER gc where a.sup_id=gc.RELATE_SUP_ID and b.grp_id=gc.GRP_ID and gc.COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' )) where b.sup_id=@G_SUP_ID group by a.SUP_ID ), w_promotions as ( select count(1) PROM_NUM ,SUP_DOWN_ID from grp_main where grp_type like 'GRP_TYPE_BMYX%' and GRP_STATE='USED' and sup_id=@G_SUP_ID group by SUP_DOWN_ID ), w_new_crm as ( select a.CRM_COM_ID,'New' NEW_CUSTOMER from crm_com a where aus_type='LEAD_WEBSITE' and USE_STATE='USED' and not exists(select 1 from CRM_FEEDBACK x where a.CRM_COM_ID=x.CRM_COM_ID) and not exists(select 1 from CRM_RECORD x inner join crm_cus y on x.CRM_CUS_ID = y.CRM_CUS_ID where a.CRM_COM_ID=y.CRM_COM_ID and x.ADM_ID=a.ADM_ID) ) -- ewa_test SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN cc.SUP_DOWN_ID IS NULL then 'CRM_COM_STAR_STATUS_A' else isnull(CRM_COM_STAR_STATUS,'CRM_COM_STAR_STATUS_B') end TAG , DEP_NAME , CRM_CONN_TAG , V.* , isnull(cc.sup_down_id,0) r_sup_id , CASE WHEN cc.SUP_DOWN_ID IS NULL THEN 'SIGN_NO' ELSE 'SIGN_YES' END SIGN , A0.ADM_NAME , CONTACTS.CONTACTS , case when cf.CF_ID is null then 'COM_NO' else 'COM_YES' end CF_NEED , cf.CF_YEAR , isnull(cf.CF_PROGRESS,0) CF_PROGRESS , LAST_CF_MDATE CF_MDATE , CC.ADM_ID SALE_ID , convert(date,V.CRM_COM_CDATE) FT_CRM_COM_CDATE , isnull(v.AUS_TAID,v.ADM_ID) CREATE_ADM_ID , c.CITY_NAME PROVINCE -- ewa_test @AUS_TYPE is null , COOP_PLAN.COOP_PLAN , BOOKING.BOOKING , QUERIES.QUERIES , ENQ_OPS.ENQ_OPS , CUST_PROGRESSES.* , isnull(CUST_PROGRESSES.BILL_GRPS,0)+isnull(UN_BILL_GRPS.UN_BILL_GRPS,0) GRP_PROGRESSES , BILL_RECEIVABLE - BILL_RECEIVED as BILL_UNPAY , HISTORY.* , ct.CONTRACTS , grps.GRP_NUM , w_promotions.PROM_NUM , w_new_crm.NEW_CUSTOMER -- ewa_test FROM CRM_COM V left join CRM_FEEDBACK cf on v.CRM_COM_ID=cf.CRM_COM_ID and cf.CF_HIS='N' and cf.CF_YEAR=@CURRENT_YEAR LEFT JOIN CRM_CONN CC ON V.CRM_COM_ID = CC.CRM_COM_ID AND CC.SUP_UP_ID = @G_SUP_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG = CRM_CONN_TAG LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A0 ON isnull(cc.ADM_ID,v.ADM_ID) = A0.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_DEPT A1 ON A1.DEP_ID = A0.ADM_DEP_ID left join city c on v.province_id=c.city_id LEFT JOIN w_contacts CONTACTS ON V.CRM_COM_ID = CONTACTS.ID1 left join w_last_feedback last_cf on v.CRM_COM_ID=last_cf.CRM_COM_ID -- ewa_test @AUS_TYPE is null LEFT JOIN w_COOP_PLAN COOP_PLAN ON CC.SUP_DOWN_ID = COOP_PLAN.ID2 -- 合作计划 LEFT JOIN w_BOOKING BOOKING ON CC.SUP_DOWN_ID = BOOKING.ID2 -- 预订人数 LEFT JOIN w_QUERIES QUERIES ON CC.SUP_DOWN_ID = QUERIES.ID2 -- 询价单 LEFT JOIN w_ENQ_OPS ENQ_OPS ON ENQ_OPS.ID3 = CC.SUP_DOWN_ID -- 报价列表 LEFT JOIN w_CUST_PROGRESSES CUST_PROGRESSES ON CUST_PROGRESSES.ID5 = CC.SUP_DOWN_ID left JOIN w_UN_BILL_GRPS UN_BILL_GRPS on UN_BILL_GRPS.SUP_DOWN_ID=cc.SUP_DOWN_ID LEFT JOIN w_HISTORY HISTORY ON HISTORY.ID6 = CC.SUP_DOWN_ID LEFT JOIN w_ct ct on cc.SUP_DOWN_ID=ct.RELATE_SUP_ID --团合同数量 left join w_grps grps on cc.SUP_DOWN_ID=grps.SUP_ID left join w_promotions on CC.SUP_DOWN_ID=w_promotions.SUP_DOWN_ID left join w_new_crm on v.CRM_COM_ID=w_new_crm.CRM_COM_ID -- ewa_test WHERE V.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID -- 2025-02-05 客户是客户，供应商是供应商（王总） and (cc.CRM_CONN_TAG is null or cc.CRM_CONN_TAG='SUP_TYPE_CUS' or cc.CRM_CONN_TAG= 'SUP_TYPE_ALL') -- ewa_test isnull(@CF_NEED,'') = '1' and LAST_CF_MDATE is not null -- ewa_test @AUS_TYPE is null AND ( V.ADM_ID=@G_ADM_ID OR @VIEW_ACL = 'ALL' OR @VIEW_ACL = 'DEPT' AND A0.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) and v.ADM_ID > 0 -- ewa_test @AUS_TYPE is not null and @AUS_TYPE!='' -- 自媒体客户 AND v.AUS_TYPE=@AUS_TYPE AND ((V.ADM_ID=@G_ADM_ID or V.AUS_TAID=@G_ADM_ID) -- 销售或自媒体客户填写人 or @VIEW_ACL = 'ALL' OR @VIEW_ACL = 'DEPT' AND (A0.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) or v.AUS_TAID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) -- ewa_test ) AS TE WHERE USE_STATE='USED' order by -- ewa_test @AUS_TYPE is null NEW_CUSTOMER DESC, -- ewa_test CRM_COM_ID DESC

Set.Name: getMasterContact SQL
Set.Sql:
select top 1 SUP_DOWN_ID,cc.CRM_COM_ID,CRM_COM_NAME from CRM_COM cc left join CRM_CONN cc2 on cc.CRM_COM_ID = cc2.CRM_COM_ID where (SUP_DOWN_ID = @SUP_DOWN_ID or SUP_DOWN_ID in (select SUP_DOWN_ID from grp_main where grp_id=@GRP_ID and SUP_ID =@G_SUP_ID and @SUP_DOWN_ID is null and @CRM_COM_ID is null) or cc.CRM_COM_ID=@CRM_COM_ID) ;
select top 1 a.CRM_CUS_ID,a.CRM_CUS_NAME,b.ADM_ID,b.ADM_LID ,case when ADM_PWD='D13149DE00848EB013CAD318D27829DB64B965D7' then 'a1234567' else '用户已修改' end DEFAULT_PWD from CRM_CUS a left join ADM_USER b on a.CRM_CUS_ID = b.CRM_CUS_ID where a.CRM_COM_ID=@CRM_COM_ID AND a.CRM_CUS_TAG!='CRM_CUS_LEAVE' ORDER BY a.CRM_CUS_MASTER DESC
