设置营地老师关注的团
OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: with valid_grp_types as ( select bas_tag, bas_tag_name from bas_tag WHERE bas_tag_grp='GRP_TYPE' and not BAS_TAG in ( select 'GRP_TYPE_CAMP_LESSON' as BAS_TAG -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null UNION select bas_tag from bas_tag WHERE bas_tag_grp = 'GRP_TYPE' and bas_tag_para2 = 'HIDE' -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE is null -- UNION -- 用于单独显示签证和机票团列表 -- select bas_tag from bas_tag WHERE bas_tag_grp = 'GRP_TYPE' and bas_tag_para5 = 'TYPE_LIST' -- ewa_test ) -- ewa_test @FILTER = 'SALES' and @REF_GRP_ID is null and bas_tag_para2 = 'USED' AND (BAS_TAG_PARA3 = 'AGENT' or bas_tag='GRP_CB' or bas_tag='GRP_ZC') -- ewa_test ), has_air_visa AS( SELECT distinct a.GRP_ID AV_GRP_ID from v_grp_main a inner join ENQ_JNY ej on a.ENQ_ID = ej.ENQ_ID inner join ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB ejs on ej.ENQ_JNY_ID = ejs.ENQ_JNY_ID where 1 = 1 -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE='GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET' and ejs.SER_ID = 1 -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE='GRP_QZ' and ejs.SER_ID = 5 and GRP_VISA !='' -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE is null or (@GRP_TYPE!='GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET' and @GRP_TYPE!='GRP_QZ') and 1 > 1 -- ewa_test group by a.GRP_ID ), contract as ( -- 代理合同 select count(1) CONTRACT_NUM, GRP_ID from CURRENCY_FILE WHERE file_type='PACT1' AND REF_TYPE='GRP_MAIN' and state='USED' and CONTRACT_VALID='COM_YES' group by GRP_ID ), ct as ( select count(1) COS_NUM, gc.GRP_ID from GRP_COSTUMER gc left join CURRENCY_FILE cf on gc.RELATE_SUP_ID=cf.RELATE_SUP_ID and cf.GRP_ID = gc.GRP_ID and cf.FILE_TYPE = 'PACT1' and cf.REF_TYPE = 'GRP_MAIN' and cf.state = 'USED' and cf.CONTRACT_VALID = 'COM_YES' and cf.tag = 1 where gc.COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' and gc.RELATE_SUP_ID != gc.SUP_ID and cf.CURRENCY_ID is null group by gc.GRP_ID ), pax as ( -- 报名人数 select count(1) PAX_NUM, GRP_ID from GRP_COSTUMER gc where gc.COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' group by gc.GRP_ID ), AIR_TICKET_PAYED as ( select C.grp_id GID , SUM(E.PAY_REAL) AS AIR_TICKET_PAYED -- 支付按人民币计算 from enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.ENQ_OP_ID = b.enq_op_id and b.SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' inner join enq_main c on b.ENQ_ID = c.ENQ_ID and c.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_BILL E ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = E.RELATE_SUP_ID and C.grp_id=e.GRP_ID INNER JOIN SER_MAIN SM ON A.ser_id = SM.ser_id where SM.SER_TAG='SER_TAG_AIR' GROUP BY C.grp_id ), cgc as ( -- 关联的营地名称 SELECT grp_id, camp_name = STUFF( (SELECT ',' + camp_name FROM CAMP_MAIN t1 inner join CAMP_GRP_CONN t0 on t1.camp_id = t0.camp_id and t0.STATE='USED' WHERE t0.grp_id = t2.grp_id FOR XML PATH ('')) , 1, 1, '' ) from CAMP_GRP_CONN t2 group by grp_id ), vis as( --资料收取数 SELECT COUNT(*) VISA_MATERIAL,C.FRO_GRP_ID FROM VIS_REQ_FILE A INNER JOIN VIS_TAB_MAIN C ON A.VIS_ID=C.VIS_ID INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER D ON C.FRO_GRP_ID=D.GRP_ID AND C.USR_ID=D.COS_ID AND D.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY C.FRO_GRP_ID ), vis_fail as ( --拒签数量 select count(1) VIS_FAIL_NUM,GRP_ID from grp_costumer a where VIS_STATUS='VIS_CRE_FAIL' AND COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY GRP_ID ), fit as ( SELECT gc.GRP_ID,count(1) FIT_NO_CONTRACT from GRP_COSTUMER gc left join CURRENCY_FILE cf on gc.GRP_COS_ID = cf.REF_ID and gc.GRP_ID=cf.GRP_ID and cf.REF_TYPE = 'GRP_COSTUMER' and cf.FILE_TYPE ='PACT1' and cf.state='USED' and cf.tag=1 and cf.CONTRACT_VALID ='COM_YES' where gc.FIT='COM_YES' and gc.COS_STATUS ='COS_NEW' and cf.CURRENCY_ID is null group by gc.GRP_ID ), w_promotions as ( select B.GRP_ID,COUNT(1) PROM_NUM from v_grp_group A INNER JOIN GRP_MAIN B ON A.SLAVE_GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID where GRP_GROUP_STATE = 'USED' and GRP_GROUP_TYPE like 'GRP_TYPE_BMYX%' group by B.GRP_ID ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.GRP_ID , GRP_HY_CODE , a.GRP_NAME , a.GRP_TYPE , a.CLAC_STATUS , a.GRP_RUN_MODEL , a.CP_AIR_TICKET , a.GRP_VISA , kk1.ENQ_ID , case when A.grp_sta = 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' then kk1.FLOW_STATE else '' end FLOW_STATE , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG = 'enus' then FCITY.CITY_NAME_EN else FCITY.CITY_NAME end FCITY , kk1.ENQ_ALL QUOTED_PRICE , c.adm_name , isnull(pax.PAX_NUM,0) PAX , isnull(S.STUDENTS,0) STUDENTS , isnull(S.LEADERS,0) LEADERS , kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM PPNUM , kk1.HEAD_NUM , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(pax.PAX_NUM,0) diff , case when kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(pax.PAX_NUM, 0) = 0 then '一致' when kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(pax.PAX_NUM, 0) > 0 then '少人' when kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(pax.PAX_NUM, 0) < 0 then '多人' end as isok , s.IN_PLAN BILL_RECEIVABLE , s.IN_REAL BILL_RECEIVED , s.COST PAY_PLAN , s.PAY_REAL , s.PB PROFIT_CURRENT , s.WZF , s.UNBUY , AIR_TICKET_PAYED.AIR_TICKET_PAYED , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then COUNTRY.CITY_NAME_EN else COUNTRY.CITY_NAME end COUNTRY_NAME , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then es.CITYS_EN else es.CITYS end CITYS , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , kk1.ENQ_CREATE_TIME , isnull(es.START_DATE,a.GRP_SDATE) SDT , es.END_DATE DT , es.DAYS , cgc.CAMP_NAME , vis.VISA_MATERIAL , isnull('拒签 '+cast(vis_fail.VIS_FAIL_NUM as varchar(10)),'') VISA_RESULTS , CASE WHEN GRP_GYAP_ID IS NULL THEN 'COM_NO' ELSE 'COM_YES' END GRP_GYAP_DOC , GYAP.GRP_GYAP_ID , GYAP.GRP_GYAP_UNID , a.GRP_UNID , a.GRP_CODE , a.grp_sta , case when A.grp_sta = 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' then '询价团' when a.GRP_RUN_MODEL='GRP_RUN_COMBINE' then '散拼团' else '单团' end PROJECT_TYPE , a.SUP_DOWN_ID , a.GRP_GUIDE_PRICE , GYAP.GRP_GYAP_TYPE , a.GRP_ENABLE_ENTRY , pd.CONN_ID , pdlst.PD_NAME , pdlst.PD_ID , GYAP.GRP_GYAP_PUB , case when a.SUP_DOWN_ID != @g_sup_id and contract.CONTRACT_NUM>0 then 'COM_YES' when a.SUP_DOWN_ID = @g_sup_id and ct.COS_NUM is null and fit.FIT_NO_CONTRACT is null then 'COM_YES' else 'COM_NO' end GRP_CONTRACT_VALID , FAV_ID , wfm.REF_TAG , A.GRP_HOT , w_promotions.PROM_NUM FROM GRP_MAIN a INNER join enq_main kk1 on kk1.GRP_ID = a.GRP_ID and ( (a.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' and kk1.ENQ_SELECT_STATE = 'CHECKED_TRUE') or (a.GRP_STA != 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' and kk1.ENQ_DEFAULT = 'COM_YES') ) inner join valid_grp_types on a.GRP_TYPE = valid_grp_types.bas_tag -- 共享团数据 inner JOIN ( select distinct sd_ref_id from SHARE_DATA WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' and sd_data = @g_sup_id ) SHARE_DATA on a.grp_id = SHARE_DATA.sd_ref_id LEFT JOIN CITY FCITY ON KK1.F_CITY = FCITY.CITY_ID left join GRP_FIN_SUMMARY s on a.GRP_ID = s.GRP_ID left join ENQ_FIN_SUMMARY es on kk1.ENQ_ID = es.ENQ_ID left join adm_user c on a.adm_id = c.adm_id left join CITY COUNTRY on es.DEST_MAIN_COUNTRY_ID = COUNTRY.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID = A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID left join cgc on a.grp_id = cgc.grp_id -- 关联的营地名称 left join vis on vis.FRO_GRP_ID = a.GRP_ID --资料收取数 left join vis_fail on vis_fail.GRP_ID = a.GRP_ID --拒签数量 LEFT JOIN GRP_GYAP_DOC GYAP ON A.GRP_ID = GYAP.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN AIR_TICKET_PAYED ON A.grp_id = AIR_TICKET_PAYED.GID left join w_promotions on a.grp_id=w_promotions.grp_id -- 海报 left join PD_CONN pd on pd.REF_TABLE = 'GRP_MAIN.ENROLL' and pd.REF_ID = A.GRP_ID and pd.REF_UNID = '' and pd.CONN_STATUS = 'USED' left join PD_LIST pdlst on pd.PD_ID = pdlst.PD_ID left join contract on contract.GRP_ID = a.GRP_ID -- 代理合同 left join fit on a.GRP_ID = fit.GRP_ID -- 个人合同 left join ct on a.GRP_ID = ct.GRP_ID left join pax on a.GRP_ID = pax.GRP_ID -- 报名人数 -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET', 'GRP_QZ') left join has_air_visa av on a.GRP_ID = av.AV_GRP_ID -- 机票或签证团列表 -- ewa_test @only_my_fav_grp is null AND @CAMP_ADM_FAV is null AND @ONLY_CAMP_ADM_FAV is null left join WEB_FAV_MAIN wfm on wfm.REF_TAG = 'GRP-MAIN-MY-FAV' and wfm.REF_ID = a.grp_id and wfm.USR_ID = @G_ADM_ID -- ewa_test @only_my_fav_grp is not null inner join WEB_FAV_MAIN wfm on wfm.REF_TAG = 'GRP-MAIN-MY-FAV' and wfm.REF_ID = a.grp_id and wfm.USR_ID = @G_ADM_ID -- ewa_test @CAMP_ADM_FAV is not null and @ONLY_CAMP_ADM_FAV is null left join WEB_FAV_MAIN wfm on wfm.REF_TAG = 'GRP-MAIN-MY-FAV' and wfm.REF_ID = a.grp_id and wfm.USR_ID = @ADM_ID -- ewa_test @ONLY_CAMP_ADM_FAV is not null inner join WEB_FAV_MAIN wfm on wfm.REF_TAG = 'GRP-MAIN-MY-FAV' and wfm.REF_ID = a.grp_id and wfm.USR_ID = @ADM_ID -- ewa_test where A.grp_state = 'USED' and a.grp_pid is null -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is not null AND a.grp_id = @REF_GRP_ID -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null and (@VIEW_ACL is null or @VIEW_ACL = '') AND ( (A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE') OR C.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID ) -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null and @VIEW_ACL = 'DEPT' AND ( (A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE') OR C.ADM_ID IN (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) -- ewa_test @GRP_OR_ENQ ='ENQ' AND @EWA_RECYCLE is null and @REF_GRP_ID is null and @GRP_GYAP_REF_GRP_ID is null and (GRP_SDATE >= @EWA.DATE.STR or a.GRP_STA !='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' or a.CP_STATUS='COM_YES') -- ewa_test @EWA_RECYCLE = '1' and @REF_GRP_ID is null and @GRP_GYAP_REF_GRP_ID is null and a.GRP_STA ='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' and (a.CP_STATUS is null or a.CP_STATUS!='COM_YES') and (GRP_SDATE is null or GRP_SDATE < @EWA.DATE.STR) -- ewa_test @GRP_OR_ENQ = 'GRP' and A.grp_sta != 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' -- 团列表 -- ewa_test @GRP_OR_ENQ = 'ENQ' and A.grp_sta = 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' -- 报价团 -- ewa_test @Inquiring is not null and exists(select 1 from enq_op_main x where x.ENQ_ID=kk1.ENQ_ID and x.ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED' and x.OWN_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID ) -- 询价团 -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE is not null and @GRP_TYPE not in ('GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET', 'GRP_QZ') and (a.GRP_TYPE = @GRP_TYPE) -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET', 'GRP_QZ') and (av.AV_GRP_ID > 0 or a.GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET', 'GRP_QZ')) -- ewa_test @GRP_ENABLE_ENTRY = 'COM_YES' and a.GRP_ENABLE_ENTRY = 'COM_YES' -- ewa_test @GRP_GYAP_REF_GRP_ID is not null -- 复制的推广团 and GYAP.GRP_GYAP_REF_GRP_ID = @GRP_GYAP_REF_GRP_ID -- ewa_test ) A where 1=1 order by grp_id desc, sdt desc

Set.Name: OnFrameDelete SQL
Set.Sql: update GRP_MAIN set grp_state='DEL' WHERE GRP_ID = @GRP_ID

Set.Name: ExtendAction0 SQL
Set.Sql: update grp_main set grp_sta=@EWA_WF_NEXT where grp_id=@grp_id and sup_id=@g_sup_id

Set.Name: ExtendAction1 SQL
Set.Sql: with valid_grp_types as ( select bas_tag, bas_tag_name from bas_tag WHERE bas_tag_grp='GRP_TYPE' and not BAS_TAG in ( select 'GRP_TYPE_CAMP_LESSON' as BAS_TAG -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null UNION select bas_tag from bas_tag WHERE bas_tag_grp = 'GRP_TYPE' and bas_tag_para2 = 'HIDE' -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE is null UNION select bas_tag from bas_tag WHERE bas_tag_grp = 'GRP_TYPE' and bas_tag_para5 = 'TYPE_LIST' -- ewa_test ) -- ewa_test @FILTER = 'SALES' and @REF_GRP_ID is null and bas_tag_para2 = 'USED' AND (BAS_TAG_PARA3 = 'AGENT' or bas_tag='GRP_CB' or bas_tag='GRP_ZC') -- ewa_test ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.allprice , b.profit1 , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , (HEAD_NUM + PEOPLE_NUM) as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< dt then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(dt,grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID)AS PT , case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem , isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , GOPEN.GRP_OPEN_TIME , GOPEN.GRP_OPEN_STATE , s.UNIT_PRICE QUOTED_PRICE , s.IN_PLAN BILL_RECEIVABLE , s.IN_REAL BILL_RECEIVED , s.COST PAY_PLAN , s.PAY_REAL , s.PB PROFIT_CURRENT , s.START_DATE SDT , s.END_DATE DT , s.DAYS , S.WZF , S.UNBUY , vis.VISA_MATERIAL , isnull('拒签 '+ cast(vis_fail.VIS_FAIL_NUM as varchar(10)),'') VISA_RESULTS , GVT.BAS_TAG AS GRP_VISIT FROM GRP_MAIN a inner join enq_main kk1 on kk1.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID and ((a.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' and kk1.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE') or (a.GRP_STA!='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' and kk1.ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES')) inner join valid_grp_types gt on a.GRP_TYPE=gt.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON kk1.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on kk1.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( select count(g.cos_id) nums,g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId = a.grp_id left join (select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm )as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join (select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG = A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GOPEN ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID = GOPEN.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID left join GRP_FIN_SUMMARY s on a.GRP_ID=s.GRP_ID left join ( --资料收取数 SELECT COUNT(*) VISA_MATERIAL,C.FRO_GRP_ID FROM VIS_REQ_FILE A INNER JOIN VIS_TAB_MAIN C ON A.VIS_ID=C.VIS_ID INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER D ON C.FRO_GRP_ID=D.GRP_ID AND C.USR_ID=D.COS_ID AND D.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY C.FRO_GRP_ID ) vis on vis.FRO_GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID left join( --拒签数量 select count(1) VIS_FAIL_NUM,GRP_ID from grp_costumer a where VIS_STATUS='VIS_CRE_FAIL' AND COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY GRP_ID ) vis_fail on vis_fail.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG GTP ON GTP.BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_TYPE' AND A.GRP_TYPE=GTP.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG GVT ON GVT.BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_VISIT' AND GVT.BAS_TAG=GTP.BAS_TAG_PARA6 inner JOIN ( select a.sd_ref_id from ( select distinct sd_ref_id from SHARE_DATA WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' and sd_data = @SUP_DOWN_ID ) a inner join ( select distinct sd_ref_id from SHARE_DATA WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' and sd_data = @G_SUP_ID ) b on a.sd_ref_id = b.sd_ref_id ) SHARE_DATA on a.grp_id = SHARE_DATA.sd_ref_id ) A WHERE grp_state = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL and (a.grp_id = @REF_GRP_ID or @REF_GRP_ID is null) -- ewa_test @GRP_OR_ENQ = 'GRP' and A.grp_sta != 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' -- ewa_test @GRP_OR_ENQ = 'ENQ' and A.grp_sta = 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' -- ewa_test @GRP_CP is not null and a.CP_STATUS='COM_YES' -- ewa_test @GRP_CLOSED is not null and a.CLAC_STATUS='FINALLY_CLOSE' -- ewa_test order by grp_id desc

Set.Name: ExtendAction2 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT *,nums1-nums as diff FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.allprice , b.profit1 , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , (HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< DT then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(DT, grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID) AS PT , case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem , isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_STATE FROM v_GRP_MAIN a INNER JOIN ( -- 出发和回来日期 SELECT ENQ_ID, min(enq_jny_date) as SDT, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY where SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 报价 SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团备注 select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm ) as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id ) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG=A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GO ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID=GO.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 单团 INNER JOIN crm_conn c on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) UNION SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 散拼 INNER join ( select grp_id, a.relate_sup_id, count(*) as STUDENTS from grp_costumer a GROUP BY A.GRP_ID, relate_sup_id ) d on a.grp_id = d.grp_id INNER JOIN crm_conn c on D.relate_sup_id = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) ) SALES ON A.GRP_ID = SALES.GRP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND ( A.grp_type = @grp_type OR (@grp_type is null and not A.grp_type in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC')) ) AND (A.GRP_OPEN_ID >0 OR A.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') AND (@DT_START IS NULL OR SDT >= @DT_START) AND (@DT_END IS NULL OR SDT <= @DT_END) AND ( @T=12 OR @T = 10 AND SALES.GRP_ID > 0 ) ) A WHERE 1=1 order by a.grp_id desc

Set.Name: saveenq
Set.Sql: PR_GRP_ENQ_EDIT (@grp_id,@enq_id,@html,@g_sup_id,@g_adm_id)

Set.Name: upgrpstate
Set.Sql: update grp_main set GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' where grp_id=@grp_id

Set.Name: initFlow
Set.Sql: select grp_num,grp_id,vis.vis_nums from grp_main grp left join( select @grp_id fro_grp_id, count(vis_id) vis_nums from vis_tab_main where fro_grp_id=@grp_id ) vis on vis.fro_grp_id=grp.grp_id where grp_num != vis_nums and grp.grp_id=@grp_id

Set.Name: NEW_MENU_2019_SALES SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT *,nums1-nums as diff FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.allprice , b.profit1 , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , (HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< DT then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(DT, grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID) AS PT , case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem , isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_STATE FROM v_GRP_MAIN a left JOIN ( -- 出发和回来日期 SELECT ENQ_ID, min(enq_jny_date) as SDT, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY where SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 报价 SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团备注 select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm ) as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id ) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG=A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GO ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID=GO.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 单团 INNER JOIN crm_conn c on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) UNION SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 散拼 INNER join ( select grp_id, a.relate_sup_id, count(*) as STUDENTS from grp_costumer a GROUP BY A.GRP_ID, relate_sup_id ) d on a.grp_id = d.grp_id INNER JOIN crm_conn c on D.relate_sup_id = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) ) SALES ON A.GRP_ID = SALES.GRP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND (A.OP_ID = @OP_ID or (A.OP_ID is null and @OP_ID = 0) or @OP_ID is null) AND ( A.grp_type = @grp_type OR (@grp_type is null and not A.grp_type in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC')) ) AND (A.GRP_OPEN_ID >0 OR A.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') AND (@DT_START IS NULL OR grp_sdate >= @DT_START) AND (@DT_END IS NULL OR grp_sdate <= @DT_END) AND ( @T=12 OR @T = 10 AND SALES.GRP_ID > 0 ) ) A WHERE 1=1 order by a.grp_id desc

Set.Name: Old-OnPageLoad Sql
Set.Sql: --旧的onpageload,2025-12-22备份; with valid_grp_types as ( select bas_tag, bas_tag_name from bas_tag WHERE bas_tag_grp='GRP_TYPE' and not BAS_TAG in ( select 'GRP_TYPE_CAMP_LESSON' as BAS_TAG -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null UNION select bas_tag from bas_tag WHERE bas_tag_grp = 'GRP_TYPE' and bas_tag_para2 = 'HIDE' -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE is null UNION -- 用于单独显示签证和机票团列表 select bas_tag from bas_tag WHERE bas_tag_grp = 'GRP_TYPE' and bas_tag_para5 = 'TYPE_LIST' -- ewa_test ) -- ewa_test @FILTER = 'SALES' and @REF_GRP_ID is null and bas_tag_para2 = 'USED' AND (BAS_TAG_PARA3 = 'AGENT' or bas_tag='GRP_CB' or bas_tag='GRP_ZC') -- ewa_test ), has_air_visa AS( SELECT distinct a.GRP_ID AV_GRP_ID from v_grp_main a inner join ENQ_JNY ej on a.ENQ_ID = ej.ENQ_ID inner join ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB ejs on ej.ENQ_JNY_ID = ejs.ENQ_JNY_ID where 1 = 1 -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE='GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET' and ejs.SER_ID = 1 -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE='GRP_QZ' and ejs.SER_ID = 5 and GRP_VISA !='' -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE is null or (@GRP_TYPE!='GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET' and @GRP_TYPE!='GRP_QZ') and 1 > 1 -- ewa_test group by a.GRP_ID ), contract as ( -- 代理合同 select count(1) CONTRACT_NUM, GRP_ID from CURRENCY_FILE WHERE file_type='PACT1' AND REF_TYPE='GRP_MAIN' and state='USED' and CONTRACT_VALID='COM_YES' group by GRP_ID ), ct as ( select count(1) COS_NUM, gc.GRP_ID from GRP_COSTUMER gc left join CURRENCY_FILE cf on gc.RELATE_SUP_ID=cf.RELATE_SUP_ID and cf.GRP_ID = gc.GRP_ID and cf.FILE_TYPE = 'PACT1' and cf.REF_TYPE = 'GRP_MAIN' and cf.state = 'USED' and cf.CONTRACT_VALID = 'COM_YES' and cf.tag = 1 where gc.COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' and gc.RELATE_SUP_ID != gc.SUP_ID and cf.CURRENCY_ID is null group by gc.GRP_ID ), pax as ( -- 报名人数 select count(1) PAX_NUM, GRP_ID from GRP_COSTUMER gc where gc.COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' group by gc.GRP_ID ), AIR_TICKET_PAYED as ( select C.grp_id GID , SUM(E.PAY_REAL) AS AIR_TICKET_PAYED -- 支付按人民币计算 from enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.ENQ_OP_ID = b.enq_op_id and b.SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' inner join enq_main c on b.ENQ_ID = c.ENQ_ID and c.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_BILL E ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = E.RELATE_SUP_ID and C.grp_id=e.GRP_ID INNER JOIN SER_MAIN SM ON A.ser_id = SM.ser_id where SM.SER_TAG='SER_TAG_AIR' GROUP BY C.grp_id ), cgc as ( -- 关联的营地名称 SELECT grp_id, camp_name = STUFF( (SELECT ',' + camp_name FROM CAMP_MAIN t1 inner join CAMP_GRP_CONN t0 on t1.camp_id = t0.camp_id and t0.STATE='USED' WHERE t0.grp_id = t2.grp_id FOR XML PATH ('')) , 1, 1, '' ) from CAMP_GRP_CONN t2 group by grp_id ), vis as( --资料收取数 SELECT COUNT(*) VISA_MATERIAL,C.FRO_GRP_ID FROM VIS_REQ_FILE A INNER JOIN VIS_TAB_MAIN C ON A.VIS_ID=C.VIS_ID INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER D ON C.FRO_GRP_ID=D.GRP_ID AND C.USR_ID=D.COS_ID AND D.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY C.FRO_GRP_ID ), vis_fail as ( --拒签数量 select count(1) VIS_FAIL_NUM,GRP_ID from grp_costumer a where VIS_STATUS='VIS_CRE_FAIL' AND COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY GRP_ID ), fit as ( SELECT gc.GRP_ID,count(1) FIT_NO_CONTRACT from GRP_COSTUMER gc left join CURRENCY_FILE cf on gc.GRP_COS_ID = cf.REF_ID and gc.GRP_ID=cf.GRP_ID and cf.REF_TYPE = 'GRP_COSTUMER' and cf.FILE_TYPE ='PACT1' and cf.state='USED' and cf.tag=1 and cf.CONTRACT_VALID ='COM_YES' where gc.FIT='COM_YES' and gc.COS_STATUS ='COS_NEW' and cf.CURRENCY_ID is null group by gc.GRP_ID ), w_promotions as ( select B.GRP_ID,COUNT(1) PROM_NUM from v_grp_group A INNER JOIN GRP_MAIN B ON A.SLAVE_GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID where GRP_GROUP_STATE = 'USED' and GRP_GROUP_TYPE like 'GRP_TYPE_BMYX%' group by B.GRP_ID ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.GRP_ID , GRP_HY_CODE , a.GRP_NAME , a.GRP_TYPE , a.CLAC_STATUS , a.GRP_RUN_MODEL , a.CP_AIR_TICKET , a.GRP_VISA , kk1.ENQ_ID , case when A.grp_sta = 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' then kk1.FLOW_STATE else '' end FLOW_STATE , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG = 'enus' then FCITY.CITY_NAME_EN else FCITY.CITY_NAME end FCITY , kk1.ENQ_ALL QUOTED_PRICE , c.adm_name , isnull(pax.PAX_NUM,0) PAX , isnull(S.STUDENTS,0) STUDENTS , isnull(S.LEADERS,0) LEADERS , kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM PPNUM , kk1.HEAD_NUM , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(pax.PAX_NUM,0) diff , case when kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(pax.PAX_NUM, 0) = 0 then '一致' when kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(pax.PAX_NUM, 0) > 0 then '少人' when kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(pax.PAX_NUM, 0) < 0 then '多人' end as isok , s.IN_PLAN BILL_RECEIVABLE , s.IN_REAL BILL_RECEIVED , s.COST PAY_PLAN , s.PAY_REAL , s.PB PROFIT_CURRENT , s.WZF , s.UNBUY , AIR_TICKET_PAYED.AIR_TICKET_PAYED , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then COUNTRY.CITY_NAME_EN else COUNTRY.CITY_NAME end COUNTRY_NAME , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then es.CITYS_EN else es.CITYS end CITYS , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , kk1.ENQ_CREATE_TIME , isnull(es.START_DATE,a.GRP_SDATE) SDT , es.END_DATE DT , es.DAYS , cgc.CAMP_NAME , vis.VISA_MATERIAL , isnull('拒签 '+cast(vis_fail.VIS_FAIL_NUM as varchar(10)),'') VISA_RESULTS , CASE WHEN GRP_GYAP_ID IS NULL THEN 'COM_NO' ELSE 'COM_YES' END GRP_GYAP_DOC , GYAP.GRP_GYAP_ID , GYAP.GRP_GYAP_UNID , a.GRP_UNID , a.GRP_CODE , a.grp_sta , case when A.grp_sta = 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' then '询价团' when a.GRP_RUN_MODEL='GRP_RUN_COMBINE' then '散拼团' else '单团' end PROJECT_TYPE , a.SUP_DOWN_ID , a.GRP_GUIDE_PRICE , GYAP.GRP_GYAP_TYPE , a.GRP_ENABLE_ENTRY , pd.CONN_ID , pdlst.PD_NAME , pdlst.PD_ID , GYAP.GRP_GYAP_PUB , case when a.SUP_DOWN_ID != @g_sup_id and contract.CONTRACT_NUM>0 then 'COM_YES' when a.SUP_DOWN_ID = @g_sup_id and ct.COS_NUM is null and fit.FIT_NO_CONTRACT is null then 'COM_YES' else 'COM_NO' end GRP_CONTRACT_VALID , FAV_ID , wfm.REF_TAG , A.GRP_HOT , w_promotions.PROM_NUM FROM GRP_MAIN a INNER join enq_main kk1 on kk1.GRP_ID = a.GRP_ID and ( (a.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' and kk1.ENQ_SELECT_STATE = 'CHECKED_TRUE') or (a.GRP_STA != 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' and kk1.ENQ_DEFAULT = 'COM_YES') ) inner join valid_grp_types on a.GRP_TYPE = valid_grp_types.bas_tag -- 共享团数据 inner JOIN ( select distinct sd_ref_id from SHARE_DATA WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' and sd_data = @g_sup_id ) SHARE_DATA on a.grp_id = SHARE_DATA.sd_ref_id LEFT JOIN CITY FCITY ON KK1.F_CITY = FCITY.CITY_ID left join GRP_FIN_SUMMARY s on a.GRP_ID = s.GRP_ID left join ENQ_FIN_SUMMARY es on kk1.ENQ_ID = es.ENQ_ID left join adm_user c on a.adm_id = c.adm_id left join CITY COUNTRY on es.DEST_MAIN_COUNTRY_ID = COUNTRY.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID = A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID left join cgc on a.grp_id = cgc.grp_id -- 关联的营地名称 left join vis on vis.FRO_GRP_ID = a.GRP_ID --资料收取数 left join vis_fail on vis_fail.GRP_ID = a.GRP_ID --拒签数量 LEFT JOIN GRP_GYAP_DOC GYAP ON A.GRP_ID = GYAP.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN AIR_TICKET_PAYED ON A.grp_id = AIR_TICKET_PAYED.GID left join w_promotions on a.grp_id=w_promotions.grp_id -- 海报 left join PD_CONN pd on pd.REF_TABLE = 'GRP_MAIN.ENROLL' and pd.REF_ID = A.GRP_ID and pd.REF_UNID = '' and pd.CONN_STATUS = 'USED' left join PD_LIST pdlst on pd.PD_ID = pdlst.PD_ID left join contract on contract.GRP_ID = a.GRP_ID -- 代理合同 left join fit on a.GRP_ID = fit.GRP_ID -- 个人合同 left join ct on a.GRP_ID = ct.GRP_ID left join pax on a.GRP_ID = pax.GRP_ID -- 报名人数 -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET', 'GRP_QZ') left join has_air_visa av on a.GRP_ID = av.AV_GRP_ID -- 机票或签证团列表 -- ewa_test @only_my_fav_grp is null AND @CAMP_ADM_FAV is null AND @ONLY_CAMP_ADM_FAV is null left join WEB_FAV_MAIN wfm on wfm.REF_TAG = 'GRP-MAIN-MY-FAV' and wfm.REF_ID = a.grp_id and wfm.USR_ID = @G_ADM_ID -- ewa_test @only_my_fav_grp is not null inner join WEB_FAV_MAIN wfm on wfm.REF_TAG = 'GRP-MAIN-MY-FAV' and wfm.REF_ID = a.grp_id and wfm.USR_ID = @G_ADM_ID -- ewa_test @CAMP_ADM_FAV is not null and @ONLY_CAMP_ADM_FAV is null left join WEB_FAV_MAIN wfm on wfm.REF_TAG = 'GRP-MAIN-MY-FAV' and wfm.REF_ID = a.grp_id and wfm.USR_ID = @ADM_ID -- ewa_test @ONLY_CAMP_ADM_FAV is not null inner join WEB_FAV_MAIN wfm on wfm.REF_TAG = 'GRP-MAIN-MY-FAV' and wfm.REF_ID = a.grp_id and wfm.USR_ID = @ADM_ID -- ewa_test where A.grp_state = 'USED' and a.grp_pid is null -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is not null AND a.grp_id = @REF_GRP_ID -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null and (@VIEW_ACL is null or @VIEW_ACL = '') AND ( (A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE') OR C.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID ) -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null and @VIEW_ACL = 'DEPT' AND ( (A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE') OR C.ADM_ID IN (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) -- ewa_test @GRP_OR_ENQ ='ENQ' AND @EWA_RECYCLE is null and @REF_GRP_ID is null and @GRP_GYAP_REF_GRP_ID is null and (GRP_SDATE >= @EWA.DATE.STR or a.GRP_STA !='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' or a.CP_STATUS='COM_YES') -- ewa_test @EWA_RECYCLE = '1' and @REF_GRP_ID is null and @GRP_GYAP_REF_GRP_ID is null and a.GRP_STA ='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' and (a.CP_STATUS is null or a.CP_STATUS!='COM_YES') and (GRP_SDATE is null or GRP_SDATE < @EWA.DATE.STR) -- ewa_test @GRP_OR_ENQ = 'GRP' and A.grp_sta != 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' -- ewa_test @GRP_OR_ENQ = 'ENQ' and A.grp_sta = 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE is not null and @GRP_TYPE not in ('GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET', 'GRP_QZ') and (a.GRP_TYPE = @GRP_TYPE) -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET', 'GRP_QZ') and (av.AV_GRP_ID > 0 or a.GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET', 'GRP_QZ')) -- ewa_test @GRP_ENABLE_ENTRY = 'COM_YES' and a.GRP_ENABLE_ENTRY = 'COM_YES' -- ewa_test @GRP_GYAP_REF_GRP_ID is not null -- 复制的推广团 and GYAP.GRP_GYAP_REF_GRP_ID = @GRP_GYAP_REF_GRP_ID -- ewa_test ) A where 1=1 order by grp_id desc, sdt desc

Set.Name: 加载数据
Set.Sql: select D.GRP_ID , A.SUP_DOWN_ID , sm.SUP_NAME , A.COIN_ID , SUM(A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP * A.SUB_NUM ) PRICE , SUM(E.PAY_REAL) AS PAY_REAL from enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.ENQ_OP_ID = b.enq_op_id and b.SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' inner join enq_main c on b.ENQ_ID = c.ENQ_ID and c.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' inner join grp_main d on d.GRP_ID = c.GRP_ID AND D.GRP_STATE='USED' LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_BILL E ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = E.RELATE_SUP_ID and d.grp_id=e.GRP_ID inner join sup_main sm on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = sm.SUP_ID INNER JOIN SER_MAIN ser ON A.ser_id = ser.ser_id and ser.SER_TAG='SER_TAG_AIR' where d.grp_id in (@ids_split) AND D.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY D.grp_id, A.SUP_DOWN_ID, sm.SUP_NAME, A.COIN_ID

Set.Name: ExtendAction2 SQL
Set.Sql:
-- 备份20251219 -- EWA_SQL_SPLIT_NO SELECT TOP 1 BAS_TAG CURRENT_YEAR FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP='YEARS' AND BAS_TAG_PARA1='CURRENT' ORDER BY BAS_TAG DESC ;
with w_CONTACTS as ( SELECT B.CRM_COM_ID AS ID1, COUNT(*) AS CONTACTS FROM CRM_RECORD A INNER JOIN CRM_CUS B ON A.CRM_CUS_ID = B.CRM_CUS_ID WHERE A.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY B.CRM_COM_ID ), w_last_feedback as ( select CRM_COM_ID,max(CF_MDATE) LAST_CF_MDATE from CRM_FEEDBACK where CF_HIS='N' group by CRM_COM_ID ) -- ewa_test @AUS_TYPE is null , w_grp_types as ( select bas_tag from bas_tag where BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_TYPE' and BAS_TAG_PARA2='USED' and not BAS_TAG in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC') ), w_COOP_PLAN as ( SELECT A.SUP_DOWN_ID ID2, COUNT(*) COOP_PLAN FROM GRP_MAIN A WHERE GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' AND A.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND A.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) AND A.GRP_SDATE>@SYS_DATE GROUP BY A.SUP_DOWN_ID ),w_BOOKING as ( SELECT A.SUP_DOWN_ID ID2, SUM(isnull(b.PEOPLE_NUM,0)+isnull(b.HEAD_NUM,0)) BOOKING FROM GRP_MAIN A inner join ENQ_MAIN b on a.grp_id=b.grp_id and b.ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES' WHERE GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' AND A.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND A.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) AND A.GRP_SDATE>@SYS_DATE GROUP BY A.SUP_DOWN_ID ), w_QUERIES as( SELECT A.SUP_DOWN_ID ID2, COUNT(*) QUERIES FROM GRP_MAIN A WHERE GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' AND A.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND A.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) GROUP BY A.SUP_DOWN_ID ), w_ENQ_OPS as ( SELECT b.SUP_DOWN_ID ID3, COUNT(*) ENQ_OPS FROM ENQ_MAIN a inner join GRP_MAIN b on a.GRP_ID = b.GRP_ID and b.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' and a.ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES' AND B.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND B.GRP_PID IS NULL AND B.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND b.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) where FLOW_STATE in ('ENQ_STAR', 'ENQ_OP') GROUP BY b.SUP_DOWN_ID ), w_CUST_PROGRESSES as ( SELECT B.RELATE_SUP_ID ID5 , COUNT(*) AS BILL_GRPS -- 新团数量 , SUM(B.BILL_PEOPLE_NUM) AS CUST_PROGRESSES , SUM(B.BILL_RECEIVABLE) AS BILL_RECEIVABLE , SUM(B.BILL_RECEIVED) AS BILL_RECEIVED , SUM(B.BILL_EXIT_NUM) AS EXITS -- 退团人数 , SUM(B.BILL_EXIT_MONEY) AS BILL_EXIT_MONEY , SUM(B.BILL_DISCOUNT_NUM) AS DISCOUNTS -- 优惠人数 , SUM(B.BILL_DISCOUNT_MONEY) AS BILL_DISCOUNT_MONEY , SUM(B.BILL_EXCHANGE_OUT_NUM) AS CHANGES -- 转团人数 , SUM(B.BILL_EXCHANGE_IN_NUM) AS BILL_EXCHANGE_IN_NUM , SUM(B.BILL_REFUND_NUM) AS BILL_REFUND_NUM , SUM(B.BILL_REFUND_MONEY) AS BILL_REFUND_MONEY FROM GRP_MAIN A INNER JOIN GRP_BILL B ON A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' AND A.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND (A.CLAC_STATUS!='FINALLY_CLOSE' ) AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND A.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) GROUP BY B.RELATE_SUP_ID ), w_UN_BILL_GRPS as ( select count(1) UN_BILL_GRPS,A.SUP_DOWN_ID from GRP_MAIN A where A.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' AND A.GRP_STATE = 'USED' AND (A.CLAC_STATUS!='FINALLY_CLOSE' ) AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND A.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) AND not exists(select 1 from GRP_BILL x where a.GRP_ID=x.GRP_ID and a.SUP_DOWN_ID=x.RELATE_SUP_ID) group by A.SUP_DOWN_ID ), w_HISTORY as ( select c.RELATE_SUP_ID AS ID6 , sum(c.SETTL_INCOME) AS HIS_RECEIVED , sum(c.SETTL_MARGIN) AS HIS_PROFIT , sum(SETTL_NUM_TOTAL) AS CUST_HISTORIES , count(*) AS GRP_HISTORIES from GRP_MAIN a inner join GRP_SETTL b on a.GRP_SETTL_UNID = b.GRP_SETTL_UNID and a.GRP_ID = b.GRP_ID inner join GRP_SETTL_SALES c on b.GRP_SETTL_ID = c.GRP_SETTL_ID where a.CLAC_STATUS ='FINALLY_CLOSE' AND A.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID and a.GRP_STATE='USED' AND A.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) group by c.RELATE_SUP_ID ), w_ct as ( select COUNT(1) CONTRACTS,a.RELATE_SUP_ID from CURRENCY_FILE a inner join GRP_MAIN b on a.GRP_ID=b.GRP_ID where a.FILE_TYPE='PACT1' and b.GRP_STATE='USED' and PIC_PHY_PATH IS NOT NULL AND PIC_PHY_PATH != '' and STATE='USED' and a.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND b.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) group by a.RELATE_SUP_ID ), w_grps as ( select count(1) GRP_NUM,a.SUP_ID from sup_main a inner join grp_main b on b.GRP_TYPE in (select BAS_TAG from w_grp_types) and (a.sup_id=b.SUP_DOWN_ID or exists(select 1 from GRP_COSTUMER gc where a.sup_id=gc.RELATE_SUP_ID and b.grp_id=gc.GRP_ID and gc.COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' )) where b.sup_id=@G_SUP_ID group by a.SUP_ID ), w_promotions as ( select count(1) PROM_NUM ,SUP_DOWN_ID from grp_main where grp_type like 'GRP_TYPE_BMYX%' and GRP_STATE='USED' and sup_id=@G_SUP_ID group by SUP_DOWN_ID ), w_new_crm as ( select a.CRM_COM_ID,'New' NEW_CUSTOMER from crm_com a where aus_type='LEAD_WEBSITE' and USE_STATE='USED' and not exists(select 1 from CRM_FEEDBACK x where a.CRM_COM_ID=x.CRM_COM_ID) and not exists(select 1 from CRM_RECORD x inner join crm_cus y on x.CRM_CUS_ID = y.CRM_CUS_ID where a.CRM_COM_ID=y.CRM_COM_ID and x.ADM_ID=a.ADM_ID) ) -- ewa_test SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN cc.SUP_DOWN_ID IS NULL then 'CRM_COM_STAR_STATUS_A' else isnull(CRM_COM_STAR_STATUS,'CRM_COM_STAR_STATUS_B') end TAG , DEP_NAME , CRM_CONN_TAG , V.* , isnull(cc.sup_down_id,0) r_sup_id , CASE WHEN cc.SUP_DOWN_ID IS NULL THEN 'SIGN_NO' ELSE 'SIGN_YES' END SIGN , A0.ADM_NAME , CONTACTS.CONTACTS , case when cf.CF_ID is null then 'COM_NO' else 'COM_YES' end CF_NEED , cf.CF_YEAR , isnull(cf.CF_PROGRESS,0) CF_PROGRESS , LAST_CF_MDATE CF_MDATE , CC.ADM_ID SALE_ID , convert(date,V.CRM_COM_CDATE) FT_CRM_COM_CDATE , isnull(v.AUS_TAID,v.ADM_ID) CREATE_ADM_ID , c.CITY_NAME PROVINCE -- ewa_test @AUS_TYPE is null , COOP_PLAN.COOP_PLAN , BOOKING.BOOKING , QUERIES.QUERIES , ENQ_OPS.ENQ_OPS , CUST_PROGRESSES.* , isnull(CUST_PROGRESSES.BILL_GRPS,0)+isnull(UN_BILL_GRPS.UN_BILL_GRPS,0) GRP_PROGRESSES , BILL_RECEIVABLE - BILL_RECEIVED as BILL_UNPAY , HISTORY.* , ct.CONTRACTS , grps.GRP_NUM , w_promotions.PROM_NUM , w_new_crm.NEW_CUSTOMER -- ewa_test FROM CRM_COM V left join CRM_FEEDBACK cf on v.CRM_COM_ID=cf.CRM_COM_ID and cf.CF_HIS='N' and cf.CF_YEAR=@CURRENT_YEAR LEFT JOIN CRM_CONN CC ON V.CRM_COM_ID = CC.CRM_COM_ID AND CC.SUP_UP_ID = @G_SUP_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG = CRM_CONN_TAG LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A0 ON isnull(cc.ADM_ID,v.ADM_ID) = A0.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_DEPT A1 ON A1.DEP_ID = A0.ADM_DEP_ID left join city c on v.province_id=c.city_id LEFT JOIN w_contacts CONTACTS ON V.CRM_COM_ID = CONTACTS.ID1 left join w_last_feedback last_cf on v.CRM_COM_ID=last_cf.CRM_COM_ID -- ewa_test @AUS_TYPE is null LEFT JOIN w_COOP_PLAN COOP_PLAN ON CC.SUP_DOWN_ID = COOP_PLAN.ID2 -- 合作计划 LEFT JOIN w_BOOKING BOOKING ON CC.SUP_DOWN_ID = BOOKING.ID2 -- 预订人数 LEFT JOIN w_QUERIES QUERIES ON CC.SUP_DOWN_ID = QUERIES.ID2 -- 询价单 LEFT JOIN w_ENQ_OPS ENQ_OPS ON ENQ_OPS.ID3 = CC.SUP_DOWN_ID -- 报价列表 LEFT JOIN w_CUST_PROGRESSES CUST_PROGRESSES ON CUST_PROGRESSES.ID5 = CC.SUP_DOWN_ID left JOIN w_UN_BILL_GRPS UN_BILL_GRPS on UN_BILL_GRPS.SUP_DOWN_ID=cc.SUP_DOWN_ID LEFT JOIN w_HISTORY HISTORY ON HISTORY.ID6 = CC.SUP_DOWN_ID LEFT JOIN w_ct ct on cc.SUP_DOWN_ID=ct.RELATE_SUP_ID --团合同数量 left join w_grps grps on cc.SUP_DOWN_ID=grps.SUP_ID left join w_promotions on CC.SUP_DOWN_ID=w_promotions.SUP_DOWN_ID left join w_new_crm on v.CRM_COM_ID=w_new_crm.CRM_COM_ID -- ewa_test WHERE V.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID -- 2025-02-05 客户是客户，供应商是供应商（王总） and (cc.CRM_CONN_TAG is null or cc.CRM_CONN_TAG='SUP_TYPE_CUS' or cc.CRM_CONN_TAG= 'SUP_TYPE_ALL') -- ewa_test isnull(@CF_NEED,'') = '1' and LAST_CF_MDATE is not null -- ewa_test @AUS_TYPE is null AND ( V.ADM_ID=@G_ADM_ID OR @VIEW_ACL = 'ALL' OR @VIEW_ACL = 'DEPT' AND A0.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) and v.ADM_ID > 0 -- ewa_test @AUS_TYPE is not null and @AUS_TYPE!='' -- 自媒体客户 AND v.AUS_TYPE=@AUS_TYPE AND ((V.ADM_ID=@G_ADM_ID or V.AUS_TAID=@G_ADM_ID) -- 销售或自媒体客户填写人 or @VIEW_ACL = 'ALL' OR @VIEW_ACL = 'DEPT' AND (A0.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) or v.AUS_TAID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) -- ewa_test ) AS TE WHERE USE_STATE='USED' order by -- ewa_test @AUS_TYPE is null NEW_CUSTOMER DESC, -- ewa_test CRM_COM_ID DESC

Set.Name: getMasterContact SQL
Set.Sql:
select top 1 SUP_DOWN_ID,cc.CRM_COM_ID,CRM_COM_NAME from CRM_COM cc left join CRM_CONN cc2 on cc.CRM_COM_ID = cc2.CRM_COM_ID where (SUP_DOWN_ID = @SUP_DOWN_ID or SUP_DOWN_ID in (select SUP_DOWN_ID from grp_main where grp_id=@GRP_ID and SUP_ID =@G_SUP_ID and @SUP_DOWN_ID is null and @CRM_COM_ID is null) or cc.CRM_COM_ID=@CRM_COM_ID) ;
select top 1 a.CRM_CUS_ID,a.CRM_CUS_NAME,b.ADM_ID,b.ADM_LID ,case when ADM_PWD='D13149DE00848EB013CAD318D27829DB64B965D7' then 'a1234567' else '用户已修改' end DEFAULT_PWD from CRM_CUS a left join ADM_USER b on a.CRM_CUS_ID = b.CRM_CUS_ID where a.CRM_COM_ID=@CRM_COM_ID AND a.CRM_CUS_TAG!='CRM_CUS_LEAVE' ORDER BY a.CRM_CUS_MASTER DESC

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT sm.*, sd.ser_name AS st, au.adm_name, S.CITY_NAME, smt.bas_TAG_NAME AS SUP_MTAG_NAME, cc.CRM_COM_ID, CRM_CONN_ID, cc.CRM_CONN_CREATE_TIME, country.CITY_NAME COUNTRY_NAME FROM SUP_MAIN sm inner JOIN CRM_CONN CC ON CC.SUP_DOWN_ID = SM.SUP_ID AND CC.sup_UP_id = @g_sup_id LEFT JOIN CITY S ON SM.CITY_ID1 = S.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN city country ON s.COUNTRY_ID = country.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN bas_tag smt ON smt.bas_TAG = cc.CRM_CONN_TAG LEFT JOIN ser_main sd ON sd.sup_id = 3 AND sd.ser_TAG = sm.ser_tag1 LEFT JOIN adm_user au ON au.adm_id = cc.adm_id LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG bt ON sd.SER_TAG = bt.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG bt2 ON sm.SIGN_TAG = bt2.BAS_TAG WHERE ( CRM_CONN_TAG = 'SUP_TYPE_SUPPLY' OR CRM_CONN_TAG = 'SUP_TYPE_ALL' OR sm.sup_id = @g_sup_id ) -- ewa_test @sup_up_id is not null and not exists(select 1 from sup_sub x where x.sup_up_id=@sup_up_id and sm.sup_id=x.SUP_DOWN_ID and x.ser_id=@ser_id and x.OWN_SUP_ID=@g_sup_id) -- 排除已有服务商 -- ewa_test ) sl WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY SUP_ID DESC ;
-- ewa_table_name sers SELECT SER_ID,SER_NAME FROM ser_main where sup_id = 3 AND SER_OB3='USED' and ser_id!=1035 ORDER BY SER_ORD

Set.Name: addProviders sql
Set.Sql:
select top 1 b.SUP_NAME+'是供应商(SA)，不能再添加为服务商(SP)' EWA_ERR_OUT from sup_ser_conn a inner join sup_main b on a.sup_id = b.sup_id where a.sup_up_id=@g_sup_id and a.sup_id in (@IDS_SPLIT) and a.SSC_STATUS='USED' ;
insert into sup_sub(SUP_UP_ID, SUP_DOWN_ID, SER_ID, SS_TAG, SS_CDATE, ADM_ID, OWN_SUP_ID) select p.sup_up_id,a.sup_id,@ser_id,'服务商',getdate(),@g_adm_id, @g_sup_id from sup_main a inner join crm_conn b on a.sup_id=b.sup_down_id and b.sup_up_id=@g_sup_id ,(select SUP_ID SUP_UP_ID from SUP_MAIN where SUP_ID=@SUP_UP_ID union select -1 SUP_UP_ID ) p where a.sup_id in (@IDS_SPLIT) and not exists(select 1 from sup_sub x where a.sup_id=x.sup_down_id and x.sup_up_id=p.sup_up_id and x.ser_id=@ser_id and x.OWN_SUP_ID=@g_sup_id) ;

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
OnPageLoad service SQL
Set.Sql:
WITH w_sers AS ( SELECT sc.SUP_ID, count(*) AS services FROM SER_CONN sc WHERE sc.OWN_SUP_ID = @g_sup_id AND ser_conn_state = 'USED' AND SER_CONN_VER = '2026' -- ewa_test @ser_id > 0 AND sc.ser_id = @ser_id -- ewa_test GROUP BY sc.SUP_ID UNION -- UNION 本身就会去重 SELECT SUP_ID, NULL FROM sup_ser_conn sc -- 新版服务和供应商关联标 WHERE 1 = 1 -- ewa_test @ser_id > 0 AND sc.ser_id = @ser_id -- ewa_test AND NOT sup_id IN ( SELECT sc.SUP_ID FROM SER_CONN sc WHERE sc.OWN_SUP_ID = @g_sup_id AND ser_conn_state = 'USED' AND SER_CONN_VER = '2026' -- ewa_test @ser_id > 0 AND sc.ser_id = @ser_id -- ewa_test ) ), ser AS ( SELECT DISTINCT SUP_ID FROM ser_conn a WHERE a.ser_key0 = @ser_key_id OR a.ser_key1 = @ser_key_id ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT sm.*, sd.ser_name AS st, au.adm_name, S.CITY_NAME, smt.bas_TAG_NAME AS SUP_MTAG_NAME, cc.CRM_COM_ID, CRM_CONN_ID, cc.CRM_CONN_CREATE_TIME, country.CITY_NAME COUNTRY_NAME, sers.services FROM SUP_MAIN sm LEFT JOIN w_sers sers ON sm.SUP_ID = sers.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN CRM_CONN CC ON CC.SUP_DOWN_ID = SM.SUP_ID AND CC.sup_UP_id = @g_sup_id LEFT JOIN CITY S ON SM.CITY_ID1 = S.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN city country ON s.COUNTRY_ID = country.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN bas_tag smt ON smt.bas_TAG = cc.CRM_CONN_TAG LEFT JOIN ser_main sd ON sd.sup_id = 3 AND sd.ser_TAG = sm.ser_tag1 LEFT JOIN adm_user au ON au.adm_id = cc.adm_id LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG bt ON sd.SER_TAG = bt.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG bt2 ON sm.SIGN_TAG = bt2.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN SUP_INBOUND inbound ON sm.sup_id = inbound.sup_id -- ewa_test @sup_UP_id > 0 -- sup_UP_id 拥有的服务商id INNER JOIN sup_sub ss ON ss.SUP_DOWN_ID = sm.sup_id -- 服务商 AND ss.sup_UP_id = @sup_UP_id AND (ss.ser_id = @ser_id or @ser_id is null) -- ewa_test @ser_key_id > 0 LEFT JOIN ser ON sm.sup_id = ser.SUP_ID -- ewa_test WHERE 1 = 1 -- ewa_test @sup_UP_id is null AND ( CRM_CONN_TAG = 'SUP_TYPE_SUPPLY' OR CRM_CONN_TAG = 'SUP_TYPE_ALL' OR sm.sup_id = @g_sup_id ) -- ewa_test @IN_GRP_CARD is NOT NULL AND sm.sup_id IN (@SUP_ID_SPLIT) -- ewa_test @ser_id > 0 and @sup_UP_id is null AND sers.sup_id > 0 -- ewa_test @ser_key_id > 0 AND (ser.SUP_ID > 0) -- ewa_test @show_tag = 'inbound' AND ( @show_tag = 'inbound' AND inbound.SUP_ID > 0 ) -- ewa_test @COMP_SINGLE='COMP' AND sers.sup_id > 1 -- ewa_test @COMP_SINGLE='SINGLE' AND ( sers.sup_id < 1 OR sers IS NULL ) -- ewa_test ) sl WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY services DESC, SUP_ID DESC; -- ewa_table_name ser_main SELECT SER_ID, SER_NAME, SER_NAME_EN from ser_main where ser_ob3 ='USED' and ser_id !=1035 order by SER_ORD;
-- ewa_table_name ser_tag SELECT SER_TAG, SER_TAG_ID, SER_TAG_NAME, SER_TAG_NAME_EN FROM ser_tag WHERE ser_id = @ser_id AND ser_tag_status = 'USED' AND ser_tag LIKE 'TAG0' ORDER BY ser_tag_ord;

20250126，项目信息里没有佣金项了，隐藏之
精简下，代理合作系统中
设置营地老师关注的团
客户先隐藏这几项吧，空着不好看
OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: -- ewa_test @VIEW_ACL is null -- EWA_SQL_SPLIT_NO -- 允许查看全部团组 select top 1 'ALL' VIEW_ACL from adm_menu am inner join ADM_ACL_MNU aam on am.MNU_ID = aam.MNU_ID inner join ADM_MENU_SUPPLY ams on am.MNU_ID = ams.MNU_ID and aam.SUP_ID=ams.SUP_ID where ams.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID and aam.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID and am.MNU_TAG = 'VIEW_ALL_GROUP' -- ewa_test ; with -- ewa_test @ser_id is not null enq_jny_with_ser_id as ( select distinct b.grp_id from enq_jny_ser_sub a inner join enq_jny b on a.enq_jny_id = b.enq_jny_id and a.ser_id = @ser_id ), enq_op_with_ser_id as ( select distinct a.FRO_GRP_ID grp_id from enq_op_main a inner join enq_op_main_sub b on a.enq_op_id = b.enq_op_id and b.ser_id = @ser_id and a.ENQ_OP_STATE ='USED' ), -- ewa_test -- ewa_block_test @in_camp is not null -- 筛选已经入营的团 w_in_camp as ( select distinct cgc.GRP_ID from CAMP_GRP_CONN cgc where cgc.STATE = 'USED' -- ewa_test @camp_id is not null and camp_id=@camp_id -- ewa_test ), -- ewa_block_test @GRP_TYPE='GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET' or @GRP_TYPE='GRP_QZ' -- 机票和签证 has_air_visa AS ( SELECT distinct a.GRP_ID AV_GRP_ID from v_grp_main a inner join ENQ_JNY ej on a.ENQ_ID = ej.ENQ_ID inner join ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB ejs on ej.ENQ_JNY_ID = ejs.ENQ_JNY_ID where 1 = 1 -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE='GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET' and ejs.SER_ID = 1 -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE='GRP_QZ' and ejs.SER_ID = 5 and GRP_VISA !='' -- ewa_test ) , -- ewa_block_test @view_tag is null or @view_tag != 'IG' -- 报价团 Quoting Group QG 需要主动报价的团 -- 预定团 Reserved Group RG 需要预留位置的团 -- 团列表 Operating Group OG 签约后操作中的团 enable_view_grps as ( select distinct grp_id from ( select a.grp_id, 'GRP_MAIN' as G_TAG from grp_main a -- ewa_test @ser_id is not null inner join enq_jny_with_ser_id sid on a.grp_id = sid.grp_id -- ewa_test @in_camp is not null inner join w_in_camp on a.grp_id = w_in_camp.grp_id -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE='GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET' or @GRP_TYPE='GRP_QZ' inner join has_air_visa on a.grp_id=has_air_visa.AV_GRP_ID -- ewa_test inner join ( select grp_id from grp_main where grp_id > 0 and SUP_ID = @g_sup_id UNION -- 单团 select grp_id from grp_main where grp_id > 0 and SUP_DOWN_ID = @g_sup_id -- ewa_test @G_SUP_ID != '3' UNION -- 散拼图 select gm.grp_id from grp_main gm inner join (select distinct sd.GRP_ID from SHARE_DATA sd where SD_REF = 'GRP_GYAP_DOC_PUBLISH.PUB_SUP_ID' and sd.SD_DATA = @G_SUP_ID) sd on gm.grp_id=sd.grp_id where gm.grp_id > 0 and SUP_ID = 3 and GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE' -- ewa_test ) b on a.grp_id = b.grp_id AND isnull(GRP_REF_TABLE,'') != 'ENQ_OP_BATCH_ORDER' -- 排除老版本自动创建的团 -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is not null AND a.GRP_ID = @REF_GRP_ID -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null AND @GRP_OR_ENQ = 'ENQ' AND grp_sta = 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null AND @GRP_OR_ENQ ='ENQ' AND @EWA_RECYCLE is null and (GRP_SDATE >= @EWA.DATE.STR ) -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null AND @GRP_OR_ENQ ='ENQ' and @EWA_RECYCLE = '1' and (GRP_SDATE is null or GRP_SDATE < @EWA.DATE.STR) -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null AND @GRP_OR_ENQ = 'GRP' AND grp_sta != 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' -- ewa_test @view_tag = 'RG' and a.CP_STATUS='COM_YES' -- ewa_test UNION -- 需要报价的询价单（例如：分公司） select a.grp_id, 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' as G_TAG from ENQ_OP_MAIN eom inner join grp_main a on eom.fro_grp_id = a.grp_id -- ewa_test @ser_id is not null inner join enq_op_with_ser_id sid on a.grp_id = sid.grp_id -- ewa_test @in_camp is not null inner join w_in_camp on a.grp_id = w_in_camp.grp_id -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE='GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET' or @GRP_TYPE='GRP_QZ' inner join has_air_visa on a.grp_id=has_air_visa.AV_GRP_ID -- ewa_test where eom.SUP_ID = @g_sup_id AND eom.ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED' AND isnull(GRP_REF_TABLE,'') != 'ENQ_OP_BATCH_ORDER' -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is not null and a.grp_id = @REF_GRP_ID -- ewa_test @GRP_OR_ENQ = 'ENQ' AND isnull(CONFIRM_NO, '') = '' -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null AND @GRP_OR_ENQ ='ENQ' AND @EWA_RECYCLE is null and (GRP_SDATE >= @EWA.DATE.STR ) -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null AND @GRP_OR_ENQ ='ENQ' and @EWA_RECYCLE = '1' and (GRP_SDATE is null or GRP_SDATE < @EWA.DATE.STR) -- ewa_test @GRP_OR_ENQ = 'GRP' AND isnull(CONFIRM_NO, '') != '' -- ewa_test @view_tag = 'RG' and a.CP_STATUS='COM_YES' -- ewa_test ) aa ), -- ewa_block_test @view_tag = 'IG' -- 询价团 Inquiring Group IG 等待报价结果的团 enable_view_grps_ig as ( -- 发起的询价 select a.fro_grp_id as grp_id, SUP_ID, 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' as G_TAG from ENQ_OP_MAIN A -- ewa_test @ser_id is not null inner join enq_op_with_ser_id sid on a.fro_grp_id = sid.grp_id -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE='GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET' or @GRP_TYPE='GRP_QZ' inner join has_air_visa on a.fro_grp_id=has_air_visa.AV_GRP_ID -- ewa_test WHERE a.SUP_ID != own_sup_id and a.own_sup_id = @g_sup_id UNION -- 客户的单团 select a.grp_id, SUP_DOWN_ID, 'GRP_MAIN' as G_TAG from grp_main a -- ewa_test @ser_id is not null inner join enq_jny_with_ser_id sid on a.grp_id = sid.grp_id -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE='GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET' or @GRP_TYPE='GRP_QZ' inner join has_air_visa on a.grp_id=has_air_visa.AV_GRP_ID -- ewa_test where a.grp_id > 0 and a.SUP_DOWN_ID = @g_sup_id and a.SUP_ID != SUP_DOWN_ID -- 排除路嘉自己散拼团 UNION -- 客户报名的散拼 select a.grp_id, a.RELATE_SUP_ID, 'GRP_MAIN' as G_TAG from GRP_COSTUMER a -- ewa_test @ser_id is not null inner join enq_jny_with_ser_id sid on a.grp_id = sid.grp_id -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE='GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET' or @GRP_TYPE='GRP_QZ' inner join has_air_visa on a.grp_id=has_air_visa.AV_GRP_ID -- ewa_test where a.grp_id > 0 and a.RELATE_SUP_ID = @g_sup_id -- 客户报名的散拼 ), -- ewa_block_test valid_grp_types as ( select bas_tag, bas_tag_name from bas_tag WHERE bas_tag_grp='GRP_TYPE' and not BAS_TAG in ( select 'GRP_TYPE_CAMP_LESSON' as BAS_TAG -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null UNION select bas_tag from bas_tag WHERE bas_tag_grp = 'GRP_TYPE' and bas_tag_para2 = 'HIDE' -- ewa_test ) -- ewa_test @FILTER = 'SALES' and @REF_GRP_ID is null and bas_tag_para2 = 'USED' AND (BAS_TAG_PARA3 = 'AGENT' or bas_tag='GRP_CB' or bas_tag='GRP_ZC') -- ewa_test ), contract as ( -- 代理合同 select count(1) CONTRACT_NUM, GRP_ID from CURRENCY_FILE WHERE file_type='PACT1' AND REF_TYPE='GRP_MAIN' and state='USED' and CONTRACT_VALID='COM_YES' and SUP_ID = @g_sup_id group by GRP_ID ), ct as ( select count(1) COS_NUM, gc.GRP_ID from GRP_COSTUMER gc left join CURRENCY_FILE cf on gc.RELATE_SUP_ID=cf.RELATE_SUP_ID and cf.GRP_ID = gc.GRP_ID and cf.FILE_TYPE = 'PACT1' and cf.REF_TYPE = 'GRP_MAIN' and cf.state = 'USED' and cf.CONTRACT_VALID = 'COM_YES' and cf.tag = 1 where gc.COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' and gc.RELATE_SUP_ID != gc.SUP_ID and cf.CURRENCY_ID is null group by gc.GRP_ID ), pax as ( -- 报名人数 select count(1) PAX_NUM, GRP_ID from GRP_COSTUMER gc where gc.COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' group by gc.GRP_ID ) , vis_fail as ( --拒签数量 select count(1) VIS_FAIL_NUM,GRP_ID from grp_costumer a where VIS_STATUS='VIS_CRE_FAIL' AND COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY GRP_ID ), fit as ( SELECT gc.GRP_ID,count(1) FIT_NO_CONTRACT from GRP_COSTUMER gc left join CURRENCY_FILE cf on gc.GRP_COS_ID = cf.REF_ID and gc.GRP_ID=cf.GRP_ID and cf.REF_TYPE = 'GRP_COSTUMER' and cf.FILE_TYPE ='PACT1' and cf.state='USED' and cf.tag=1 and cf.CONTRACT_VALID ='COM_YES' where gc.FIT='COM_YES' and gc.COS_STATUS ='COS_NEW' and cf.CURRENCY_ID is null group by gc.GRP_ID ), w_promotions as ( select B.GRP_ID,COUNT(1) PROM_NUM from v_grp_group A INNER JOIN GRP_MAIN B ON A.SLAVE_GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID where GRP_GROUP_STATE = 'USED' and GRP_GROUP_TYPE like 'GRP_TYPE_BMYX%' group by B.GRP_ID ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT -- 当团的创建商户=当前商户，客户名称，否则为创建商户名称 case when a.sup_id = @g_sup_id then SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME else create_sup.SUP_NAME end as SUP_NAME , a.GRP_ID , GRP_HY_CODE , a.GRP_NAME , a.GRP_TYPE , a.CLAC_STATUS , a.GRP_RUN_MODEL , a.CP_AIR_TICKET , a.GRP_VISA , kk1.ENQ_ID , case when A.grp_sta = 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' then kk1.FLOW_STATE else '' end FLOW_STATE , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG = 'enus' then FCITY.CITY_NAME_EN else FCITY.CITY_NAME end FCITY , kk1.ENQ_ALL QUOTED_PRICE , c.adm_name , isnull(pax.PAX_NUM,0) PAX , isnull(S.STUDENTS,0) STUDENTS , isnull(S.LEADERS,0) LEADERS , kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM PPNUM , kk1.HEAD_NUM , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(pax.PAX_NUM,0) diff , case when kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(pax.PAX_NUM, 0) = 0 then '一致' when kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(pax.PAX_NUM, 0) > 0 then '少人' when kk1.HEAD_NUM + kk1.PEOPLE_NUM - isnull(pax.PAX_NUM, 0) < 0 then '多人' end as isok , s.IN_PLAN BILL_RECEIVABLE , s.IN_REAL BILL_RECEIVED , s.COST PAY_PLAN , s.PAY_REAL , s.PB PROFIT_CURRENT , s.WZF , s.UNBUY , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then COUNTRY.CITY_NAME_EN else COUNTRY.CITY_NAME end COUNTRY_NAME , case when @SYS_EWA_LANG='enus' then es.CITYS_EN else es.CITYS end CITYS , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , kk1.ENQ_CREATE_TIME , isnull(es.START_DATE,a.GRP_SDATE) SDT , es.END_DATE DT , es.DAYS , isnull('拒签 '+cast(vis_fail.VIS_FAIL_NUM as varchar(10)),'') VISA_RESULTS , CASE WHEN GRP_GYAP_ID IS NULL THEN 'COM_NO' ELSE 'COM_YES' END GRP_GYAP_DOC , GYAP.GRP_GYAP_ID , GYAP.GRP_GYAP_UNID , a.GRP_UNID , a.GRP_CODE , a.grp_sta , case when A.grp_sta = 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' then '询价团' when a.GRP_RUN_MODEL='GRP_RUN_COMBINE' then '散拼团' else '单团' end PROJECT_TYPE , a.SUP_DOWN_ID , a.GRP_GUIDE_PRICE , GYAP.GRP_GYAP_TYPE , a.GRP_ENABLE_ENTRY , pd.CONN_ID , pdlst.PD_NAME , pdlst.PD_ID , GYAP.GRP_GYAP_PUB , case when a.SUP_DOWN_ID != @g_sup_id and contract.CONTRACT_NUM>0 then 'COM_YES' when a.SUP_DOWN_ID = @g_sup_id and ct.COS_NUM is null and fit.FIT_NO_CONTRACT is null then 'COM_YES' else 'COM_NO' end GRP_CONTRACT_VALID , FAV_ID , wfm.REF_TAG , A.GRP_HOT , w_promotions.PROM_NUM , pub.PUB_ORD , pub.PUB_STATUS FROM GRP_MAIN a INNER join enq_main kk1 on kk1.GRP_ID = a.GRP_ID and ( (a.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' and kk1.ENQ_SELECT_STATE = 'CHECKED_TRUE') or (a.GRP_STA != 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' and kk1.ENQ_DEFAULT = 'COM_YES') ) inner join valid_grp_types on a.GRP_TYPE = valid_grp_types.bas_tag -- 共享团数据 -- ewa_test @view_tag is null or @view_tag != 'IG' inner JOIN enable_view_grps on a.grp_id = enable_view_grps.grp_id LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID -- ewa_test @view_tag = 'IG' inner JOIN enable_view_grps_ig IG on a.grp_id = IG.grp_id LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON IG.SUP_ID = SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID -- ewa_test left join sup_main create_sup on a.SUP_ID = create_sup.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN CITY FCITY ON KK1.F_CITY = FCITY.CITY_ID left join GRP_FIN_SUMMARY s on a.GRP_ID = s.GRP_ID and s.sup_id = @g_sup_id left join ENQ_FIN_SUMMARY es on kk1.ENQ_ID = es.ENQ_ID left join adm_user c on a.adm_id = c.adm_id left join CITY COUNTRY on es.DEST_MAIN_COUNTRY_ID = COUNTRY.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID = A2.ADM_ID left join vis_fail on vis_fail.GRP_ID = a.GRP_ID --拒签数量 LEFT JOIN GRP_GYAP_DOC GYAP ON A.GRP_ID = GYAP.GRP_ID left join GRP_GYAP_DOC_PUBLISH pub on GYAP.grp_gyap_id=pub.pub_grp_gyap_id and pub.pub_sup_id=@g_sup_id and pub.PUB_STATUS='USED' left join w_promotions on a.grp_id=w_promotions.grp_id -- 海报 left join PD_CONN pd on pd.REF_TABLE = 'GRP_MAIN.ENROLL' and pd.REF_ID = A.GRP_ID and pd.REF_UNID = '' and pd.CONN_STATUS = 'USED' left join PD_LIST pdlst on pd.PD_ID = pdlst.PD_ID left join contract on contract.GRP_ID = a.GRP_ID -- 代理合同 left join fit on a.GRP_ID = fit.GRP_ID -- 个人合同 left join ct on a.GRP_ID = ct.GRP_ID left join pax on a.GRP_ID = pax.GRP_ID -- 报名人数 left join WEB_FAV_MAIN wfm on wfm.REF_TAG = 'GRP-MAIN-MY-FAV' and wfm.REF_ID = a.grp_id and wfm.USR_ID = @G_ADM_ID where A.grp_state = 'USED' and a.grp_pid is null -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null and (@VIEW_ACL is null or (@VIEW_ACL != 'DEPT' and @VIEW_ACL != 'ALL')) AND ( (A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE') OR C.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID ) -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null and @VIEW_ACL = 'DEPT' AND ( (A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE') OR C.ADM_ID IN (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) -- ewa_test @GRP_ENABLE_ENTRY = 'COM_YES' and a.GRP_ENABLE_ENTRY = 'COM_YES' -- ewa_test @GRP_GYAP_REF_GRP_ID is not null -- 复制的推广团 and GYAP.GRP_GYAP_REF_GRP_ID = @GRP_GYAP_REF_GRP_ID -- ewa_test ) A where 1=1 order by grp_id desc, sdt desc

Set.Name: OnFrameDelete SQL
Set.Sql: update GRP_MAIN set grp_state='DEL' WHERE GRP_ID = @GRP_ID

Set.Name: ExtendAction0 SQL
Set.Sql: update grp_main set grp_sta=@EWA_WF_NEXT where grp_id=@grp_id and sup_id=@g_sup_id

Set.Name: ExtendAction1 SQL
Set.Sql: with valid_grp_types as ( select bas_tag, bas_tag_name from bas_tag WHERE bas_tag_grp='GRP_TYPE' and not BAS_TAG in ( select 'GRP_TYPE_CAMP_LESSON' as BAS_TAG -- ewa_test @REF_GRP_ID is null UNION select bas_tag from bas_tag WHERE bas_tag_grp = 'GRP_TYPE' and bas_tag_para2 = 'HIDE' -- ewa_test @GRP_TYPE is null UNION select bas_tag from bas_tag WHERE bas_tag_grp = 'GRP_TYPE' and bas_tag_para5 = 'TYPE_LIST' -- ewa_test ) -- ewa_test @FILTER = 'SALES' and @REF_GRP_ID is null and bas_tag_para2 = 'USED' AND (BAS_TAG_PARA3 = 'AGENT' or bas_tag='GRP_CB' or bas_tag='GRP_ZC') -- ewa_test ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.allprice , b.profit1 , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , (HEAD_NUM + PEOPLE_NUM) as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< dt then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(dt,grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID)AS PT , case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem , isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , GOPEN.GRP_OPEN_TIME , GOPEN.GRP_OPEN_STATE , s.UNIT_PRICE QUOTED_PRICE , s.IN_PLAN BILL_RECEIVABLE , s.IN_REAL BILL_RECEIVED , s.COST PAY_PLAN , s.PAY_REAL , s.PB PROFIT_CURRENT , s.START_DATE SDT , s.END_DATE DT , s.DAYS , S.WZF , S.UNBUY , vis.VISA_MATERIAL , isnull('拒签 '+ cast(vis_fail.VIS_FAIL_NUM as varchar(10)),'') VISA_RESULTS , GVT.BAS_TAG AS GRP_VISIT FROM GRP_MAIN a inner join enq_main kk1 on kk1.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID and ((a.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' and kk1.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE') or (a.GRP_STA!='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' and kk1.ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES')) inner join valid_grp_types gt on a.GRP_TYPE=gt.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON kk1.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on kk1.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( select count(g.cos_id) nums,g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId = a.grp_id left join (select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm )as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join (select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG = A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GOPEN ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID = GOPEN.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID left join GRP_FIN_SUMMARY s on a.GRP_ID=s.GRP_ID left join ( --资料收取数 SELECT COUNT(*) VISA_MATERIAL,C.FRO_GRP_ID FROM VIS_REQ_FILE A INNER JOIN VIS_TAB_MAIN C ON A.VIS_ID=C.VIS_ID INNER JOIN GRP_COSTUMER D ON C.FRO_GRP_ID=D.GRP_ID AND C.USR_ID=D.COS_ID AND D.COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY C.FRO_GRP_ID ) vis on vis.FRO_GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID left join( --拒签数量 select count(1) VIS_FAIL_NUM,GRP_ID from grp_costumer a where VIS_STATUS='VIS_CRE_FAIL' AND COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY GRP_ID ) vis_fail on vis_fail.GRP_ID=a.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG GTP ON GTP.BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_TYPE' AND A.GRP_TYPE=GTP.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG GVT ON GVT.BAS_TAG_GRP='GRP_VISIT' AND GVT.BAS_TAG=GTP.BAS_TAG_PARA6 inner JOIN ( select a.sd_ref_id from ( select distinct sd_ref_id from SHARE_DATA WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' and sd_data = @SUP_DOWN_ID ) a inner join ( select distinct sd_ref_id from SHARE_DATA WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' and sd_data = @G_SUP_ID ) b on a.sd_ref_id = b.sd_ref_id ) SHARE_DATA on a.grp_id = SHARE_DATA.sd_ref_id ) A WHERE grp_state = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL and (a.grp_id = @REF_GRP_ID or @REF_GRP_ID is null) -- ewa_test @GRP_OR_ENQ = 'GRP' and A.grp_sta != 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' -- ewa_test @GRP_OR_ENQ = 'ENQ' and A.grp_sta = 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' -- ewa_test @GRP_CP is not null and a.CP_STATUS='COM_YES' -- ewa_test @GRP_CLOSED is not null and a.CLAC_STATUS='FINALLY_CLOSE' -- ewa_test order by grp_id desc

Set.Name: ExtendAction2 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT *,nums1-nums as diff FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.allprice , b.profit1 , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , (HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< DT then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(DT, grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID) AS PT , case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem , isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_STATE FROM v_GRP_MAIN a INNER JOIN ( -- 出发和回来日期 SELECT ENQ_ID, min(enq_jny_date) as SDT, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY where SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 报价 SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团备注 select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm ) as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id ) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG=A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GO ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID=GO.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 单团 INNER JOIN crm_conn c on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) UNION SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 散拼 INNER join ( select grp_id, a.relate_sup_id, count(*) as STUDENTS from grp_costumer a GROUP BY A.GRP_ID, relate_sup_id ) d on a.grp_id = d.grp_id INNER JOIN crm_conn c on D.relate_sup_id = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) ) SALES ON A.GRP_ID = SALES.GRP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND ( A.grp_type = @grp_type OR (@grp_type is null and not A.grp_type in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC')) ) AND (A.GRP_OPEN_ID >0 OR A.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') AND (@DT_START IS NULL OR SDT >= @DT_START) AND (@DT_END IS NULL OR SDT <= @DT_END) AND ( @T=12 OR @T = 10 AND SALES.GRP_ID > 0 ) ) A WHERE 1=1 order by a.grp_id desc

Set.Name: NEW_MENU_2019_SALES SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT *,nums1-nums as diff FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.allprice , b.profit1 , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , (HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when getdate()>GRP_SDATE AND getdate()< DT then 'GRP_GO' when getdate()>isnull(DT, grp_sdate) then 'GRP_BACK' ELSE 'GRP_READY' END AS GRP_GO , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , DBO.F_GET_INCOME_PT(A.GRP_ID) AS PT , case when rem is null then '0/0' else rem end as rem , isnull(spnum ,0)as spnum , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , B1.BAS_TAG_NAME AS DESTINE , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_TIME , GO.GRP_OPEN_STATE FROM v_GRP_MAIN a left JOIN ( -- 出发和回来日期 SELECT ENQ_ID, min(enq_jny_date) as SDT, max(enq_jny_date) DT FROM ENQ_JNY where SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 报价 SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(num*sig_price) as allprice, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS = 'COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团备注 select grp_id,cast(f as varchar)+'/'+cast((f+i) as varchar ) as rem from ( select grp_id,sum(f) f,sum(i) i from ( select grp_id,case when MEMO_STATE='memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as f, case when MEMO_STATE<>'memo_finish' then count(grp_id) else 0 end as i from GRP_MEMO group by grp_id,MEMO_STATE ) as lk group by grp_id )as jm ) as jk on jk.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( select grp_id,count(grp_id)as spnum from sp_event a inner join sp_event_conn b on a.sp_event_id=b.sp_event_id where sup_id=@g_sup_id group by grp_id ) sp on a.grp_id =sp.grp_id LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG=A.DESTINE_STATE LEFT JOIN GRP_OPEN GO ON A.GRP_OPEN_ID=GO.GRP_OPEN_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 单团 INNER JOIN crm_conn c on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) UNION SELECT A.GRP_ID FROM GRP_MAIN A -- 散拼 INNER join ( select grp_id, a.relate_sup_id, count(*) as STUDENTS from grp_costumer a GROUP BY A.GRP_ID, relate_sup_id ) d on a.grp_id = d.grp_id INNER JOIN crm_conn c on D.relate_sup_id = c.SUP_DOWN_ID and c.SUP_UP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN adm_user ADM on ADM.adm_id = c.adm_id LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON ADM.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_COMBINE' AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( adm.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR adm.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (adm.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR adm.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP=@G_ADM_ID) ) ) SALES ON A.GRP_ID = SALES.GRP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND (A.OP_ID = @OP_ID or (A.OP_ID is null and @OP_ID = 0) or @OP_ID is null) AND ( A.grp_type = @grp_type OR (@grp_type is null and not A.grp_type in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC')) ) AND (A.GRP_OPEN_ID >0 OR A.GRP_STA = 'SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') AND (@DT_START IS NULL OR grp_sdate >= @DT_START) AND (@DT_END IS NULL OR grp_sdate <= @DT_END) AND ( @T=12 OR @T = 10 AND SALES.GRP_ID > 0 ) ) A WHERE 1=1 order by a.grp_id desc

Set.Name: Old-OnPageLoad Sql
Set.Sql: --旧的onpageload,2019-08-24备份; SELECT *,nums1-nums as diff FROM ( SELECT SUP_MAIN.SUP_NAME , a.* , b.QUOTED_PRICE , c.adm_name , isnull(d.nums,0) as nums , kk1.head_num , kk1.PEOPLE_NUM , (HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM)as nums1 , case when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 then '一致' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 then'少人' when HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 then'多人' end as isok , INCOME.* , PAYMENT.* , isnull(INCOME.BILL_RECEIVED,0) - isnull(PAYMENT.PAY_REAL,0) as PROFIT_CURRENT , COUNTRY.COUNTRY_NAME , A2.ADM_NAME AS OP_NAME , ENQ_CREATE_TIME , dd.SDT , dd.DT , DD.DAYS FROM v_GRP_MAIN a LEFT JOIN ( -- 出发和回来日期 SELECT ENQ_ID, min(enq_jny_date) as SDT, max(enq_jny_date) DT, MAX(ENQ_JNY_DAY) DAYS FROM ENQ_JNY where SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) DD ON A.ENQ_ID=DD.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( -- 报价 SELECT ENQ_ID, sum(sig_r_price) as QUOTED_PRICE from ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join adm_user c on a.adm_id=c.adm_id left join ( -- 已经报名数量 select count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id as grpId from grp_costumer g where COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' group by g.grp_id ) d on d.grpId=a.grp_id left join ( -- 团客人和领队数量 select grp_id,head_num ,PEOPLE_NUM, ENQ_CREATE_TIME from enq_main where enq_select_state='CHECKED_TRUE' ) kk1 on kk1.grp_id=a.grp_id left join ( -- 应收、已收 SELECT GRP_ID ID0, SUM(BILL_RECEIVABLE) BILL_RECEIVABLE, SUM(BILL_RECEIVED) AS BILL_RECEIVED FROM GRP_BILL GROUP BY GRP_ID ) as INCOME on INCOME.ID0 = a.grp_id left join ( -- 支付 select GRP_ID ID1 , sum(PAY_PLAN) AS PAY_PLAN , sum(PAY_REAL) AS PAY_REAL , sum(PAY_UN) AS PAY_UN FROM GRP_PAY_BILL GROUP BY GRP_ID ) AS PAYMENT ON PAYMENT.ID1 = A.grp_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 国家 SELECT ENQ_ID AS ID2, CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN b.CITY_NAME_EN else b.CITY_NAME end AS COUNTRY_NAME FROM ( select enq_id, right( CONVERT(varchar, max( CONVERT(bigint, aa) * 1000000000 + country_id )),9) *1 AS COU_ID from ( select ENQ_ID, b.COUNTRY_ID, count(*) aa from ENQ_CACHE_CITYS a inner join city b on a.CITY_ID = b.CITY_ID group by ENQ_ID, b.COUNTRY_ID ) as d group by enq_id ) A inner join city b on a.COU_ID = b.CITY_ID ) AS COUNTRY ON A.ENQ_ID = COUNTRY.ID2 LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A2 ON A.OP_ID=A2.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP_MAIN.SUP_ID where a.sup_id = @g_sup_id AND A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.grp_sta <> 'SCM_GRP_STA_NEW' and a.grp_pid is null ) A where 1=1 order by sdt desc, a.grp_id desc

Set.Name: 加载数据
Set.Sql: select D.GRP_ID , A.SUP_DOWN_ID , sm.SUP_NAME , A.COIN_ID , SUM(A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP * A.SUB_NUM ) PRICE , SUM(E.PAY_REAL) AS PAY_REAL from enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.ENQ_OP_ID = b.enq_op_id and b.SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' inner join enq_main c on b.ENQ_ID = c.ENQ_ID and c.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' inner join grp_main d on d.GRP_ID = c.GRP_ID AND D.GRP_STATE='USED' LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_BILL E ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = E.RELATE_SUP_ID and d.grp_id=e.GRP_ID inner join sup_main sm on a.SUP_DOWN_ID = sm.SUP_ID INNER JOIN SER_MAIN ser ON A.ser_id = ser.ser_id and ser.SER_TAG='SER_TAG_AIR' where d.grp_id in (@ids_split) AND D.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY D.grp_id, A.SUP_DOWN_ID, sm.SUP_NAME, A.COIN_ID

Set.Name: 餐食服务显示菜单管理
仅营地、学校显示打开营地
OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
WITH w_sers AS ( SELECT sc.SER_CONN_PROVIDER_SUP_ID PROVIDER_SUP_ID, count(*) AS services FROM SER_CONN sc WHERE sc.OWN_SUP_ID = @g_sup_id AND ser_conn_state = 'USED' AND SER_CONN_VER = '2026' -- ewa_test @ser_id > 0 AND sc.ser_id = @ser_id -- ewa_test @sup_up_id is not null and sc.sup_id=@sup_up_id -- ewa_test GROUP BY sc.SER_CONN_PROVIDER_SUP_ID ), ser AS ( SELECT DISTINCT SUP_ID FROM ser_conn a WHERE a.ser_key0 = @ser_key_id OR a.ser_key1 = @ser_key_id ), w_sup_subs as ( -- 筛选出当前供应商下的全部服务商 select DISTINCT SUP_DOWN_ID from sup_sub where sup_up_id=@sup_up_id AND (ser_id = @ser_id or @ser_id is null) and OWN_SUP_ID=@g_sup_id ), w_camp as ( select CAMP_SUP_ID,min(CAMP_ID) CAMP_ID from camp_main a inner join (select distinct SD_REF_ID SD_CAMP_ID from SHARE_DATA sd WHERE SD_TAG = 'CAMP_MAIN' AND SD_DATA=@G_SUP_ID ) sd on A.CAMP_ID=sd.SD_CAMP_ID group by CAMP_SUP_ID having count(1)=1 ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT sm.*, sd.ser_name AS st, au.adm_name, S.CITY_NAME, smt.bas_TAG_NAME AS SUP_MTAG_NAME, cc.CRM_COM_ID, CRM_CONN_ID, cc.CRM_CONN_CREATE_TIME, country.CITY_NAME COUNTRY_NAME, sers.services, w_camp.CAMP_ID, pi.PI_UNID, pi.PI_ID FROM SUP_MAIN sm LEFT JOIN w_sers sers ON sm.SUP_ID = sers.PROVIDER_SUP_ID INNER JOIN CRM_CONN CC ON CC.SUP_DOWN_ID = SM.SUP_ID AND CC.sup_UP_id = @g_sup_id LEFT JOIN CITY S ON SM.CITY_ID1 = S.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN city country ON s.COUNTRY_ID = country.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN bas_tag smt ON smt.bas_TAG = cc.CRM_CONN_TAG LEFT JOIN ser_main sd ON sd.sup_id = 3 AND sd.ser_TAG = sm.ser_tag1 LEFT JOIN adm_user au ON au.adm_id = cc.adm_id LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG bt ON sd.SER_TAG = bt.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG bt2 ON sm.SIGN_TAG = bt2.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN SUP_INBOUND inbound ON sm.sup_id = inbound.sup_id left join w_camp on sm.sup_id=w_camp.CAMP_SUP_ID left join poi_info pi on sm.SUP_REF_TABLE='POI_INFO' and sm.SUP_REF_ID=pi.PI_ID -- ewa_test @sup_UP_id is not null -- sup_UP_id 拥有的服务商id INNER JOIN w_sup_subs ss ON ss.SUP_DOWN_ID = sm.sup_id -- 服务商 -- ewa_test @ser_key_id > 0 LEFT JOIN ser ON sm.sup_id = ser.SUP_ID -- ewa_test WHERE 1 = 1 -- ewa_test @sup_UP_id is null AND ( CRM_CONN_TAG = 'SUP_TYPE_SUPPLY' OR CRM_CONN_TAG = 'SUP_TYPE_ALL' OR sm.sup_id = @g_sup_id ) -- ewa_test @IN_GRP_CARD is NOT NULL AND sm.sup_id IN (@SUP_ID_SPLIT) -- ewa_test @ser_id > 0 and @sup_UP_id is null AND sers.sup_id > 0 -- ewa_test @ser_key_id > 0 AND (ser.SUP_ID > 0) -- ewa_test @ASSOCIATED_SUPPLIERS is not null -- 相关供应商展开的服务商 and (sm.SUP_ID=@SUP_ID -- 自己是服务商 or sm.SUP_ID in (SELECT SUP_DOWN_ID from sup_sub where sup_up_id=@SUP_ID and OWN_SUP_ID=@g_sup_id) -- 自己是供应商 ) -- ewa_test @show_tag = 'inbound' AND ( @show_tag = 'inbound' AND inbound.SUP_ID > 0 ) -- ewa_test ) sl WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY CRM_CONN_CREATE_TIME desc, services DESC, SUP_ID DESC; -- ewa_table_name ser_main SELECT SER_ID, SER_NAME, SER_NAME_EN from ser_main where ser_ob3 ='USED' and ser_id !=1035 order by SER_ORD;
-- ewa_table_name ser_tag SELECT SER_TAG, SER_TAG_ID, SER_TAG_NAME, SER_TAG_NAME_EN FROM ser_tag WHERE ser_id = @ser_id AND ser_tag_status = 'USED' AND ser_tag LIKE 'TAG0' ORDER BY ser_tag_ord;

Set.Name: RemoveProvider SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT '已经有服务了，不能移除' AS ewa_err_out WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ser_conn WHERE sup_id = @sup_up_id and SER_CONN_PROVIDER_SUP_ID = @sup_id and ser_id=@ser_id AND ser_conn_state = 'USED' and ser_conn_ver = '2026' );
delete sup_sub where sup_down_id=@sup_id and sup_up_id = @sup_up_id and ser_id=@ser_id and own_sup_id=@g_sup_id and exists (select 1 from crm_conn x where x.SUP_UP_ID=@g_sup_id and x.sup_down_id=sup_sub.sup_down_id);
